authors_text: Sewon Min,Weijia Shi,Mike Lewis,Xilun Chen,Wen-tau Yih,Hannaneh Hajishirzi,Luke Zettlemoyer
title: Nonparametric Masked Language Modeling
title_zh: 非参数掩蔽语言建模
comment: 20 pages; 9 figures. Published at ACL 2023 Findings. Code available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/NPM
comments: 20 pages; 9 figures. Published at ACL 2023 Findings. Code available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/NPM
abstract: Existing language models (LMs) predict tokens with a softmax over a finite vocabulary, which can make it difficult to predict rare tokens or phrases. We introduce NPM, the first nonparametric masked language model that replaces this softmax with a nonparametric distribution over every phrase in a reference corpus. NPM fills in the [MASK] solely from retrieving a token from a text corpus. We show that NPM can be efficiently trained with a contrastive objective and an in-batch approximation to full corpus retrieval. Zero-shot evaluation on 16 tasks including classification, fact probing and question answering demonstrates that NPM outperforms significantly larger parametric models, either with or without a retrieve-and-generate approach. It is particularly better at dealing with rare patterns (word senses or facts) and predicting rare or nearly unseen words (e.g., non-Latin script). We release the model and code at github.com/facebookresearch/NPM.
summary: Existing language models (LMs) predict tokens with a softmax over a finite vocabulary, which can make it difficult to predict rare tokens or phrases. We introduce NPM, the first nonparametric masked language model that replaces this softmax with a nonparametric distribution over every phrase in a reference corpus. We show that NPM can be efficiently trained with a contrastive objective and an in-batch approximation to full corpus retrieval. Zero-shot evaluation on 16 tasks including classification, fact probing and question answering demonstrates that NPM outperforms significantly larger parametric models, either with or without a retrieve-and-generate approach. It is particularly better at dealing with rare patterns (word senses or facts) and predicting rare or nearly unseen words (e.g., non-Latin script). We release the model and code at github.com/facebookresearch/NPM.
abstract_zh: 现有的语言模型 (LM) 在有限词汇量上使用 softmax 来预测标记，这使得预测罕见标记或短语变得困难。我们引入了 NPM，这是第一个非参数屏蔽语言模型，它用参考语料库中每个短语的非参数分布取代了 softmax。 NPM 仅通过从文本语料库中检索标记来填充 [MASK]。我们证明，NPM 可以通过对比目标和全语料库检索的批量近似进行有效训练。对分类、事实探索和问答等 16 项任务的零样本评估表明，无论是否使用检索和生成方法，NPM 的性能都明显优于更大的参数模型。它特别擅长处理罕见的模式（词义或事实）和预测罕见或几乎看不见的单词（例如非拉丁文字）。我们在 github.com/facebookresearch/NPM 发布了模型和代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非参数掩码语言模型（NPM），通过参考语料库中的非参数分布预测token，以解决传统模型在罕见词预测上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型使用有限词汇表的softmax预测token，难以有效处理罕见词或短语，尤其在非拉丁字符和低频词汇场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: NPM用参考语料库的非参数分布替代softmax，通过检索语料库中的token填充[MASK]，结合对比目标与批次内近似检索实现高效训练。
AI.result: 在16项零样本任务中，NPM超越了更大参数量的模型（无论是否采用检索生成方法），尤其擅长处理罕见模式（如词义、事实）及非拉丁字符等近未见词汇。
AI.conclusion: NPM通过非参数化方法有效提升了罕见词预测能力，在特定任务中展现出对大规模参数模型的性能优势，且具有高效训练潜力。

We introduce NPM, the first nonparametric masked language model that replaces this softmax with a nonparametric distribution over every phrase in a reference corpus. NPM fills in the [MASK] solely from retrieving a token from a text corpus. Zero-shot evaluation on 16 tasks including classification, fact probing and question answering demonstrates that NPM outperforms significantly larger parametric models, either with or without a retrieve-and-generate approach. It is particularly better at dealing with rare patterns (word senses or facts) and predicting rare or nearly unseen words (e.g., non-Latin script). authors_text: Kaustubh Sridhar,Souradeep Dutta,James Weimer,Insup Lee
title: Guaranteed Conformance of Neurosymbolic Models to Natural Constraints
title_zh: 保证神经符号模型符合自然约束
comment: Accepted to L4DC 2023 and Neurosymbolic Generative Models workshop, ICLR 2023
comments: Accepted to L4DC 2023 and Neurosymbolic Generative Models workshop, ICLR 2023
abstract: Deep neural networks have emerged as the workhorse for a large section of robotics and control applications, especially as models for dynamical systems. Such data-driven models are in turn used for designing and verifying autonomous systems. They are particularly useful in modeling medical systems where data can be leveraged to individualize treatment. In safety-critical applications, it is important that the data-driven model is conformant to established knowledge from the natural sciences. Such knowledge is often available or can often be distilled into a (possibly black-box) model. For instance, an F1 racing car should conform to Newton's laws (which are encoded within a unicycle model). In this light, we consider the following problem - given a model $M$ and a state transition dataset, we wish to best approximate the system model while being a bounded distance away from $M$. We propose a method to guarantee this conformance. Our first step is to distill the dataset into a few representative samples called memories, using the idea of a growing neural gas. Next, using these memories we partition the state space into disjoint subsets and compute bounds that should be respected by the neural network in each subset. This serves as a symbolic wrapper for guaranteed conformance. We argue theoretically that this only leads to a bounded increase in approximation error; which can be controlled by increasing the number of memories. We experimentally show that on three case studies (Car Model, Drones, and Artificial Pancreas), our constrained neurosymbolic models conform to specified models (each encoding various constraints) with order-of-magnitude improvements compared to the augmented Lagrangian and vanilla training methods. Our code can be found at: https://github.com/kaustubhsridhar/Constrained_Models

Such data-driven models are in turn used for designing and verifying autonomous systems. They are particularly useful in modeling medical systems where data can be leveraged to individualize treatment. In safety-critical applications, it is important that the data-driven model is conformant to established knowledge from the natural sciences. Such knowledge is often available or can often be distilled into a (possibly black-box) model. For instance, an F1 racing car should conform to Newton's laws (which are encoded within a unicycle model). In this light, we consider the following problem - given a model $M$ and a state transition dataset, we wish to best approximate the system model while being a bounded distance away from $M$. We propose a method to guarantee this conformance. Our first step is to distill the dataset into a few representative samples called memories, using the idea of a growing neural gas. Next, using these memories we partition the state space into disjoint subsets and compute bounds that should be respected by the neural network in each subset. This serves as a symbolic wrapper for guaranteed conformance. We argue theoretically that this only leads to a bounded increase in approximation error; which can be controlled by increasing the number of memories. We experimentally show that on three case studies (Car Model, Drones, and Artificial Pancreas), our constrained neurosymbolic models conform to specified models (each encoding various constraints) with order-of-magnitude improvements compared to the augmented Lagrangian and vanilla training methods. Our code can be found at: https://github.com/kaustubhsridhar/Constrained_Models
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络已成为大部分机器人和控制应用的主力，特别是作为动力系统的模型。此类数据驱动模型又用于设计和验证自主系统。它们在建模医疗系统时特别有用，可以利用数据来进行个性化治疗。在安全关键型应用中，数据驱动模型必须符合自然科学的既定知识，这一点非常重要。这些知识通常是可用的，或者通常可以被提炼成（可能是黑盒）模型。例如，F1 赛车应符合牛顿定律（在独轮车模型中编码）。有鉴于此，我们考虑以下问题 - 给定模型 $M$ 和状态转换数据集，我们希望在距 $M$ 有界距离的同时最好地近似系统模型。我们提出了一种保证这种一致性的方法。我们的第一步是利用生长神经气体的想法将数据集提炼成一些称为记忆的代表性样本。接下来，使用这些存储器，我们将状态空间划分为不相交的子集，并计算每个子集中的神经网络应遵守的边界。这充当保证一致性的符号包装。我们从理论上认为，这只会导致近似误差有界增加；可以通过增加内存数量来控制。我们通过实验证明，在三个案例研究（汽车模型、无人机和人工胰腺）中，我们的约束神经符号模型符合指定模型（每个模型都编码各种约束），与增强拉格朗日和普通训练方法相比，具有数量级的改进。我们的代码可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/kaustubhsridhar/Constrained_Models

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经符号模型方法，确保深度学习模型在符合自然科学约束的同时保持准确性。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动模型在安全关键领域（如医疗、机器人）需遵循自然规律约束，但传统方法难以保证模型与物理定律的符合性。
AI.method: 通过Growing Neural Gas提炼数据记忆样本，划分状态空间并计算约束边界，构建符号包装器实现模型约束保证。
AI.result: 在汽车模型、无人机和人工胰腺三个案例中，该方法较传统方法提升数量级，约束符合性显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号模型能有效平衡数据拟合与物理约束，为安全关键系统提供可靠建模方案。

authors_text: Nikola Popovic,Danda Pani Paudel,Luc Van Gool
title: Surface Normal Clustering for Implicit Representation of Manhattan Scenes
title_zh: 用于隐式表示曼哈顿场景的表面法线聚类
abstract: Novel view synthesis and 3D modeling using implicit neural field representation are shown to be very effective for calibrated multi-view cameras. Such representations are known to benefit from additional geometric and semantic supervision. Most existing methods that exploit additional supervision require dense pixel-wise labels or localized scene priors. These methods cannot benefit from high-level vague scene priors provided in terms of scenes' descriptions. In this work, we aim to leverage the geometric prior of Manhattan scenes to improve the implicit neural radiance field representations. More precisely, we assume that only the knowledge of the indoor scene (under investigation) being Manhattan is known -- with no additional information whatsoever -- with an unknown Manhattan coordinate frame. Such high-level prior is used to self-supervise the surface normals derived explicitly in the implicit neural fields. Our modeling allows us to cluster the derived normals and exploit their orthogonality constraints for self-supervision. Our exhaustive experiments on datasets of diverse indoor scenes demonstrate the significant benefit of the proposed method over the established baselines. The source code is available at https://github.com/nikola3794/normal-clustering-nerf.
summary: Novel view synthesis and 3D modeling using implicit neural field representation are shown to be very effective for calibrated multi-view cameras. Such representations are known to benefit from additional geometric and semantic supervision. Most existing methods that exploit additional supervision require dense pixel-wise labels or localized scene priors. These methods cannot benefit from high-level vague scene priors provided in terms of scenes' descriptions. In this work, we aim to leverage the geometric prior of Manhattan scenes to improve the implicit neural radiance field representations. More precisely, we assume that only the knowledge of the indoor scene (under investigation) being Manhattan is known -- with no additional information whatsoever -- with an unknown Manhattan coordinate frame. Such high-level prior is used to self-supervise the surface normals derived explicitly in the implicit neural fields. Our modeling allows us to cluster the derived normals and exploit their orthogonality constraints for self-supervision. Our exhaustive experiments on datasets of diverse indoor scenes demonstrate the significant benefit of the proposed method over the established baselines. The source code is available at https://github.com/nikola3794/normal-clustering-nerf.
abstract_zh: 使用隐式神经场表示的新颖视图合成和 3D 建模被证明对于校准多视图相机非常有效。众所周知，这种表示受益于额外的几何和语义监督。大多数利用额外监督的现有方法需要密集的像素级标签或局部场景先验。这些方法无法受益于根据场景描述提供的高级模糊场景先验。在这项工作中，我们的目标是利用曼哈顿场景的几何先验来改进隐式神经辐射场表示。更准确地说，我们假设只有室内场景（正在调查）是曼哈顿的知识是已知的 - 没有任何附加信息 - 具有未知的曼哈顿坐标系。这种高级先验用于自我监督在隐式神经场中显式导出的表面法线。我们的建模允许我们对导出的法线进行聚类并利用它们的正交性约束进行自我监督。我们对不同室内场景数据集的详尽实验证明了所提出的方法相对于既定基线的显着优势。源代码可在 https://github.com/nikola3794/normal-clustering-nerf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用曼哈顿场景几何先验信息改进隐式神经辐射场（NeRF）表示的方法，通过表面法线聚类和正交约束实现自监督学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖密集像素标签或局部场景先验，无法利用场景描述中的高层模糊先验。曼哈顿场景的几何特性可提供有效先验但未被充分利用。
AI.method: 假设场景为曼哈顿结构但未知坐标系，通过隐式神经场显式推导表面法线，利用聚类和正交约束实现自监督学习。
AI.result: 在多个室内场景数据集上实验表明，该方法显著优于现有基线，提升新型视角合成与3D重建效果。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效利用曼哈顿场景高层几何先验，为隐式表示提供新的自监督学习范式。

search_text: Surface Normal Clustering for Implicit Representation of Manhattan Scenes 用于隐式表示曼哈顿场景的表面法线聚类 Novel view synthesis and 3D modeling using implicit neural field representation are shown to be very effective for calibrated multi-view cameras. Such representations are known to benefit from additional geometric and semantic supervision. Most existing methods that exploit additional supervision require dense pixel-wise labels or localized scene priors. These methods cannot benefit from high-level vague scene priors provided in terms of scenes' descriptions. In this work, we aim to leverage the geometric prior of Manhattan scenes to improve the implicit neural radiance field representations. More precisely, we assume that only the knowledge of the indoor scene (under investigation) being Manhattan is known -- with no additional information whatsoever -- with an unknown Manhattan coordinate frame. Such high-level prior is used to self-supervise the surface normals derived explicitly in the implicit neural fields. Our modeling allows us to cluster the derived normals and exploit their orthogonality constraints for self-supervision. Our exhaustive experiments on datasets of diverse indoor scenes demonstrate the significant benefit of the proposed method over the established baselines. The source code is available at https://github.com/nikola3794/normal-clustering-nerf. 使用隐式神经场表示的新颖视图合成和 3D 建模被证明对于校准多视图相机非常有效。众所周知，这种表示受益于额外的几何和语义监督。大多数利用额外监督的现有方法需要密集的像素级标签或局部场景先验。这些方法无法受益于根据场景描述提供的高级模糊场景先验。在这项工作中，我们的目标是利用曼哈顿场景的几何先验来改进隐式神经辐射场表示。更准确地说，我们假设只有室内场景（正在调查）是曼哈顿的知识是已知的 - 没有任何附加信息 - 具有未知的曼哈顿坐标系。这种高级先验用于自我监督在隐式神经场中显式导出的表面法线。我们的建模允许我们对导出的法线进行聚类并利用它们的正交性约束进行自我监督。我们对不同室内场景数据集的详尽实验证明了所提出的方法相对于既定基线的显着优势。源代码可在 https://github.com/nikola3794/normal-clustering-nerf 获取。 本文提出一种利用曼哈顿场景几何先验信息改进隐式神经辐射场（NeRF）表示的方法，通过表面法线聚类和正交约束实现自监督学习。 Nikola Popovic,Danda Pani Paudel,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Esin Koyuncu,Timofey Solovyev,Elena Alshina,André Kaup
title: Device Interoperability for Learned Image Compression with Weights and Activations Quantization
title_zh: 具有权重和激活量化的学习图像压缩的设备互操作性
abstract: Learning-based image compression has improved to a level where it can outperform traditional image codecs such as HEVC and VVC in terms of coding performance. In addition to good compression performance, device interoperability is essential for a compression codec to be deployed, i.e., encoding and decoding on different CPUs or GPUs should be error-free and with negligible performance reduction. In this paper, we present a method to solve the device interoperability problem of a state-of-the-art image compression network. We implement quantization to entropy networks which output entropy parameters. We suggest a simple method which can ensure cross-platform encoding and decoding, and can be implemented quickly with minor performance deviation, of 0.3% BD-rate, from floating point model results.
summary: Learning-based image compression has improved to a level where it can outperform traditional image codecs such as HEVC and VVC in terms of coding performance. In addition to good compression performance, device interoperability is essential for a compression codec to be deployed, i.e., encoding and decoding on different CPUs or GPUs should be error-free and with negligible performance reduction. In this paper, we present a method to solve the device interoperability problem of a state-of-the-art image compression network. We implement quantization to entropy networks which output entropy parameters. We suggest a simple method which can ensure cross-platform encoding and decoding, and can be implemented quickly with minor performance deviation, of 0.3% BD-rate, from floating point model results.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的图像压缩在编码性能方面已经提高到可以超越 HEVC 和 VVC 等传统图像编解码器的水平。除了良好的压缩性能之外，设备互操作性对于要部署的压缩编解码器也至关重要，即不同 CPU 或 GPU 上的编码和解码应该没有错误，并且性能下降可以忽略不计。在本文中，我们提出了一种解决最先进图像压缩网络的设备互操作性问题的方法。我们对输出熵参数的熵网络实施量化。我们提出了一种简单的方法，可以确保跨平台编码和解码，并且可以快速实现，与浮点模型结果相比，性能偏差较小，BD-rate 为 0.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过量化权重和激活值解决学习型图像压缩跨设备互操作性问题的方法，确保不同硬件平台上的编解码无误差且性能损失极小。
AI.motivation: 尽管学习型图像压缩性能已超越传统编解码器，但跨设备部署时因硬件差异导致的编解码误差和性能下降仍是实际应用的关键障碍。
AI.method: 对熵网络的权重和激活值进行量化处理，设计跨平台兼容的编解码流程，通过量化参数控制实现快速部署与性能保持。
AI.result: 在跨设备测试中，该方法实现0.3% BD-rate的轻微性能损失，编解码过程无误差且兼容主流计算平台。
AI.conclusion: 量化方法有效解决了学习型图像压缩的设备互操作性难题，在保证性能的前提下实现了跨硬件平台的可靠部署。

authors_text: Fangyi Yu,Lee Quartey,Frank Schilder
title: Legal Prompting: Teaching a Language Model to Think Like a Lawyer
title_zh: 法律提示：教授语言模型像律师一样思考
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables. Accepted by NLLP 2022 (EMNLP workshop)
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables. Accepted by NLLP 2022 (EMNLP workshop)
abstract: Large language models that are capable of zero or few-shot prompting approaches have given rise to the new research area of prompt engineering. Recent advances showed that for example Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompts can improve arithmetic or common sense tasks significantly. We explore how such approaches fare with legal reasoning tasks and take the COLIEE entailment task based on the Japanese Bar exam for testing zero-shot/few-shot and fine-tuning approaches. Our findings show that while CoT prompting and fine-tuning with explanations approaches show improvements, the best results are produced by prompts that are derived from specific legal reasoning techniques such as IRAC (Issue, Rule, Application, Conclusion). Based on our experiments we improve the 2021 best result from 0.7037 accuracy to 0.8148 accuracy and beat the 2022 best system of 0.6789 accuracy with an accuracy of 0.7431.
summary: Large language models that are capable of zero or few-shot prompting approaches have given rise to the new research area of prompt engineering. Recent advances showed that for example Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompts can improve arithmetic or common sense tasks significantly. We explore how such approaches fare with legal reasoning tasks and take the COLIEE entailment task based on the Japanese Bar exam for testing zero-shot/few-shot and fine-tuning approaches. Our findings show that while CoT prompting and fine-tuning with explanations approaches show improvements, the best results are produced by prompts that are derived from specific legal reasoning techniques such as IRAC (Issue, Rule, Application, Conclusion). Based on our experiments we improve the 2021 best result from 0.7037 accuracy to 0.8148 accuracy and beat the 2022 best system of 0.6789 accuracy with an accuracy of 0.7431.
abstract_zh: 能够实现零次或几次提示方法的大型语言模型催生了提示工程的新研究领域。最近的进展表明，例如思想链 (CoT) 提示可以显着改善算术或常识任务。我们探讨了这些方法如何处理法律推理任务，并采用基于日本律师考试的 COLIEE 蕴涵任务来测试零样本/少样本和微调方法。我们的研究结果表明，虽然 CoT 提示和微调解释方法显示出改进，但最好的结果是由特定法律推理技术（如 IRAC（问题、规则、应用、结论））衍生的提示产生的。根据我们的实验，我们将 2021 年的最佳结果从 0.7037 精度提高到 0.8148 精度，并以 0.7431 的精度击败了 2022 年 0.6789 精度的最佳系统。

AI.tldr: 本文探索如何通过提示工程提升语言模型在法律推理任务中的表现，特别是基于法律特定推理框架（如IRAC）的提示方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管Chain-of-Thought（CoT）等提示方法在通用任务中表现优异，但法律推理需要结构化逻辑和专业术语，现有方法在该领域的效果尚未明确验证。
AI.method: 在COLIEE法律推理数据集上测试零样本/少样本提示、微调及基于IRAC框架的提示方法，对比不同策略的性能差异。
AI.result: 使用IRAC框架的提示方法将2021年最佳准确率从0.7037提升至0.8148，超越2022年最佳系统0.6789的准确率（达0.7431）。
AI.conclusion: 法律推理任务需结合专业逻辑框架（如IRAC）设计提示，未来可进一步优化法律领域特定的提示工程方法。

conclusion: 法律推理任务需结合专业逻辑框架（如IRAC）设计提示，未来可进一步优化法律领域特定的提示工程方法。
search_text: Legal Prompting: Teaching a Language Model to Think Like a Lawyer 法律提示：教授语言模型像律师一样思考 Large language models that are capable of zero or few-shot prompting approaches have given rise to the new research area of prompt engineering. Recent advances showed that for example Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompts can improve arithmetic or common sense tasks significantly. We explore how such approaches fare with legal reasoning tasks and take the COLIEE entailment task based on the Japanese Bar exam for testing zero-shot/few-shot and fine-tuning approaches. Our findings show that while CoT prompting and fine-tuning with explanations approaches show improvements, the best results are produced by prompts that are derived from specific legal reasoning techniques such as IRAC (Issue, Rule, Application, Conclusion). Based on our experiments we improve the 2021 best result from 0.7037 accuracy to 0.8148 accuracy and beat the 2022 best system of 0.6789 accuracy with an accuracy of 0.7431. 能够实现零次或几次提示方法的大型语言模型催生了提示工程的新研究领域。最近的进展表明，例如思想链 (CoT) 提示可以显着改善算术或常识任务。我们探讨了这些方法如何处理法律推理任务，并采用基于日本律师考试的 COLIEE 蕴涵任务来测试零样本/少样本和微调方法。我们的研究结果表明，虽然 CoT 提示和微调解释方法显示出改进，但最好的结果是由特定法律推理技术（如 IRAC（问题、规则、应用、结论））衍生的提示产生的。根据我们的实验，我们将 2021 年的最佳结果从 0.7037 精度提高到 0.8148 精度，并以 0.7431 的精度击败了 2022 年 0.6789 精度的最佳系统。 本文探索如何通过提示工程提升语言模型在法律推理任务中的表现，特别是基于法律特定推理框架（如IRAC）的提示方法。 Fangyi Yu,Lee Quartey,Frank Schilder cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Lukas Hoyer,Dengxin Dai,Haoran Wang,Luc Van Gool
title: MIC: Masked Image Consistency for Context-Enhanced Domain Adaptation
title_zh: MIC：用于上下文增强域适应的蒙版图像一致性
abstract: In unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), a model trained on source data (e.g. synthetic) is adapted to target data (e.g. real-world) without access to target annotation. Most previous UDA methods struggle with classes that have a similar visual appearance on the target domain as no ground truth is available to learn the slight appearance differences. To address this problem, we propose a Masked Image Consistency (MIC) module to enhance UDA by learning spatial context relations of the target domain as additional clues for robust visual recognition. MIC enforces the consistency between predictions of masked target images, where random patches are withheld, and pseudo-labels that are generated based on the complete image by an exponential moving average teacher. To minimize the consistency loss, the network has to learn to infer the predictions of the masked regions from their context. Due to its simple and universal concept, MIC can be integrated into various UDA methods across different visual recognition tasks such as image classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection. MIC significantly improves the state-of-the-art performance across the different recognition tasks for synthetic-to-real, day-to-nighttime, and clear-to-adverse-weather UDA. For instance, MIC achieves an unprecedented UDA performance of 75.9 mIoU and 92.8% on GTA-to-Cityscapes and VisDA-2017, respectively, which corresponds to an improvement of +2.1 and +3.0 percent points over the previous state of the art. The implementation is available at https://github.com/lhoyer/MIC.
summary: In unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), a model trained on source data (e.g. synthetic) is adapted to target data (e.g. real-world) without access to target annotation. Most previous UDA methods struggle with classes that have a similar visual appearance on the target domain as no ground truth is available to learn the slight appearance differences. To address this problem, we propose a Masked Image Consistency (MIC) module to enhance UDA by learning spatial context relations of the target domain as additional clues for robust visual recognition. MIC enforces the consistency between predictions of masked target images, where random patches are withheld, and pseudo-labels that are generated based on the complete image by an exponential moving average teacher. To minimize the consistency loss, the network has to learn to infer the predictions of the masked regions from their context. Due to its simple and universal concept, MIC can be integrated into various UDA methods across different visual recognition tasks such as image classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection. MIC significantly improves the state-of-the-art performance across the different recognition tasks for synthetic-to-real, day-to-nighttime, and clear-to-adverse-weather UDA. For instance, MIC achieves an unprecedented UDA performance of 75.9 mIoU and 92.8% on GTA-to-Cityscapes and VisDA-2017, respectively, which corresponds to an improvement of +2.1 and +3.0 percent points over the previous state of the art. The implementation is available at https://github.com/lhoyer/MIC.
abstract_zh: 在无监督域适应（UDA）中，在源数据（例如合成数据）上训练的模型可以适应目标数据（例如真实世界），而无需访问目标注释。大多数以前的 UDA 方法都在处理目标域上具有相似视觉外观的类，因为没有可用的基本事实来了解细微的外观差异。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个掩码图像一致性（MIC）模块，通过学习目标域的空间上下文关系作为鲁棒视觉识别的额外线索来增强 UDA。 MIC 强制屏蔽目标图像的预测（其中随机补丁被保留）与指数移动平均教师基于完整图像生成的伪标签之间的一致性。为了最大限度地减少一致性损失，网络必须学会从上下文中推断屏蔽区域的预测。由于其简单且通用的概念，MIC 可以集成到跨不同视觉识别任务（例如图像分类、语义分割和对象检测）的各种 UDA 方法中。 MIC 显着提高了合成到真实、白天到夜间以及晴朗到恶劣天气 UDA 的不同识别任务的最新性能。例如，MIC 在 GTA-to-Cityscapes 和 VisDA-2017 上分别实现了前所未有的 75.9 mIoU 和 92.8% 的 UDA 性能，这相当于比之前的最佳技术水平提高了 +2.1 和 +3.0 个百分点。该实现可在 https://github.com/lhoyer/MIC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MIC的模块，通过学习目标域的空间上下文关系，提升无监督领域自适应（UDA）中视觉识别的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有UDA方法在目标域类别视觉相似时表现不佳，因缺乏标注数据学习细微外观差异。需通过额外线索增强模型对目标域的适应能力。
AI.method: MIC模块通过掩码目标图像并强制其预测与基于完整图像的伪标签保持一致，利用指数移动平均教师生成伪标签，通过最小化一致性损失推断遮挡区域的上下文信息。
AI.result: MIC在GTA-to-Cityscapes和VisDA-2017数据集上分别达到75.9 mIoU和92.8%的性能，较之前方法提升2.1和3.0个百分点。
AI.conclusion: MIC通过简单通用的机制显著提升多种视觉任务的UDA性能，适用于合成到真实、昼夜及恶劣天气等场景，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Merlin A. Nau,A. Hans Vija,Wesley Gohn,Maximilian P. Reymann,Andreas K. Maier
title: Hybrid adiabatic quantum computing for tomographic image reconstruction -- opportunities and limitations
title_zh: 用于断层扫描图像重建的混合绝热量子计算——机遇和局限性
abstract: Our goal is to reconstruct tomographic images with few measurements and a low signal-to-noise ratio. In clinical imaging, this helps to improve patient comfort and reduce radiation exposure. As quantum computing advances, we propose to use an adiabatic quantum computer and associated hybrid methods to solve the reconstruction problem. Tomographic reconstruction is an ill-posed inverse problem. We test our reconstruction technique for image size, noise content, and underdetermination of the measured projection data. We then present the reconstructed binary and integer-valued images of up to 32 by 32 pixels. The demonstrated method competes with traditional reconstruction algorithms and is superior in terms of robustness to noise and reconstructions from few projections. We postulate that hybrid quantum computing will soon reach maturity for real applications in tomographic reconstruction. Finally, we point out the current limitations regarding the problem size and interpretability of the algorithm.
summary: Our goal is to reconstruct tomographic images with few measurements and a low signal-to-noise ratio. In clinical imaging, this helps to improve patient comfort and reduce radiation exposure. As quantum computing advances, we propose to use an adiabatic quantum computer and associated hybrid methods to solve the reconstruction problem. Tomographic reconstruction is an ill-posed inverse problem. We test our reconstruction technique for image size, noise content, and underdetermination of the measured projection data. We then present the reconstructed binary and integer-valued images of up to 32 by 32 pixels. The demonstrated method competes with traditional reconstruction algorithms and is superior in terms of robustness to noise and reconstructions from few projections. We postulate that hybrid quantum computing will soon reach maturity for real applications in tomographic reconstruction. Finally, we point out the current limitations regarding the problem size and interpretability of the algorithm.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是通过少量测量和低信噪比重建断层图像。在临床成像中，这有助于提高患者舒适度并减少辐射暴露。随着量子计算的进步，我们建议使用绝热量子计算机和相关的混合方法来解决重建问题。断层扫描重建是一个不适定的反问题。我们测试我们的重建技术的图像大小、噪声内容和测量投影数据的不确定性。然后，我们呈现高达 32 x 32 像素的重建二进制和整数值图像。所演示的方法可与传统的重建算法竞争，并且在对噪声和少量投影的重建的鲁棒性方面具有优越性。我们假设混合量子计算将很快在断层扫描重建的实际应用中成熟。最后，我们指出当前有关问题规模和算法可解释性的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用混合绝热量子计算方法进行断层图像重建，以应对少量测量和低信噪比的挑战。
AI.motivation: 在临床成像中，减少测量次数和辐射暴露可提升患者舒适度，而量子计算的进步为解决此类逆问题提供了新途径。
AI.method: 采用绝热量子计算机及混合方法，测试图像尺寸、噪声水平及投影数据欠定性，生成最大32×32像素的二值和整数图像。
AI.result: 该方法在噪声鲁棒性和少量投影重建方面优于传统算法，但受限于问题规模和算法可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 混合量子计算有望在断层重建中实现实际应用，但需克服当前规模限制与算法透明度问题。

authors_text: Arya Bangun,Paul F. Baumeister,Alexander Clausen,Dieter Weber,Rafal E. Dunin-Borkowski
title: Wigner Distribution Deconvolution Adaptation for Live Ptychography Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于实时叠图重建的维格纳分布反卷积自适应
abstract: We propose a modification of Wigner Distribution Deconvolution (WDD) to support live processing ptychography. Live processing allows to reconstruct and display the specimen transfer function gradually while diffraction patterns are acquired. For this purpose we reformulate WDD and apply a dimensionality reduction technique that reduces memory consumption and increases processing speed. We show numerically that this approach maintains the reconstruction quality of specimen transfer functions as well as reduces computational complexity during acquisition processes. Although we only present the reconstruction for Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy (STEM) datasets, in general, the live processing algorithm we present in this paper can be applied to real-time ptychographic reconstruction for different fields of application.
summary: We propose a modification of Wigner Distribution Deconvolution (WDD) to support live processing ptychography. Live processing allows to reconstruct and display the specimen transfer function gradually while diffraction patterns are acquired. For this purpose we reformulate WDD and apply a dimensionality reduction technique that reduces memory consumption and increases processing speed. We show numerically that this approach maintains the reconstruction quality of specimen transfer functions as well as reduces computational complexity during acquisition processes. Although we only present the reconstruction for Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy (STEM) datasets, in general, the live processing algorithm we present in this paper can be applied to real-time ptychographic reconstruction for different fields of application.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了对维格纳分布反卷积（WDD）的修改，以支持实时处理叠印术。实时处理允许在获取衍射图案的同时逐渐重建和显示样本传递函数。为此，我们重新制定了 WDD 并应用降维技术来减少内存消耗并提高处理速度。我们从数值上表明，这种方法保持了样本传递函数的重建质量，并降低了采集过程中的计算复杂性。虽然我们只介绍扫描透射电子显微镜（STEM）数据集的重建，但总的来说，我们在本文中提出的实时处理算法可以应用于不同应用领域的实时叠图重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的Wigner分布解卷积方法，用于实时ptychography重建，并通过降维技术优化计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统ptychography重建方法计算复杂度高，难以实现实时处理，需开发高效算法以支持动态数据采集与显示。
AI.method: 重新设计Wigner分布解卷积框架，结合降维技术降低内存占用与计算耗时，适用于扫描透射电镜等场景。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了方法在保持重建精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，且算法具备跨领域应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该实时处理算法为ptychography技术在多领域的动态应用提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Wigner Distribution Deconvolution Adaptation for Live Ptychography Reconstruction 用于实时叠图重建的维格纳分布反卷积自适应 We propose a modification of Wigner Distribution Deconvolution (WDD) to support live processing ptychography. Live processing allows to reconstruct and display the specimen transfer function gradually while diffraction patterns are acquired. For this purpose we reformulate WDD and apply a dimensionality reduction technique that reduces memory consumption and increases processing speed. We show numerically that this approach maintains the reconstruction quality of specimen transfer functions as well as reduces computational complexity during acquisition processes. Although we only present the reconstruction for Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy (STEM) datasets, in general, the live processing algorithm we present in this paper can be applied to real-time ptychographic reconstruction for different fields of application. 我们提出了对维格纳分布反卷积（WDD）的修改，以支持实时处理叠印术。实时处理允许在获取衍射图案的同时逐渐重建和显示样本传递函数。为此，我们重新制定了 WDD 并应用降维技术来减少内存消耗并提高处理速度。我们从数值上表明，这种方法保持了样本传递函数的重建质量，并降低了采集过程中的计算复杂性。虽然我们只介绍扫描透射电子显微镜（STEM）数据集的重建，但总的来说，我们在本文中提出的实时处理算法可以应用于不同应用领域的实时叠图重建。 本文提出改进的Wigner分布解卷积方法，用于实时ptychography重建，并通过降维技术优化计算效率。 Arya Bangun,Paul F. authors_text: Francesco Nespoli,Daniel Barreda,Patrick A. Naylor
title: Relative Acoustic Features for Distance Estimation in Smart-Homes
title_zh: 智能家居中距离估计的相对声学特征
abstract: Any audio recording encapsulates the unique fingerprint of the associated acoustic environment, namely the background noise and reverberation. Considering the scenario of a room equipped with a fixed smart speaker device with one or more microphones and a wearable smart device (watch, glasses or smartphone), we employed the improved proportionate normalized least mean square adaptive filter to estimate the relative room impulse response mapping the audio recordings of the two devices. We performed inter-device distance estimation by exploiting a new set of features obtained extending the definition of some acoustic attributes of the room impulse response to its relative version. In combination with the sparseness measure of the estimated relative room impulse response, the relative features allow precise inter-device distance estimation which can be exploited for tasks such as best microphone selection or acoustic scene analysis. Experimental results from simulated rooms of different dimensions and reverberation times demonstrate the effectiveness of this computationally lightweight approach for smart home acoustic ranging applications
summary: Any audio recording encapsulates the unique fingerprint of the associated acoustic environment, namely the background noise and reverberation. Considering the scenario of a room equipped with a fixed smart speaker device with one or more microphones and a wearable smart device (watch, glasses or smartphone), we employed the improved proportionate normalized least mean square adaptive filter to estimate the relative room impulse response mapping the audio recordings of the two devices. We performed inter-device distance estimation by exploiting a new set of features obtained extending the definition of some acoustic attributes of the room impulse response to its relative version. In combination with the sparseness measure of the estimated relative room impulse response, the relative features allow precise inter-device distance estimation which can be exploited for tasks such as best microphone selection or acoustic scene analysis. Experimental results from simulated rooms of different dimensions and reverberation times demonstrate the effectiveness of this computationally lightweight approach for smart home acoustic ranging applications
abstract_zh: 任何音频记录都封装了相关声学环境的独特指纹，即背景噪声和混响。考虑到房间配备带有一个或多个麦克风的固定智能扬声器设备和可穿戴智能设备（手表、眼镜或智能手机）的场景，我们采用改进的比例归一化最小均方自适应滤波器来估计映射两个设备的音频记录的相对房间脉冲响应。我们通过利用一组新的特征来进行设备间距离估计，这些特征将房间脉冲响应的一些声学属性的定义扩展到其相对版本。与估计的相对房间脉冲响应的稀疏度测量相结合，相关特征允许精确的设备间距离估计，可用于诸如最佳麦克风选择或声学场景分析等任务。不同尺寸和混响时间的模拟房间的实验结果证明了这种轻量级计算方法对于智能家居声学测距应用的有效性

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用相对声学特征进行智能家居环境中设备间距离估计的方法。
AI.motivation: 在智能家居场景中，需通过固定设备与可穿戴设备间的音频信号特征实现设备距离估计，以支持麦克风选择或声学场景分析等任务。
AI.method: 采用改进的比例归一化最小均方自适应滤波器估计相对房间脉冲响应，并扩展定义其相对声学属性特征，结合稀疏性度量实现距离估计。
AI.result: 在不同尺寸和混响时间的模拟房间实验中，验证了该计算轻量方法在智能家居声学测距中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于相对声学特征的距离估计方法为智能家居提供了高效可行的声学测距解决方案。

authors_text: Andrew Albright,Joshua Vaughan
title: Selecting Mechanical Parameters of a Monopode Jumping System with Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习选择单脚跳跃系统的机械参数
abstract: Legged systems have many advantages when compared to their wheeled counterparts. For example, they can more easily navigate extreme, uneven terrain. However, there are disadvantages as well, particularly the difficulty seen in modeling the nonlinearities of the system. Research has shown that using flexible components within legged locomotive systems improves performance measures such as efficiency and running velocity. Because of the difficulties encountered in modeling flexible systems, control methods such as reinforcement learning can be used to define control strategies. Furthermore, reinforcement learning can be tasked with learning mechanical parameters of a system to match a control input. It is shown in this work that when deploying reinforcement learning to find design parameters for a pogo-stick jumping system, the designs the agents learn are optimal within the design space provided to the agents.
summary: Legged systems have many advantages when compared to their wheeled counterparts. For example, they can more easily navigate extreme, uneven terrain. However, there are disadvantages as well, particularly the difficulty seen in modeling the nonlinearities of the system. Research has shown that using flexible components within legged locomotive systems improves performance measures such as efficiency and running velocity. Because of the difficulties encountered in modeling flexible systems, control methods such as reinforcement learning can be used to define control strategies. Furthermore, reinforcement learning can be tasked with learning mechanical parameters of a system to match a control input. It is shown in this work that when deploying reinforcement learning to find design parameters for a pogo-stick jumping system, the designs the agents learn are optimal within the design space provided to the agents.
abstract_zh: 与轮式系统相比，腿式系统具有许多优点。例如，他们可以更轻松地穿越极端、不平坦的地形。然而，它也有缺点，特别是对系统非线性建模的困难。研究表明，在腿式机车系统中使用柔性组件可以提高效率和运行速度等性能指标。由于柔性系统建模遇到困难，可以使用强化学习等控制方法来定义控制策略。此外，强化学习的任务是学习系统的机械参数以匹配控制输入。这项工作表明，当部署强化学习来寻找弹簧单高跷跳跃系统的设计参数时，智能体学习的设计在提供给智能体的设计空间内是最优的。

AI.tldr: 本文利用强化学习优化单足跳跃系统的机械参数设计。
AI.motivation: 传统腿式系统建模复杂且控制策略难以定义，而柔性组件虽能提升性能却增加建模难度，需借助强化学习自动学习参数。
AI.method: 采用强化学习方法训练智能体，通过与环境交互学习机械参数以匹配控制输入并优化系统性能。
AI.result: 在给定设计空间内，强化学习得到的参数设计被验证为最优方案，显著提升跳跃系统效率与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习能有效解决复杂机械系统参数优化问题，为腿式机器人设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Shreshth Tuli,Giuliano Casale,Ludmila Cherkasova,Nicholas R. Jennings
title: DeepFT: Fault-Tolerant Edge Computing using a Self-Supervised Deep Surrogate Model
title_zh: DeepFT：使用自监督深度代理模型的容错边缘计算
abstract: The emergence of latency-critical AI applications has been supported by the evolution of the edge computing paradigm. However, edge solutions are typically resource-constrained, posing reliability challenges due to heightened contention for compute and communication capacities and faulty application behavior in the presence of overload conditions. Although a large amount of generated log data can be mined for fault prediction, labeling this data for training is a manual process and thus a limiting factor for automation. Due to this, many companies resort to unsupervised fault-tolerance models. Yet, failure models of this kind can incur a loss of accuracy when they need to adapt to non-stationary workloads and diverse host characteristics. To cope with this, we propose a novel modeling approach, called DeepFT, to proactively avoid system overloads and their adverse effects by optimizing the task scheduling and migration decisions. DeepFT uses a deep surrogate model to accurately predict and diagnose faults in the system and co-simulation based self-supervised learning to dynamically adapt the model in volatile settings. It offers a highly scalable solution as the model size scales by only 3 and 1 percent per unit increase in the number of active tasks and hosts. Extensive experimentation on a Raspberry-Pi based edge cluster with DeFog benchmarks shows that DeepFT can outperform state-of-the-art baseline methods in fault-detection and QoS metrics. Specifically, DeepFT gives the highest F1 scores for fault-detection, reducing service deadline violations by up to 37\% while also improving response time by up to 9%.
summary: The emergence of latency-critical AI applications has been supported by the evolution of the edge computing paradigm. However, edge solutions are typically resource-constrained, posing reliability challenges due to heightened contention for compute and communication capacities and faulty application behavior in the presence of overload conditions. Although a large amount of generated log data can be mined for fault prediction, labeling this data for training is a manual process and thus a limiting factor for automation. Due to this, many companies resort to unsupervised fault-tolerance models. Yet, failure models of this kind can incur a loss of accuracy when they need to adapt to non-stationary workloads and diverse host characteristics. To cope with this, we propose a novel modeling approach, called DeepFT, to proactively avoid system overloads and their adverse effects by optimizing the task scheduling and migration decisions. DeepFT uses a deep surrogate model to accurately predict and diagnose faults in the system and co-simulation based self-supervised learning to dynamically adapt the model in volatile settings. It offers a highly scalable solution as the model size scales by only 3 and 1 percent per unit increase in the number of active tasks and hosts. Extensive experimentation on a Raspberry-Pi based edge cluster with DeFog benchmarks shows that DeepFT can outperform state-of-the-art baseline methods in fault-detection and QoS metrics. Specifically, DeepFT gives the highest F1 scores for fault-detection, reducing service deadline violations by up to 37\% while also improving response time by up to 9%.
abstract_zh: 边缘计算范式的发展支持了延迟关键型人工智能应用程序的出现。然而，边缘解决方案通常受到资源限制，由于对计算和通信容量的争夺加剧以及在过载情况下出现错误的应用程序行为，带来了可靠性挑战。尽管可以挖掘大量生成的日志数据来进行故障预测，但标记这些数据以进行训练是一个手动过程，因此是自动化的限制因素。因此，许多公司采用无监督的容错模型。然而，当此类故障模型需要适应非平稳工作负载和不同的主机特征时，可能会导致准确性下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为 DeepFT 的新颖建模方法，通过优化任务调度和迁移决策来主动避免系统过载及其不利影响。 DeepFT 使用深度代理模型来准确预测和诊断系统中的故障，并使用基于协同仿真的自监督学习来动态适应不稳定环境中的模型。它提供了高度可扩展的解决方案，因为活动任务和主机数量每增加一个单位，模型大小仅扩展 3% 和 1%。使用 DeFog 基准对基于 Raspberry-Pi 的边缘集群进行的广泛实验表明，DeepFT 在故障检测和 QoS 指标方面可以超越最先进的基准方法。具体来说，DeepFT 在故障检测方面给出了最高的 F1 分数，将服务截止日期违规率减少了高达 37%，同时还将响应时间缩短了高达 9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepFT方法，通过自监督深度替代模型实现边缘计算中的容错，优化任务调度和迁移决策以避免系统过载。
AI.motivation: 边缘计算资源受限，现有方法因数据标注依赖人工且无法适应动态负载而存在可靠性挑战，需更高效自动化的容错方案。
AI.method: 构建深度替代模型预测诊断故障，并结合基于协同仿真的自监督学习动态适应变化环境，模型规模随任务和主机数量线性扩展。
AI.result: 在Raspberry-Pi集群上实验显示，DeepFT在故障检测F1分数、服务截止期限违规减少37%及响应时间提升9%等指标优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DeepFT通过自监督学习与可扩展模型设计，有效提升了边缘计算环境下的故障容忍能力与服务质量，为动态负载场景提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Chao-Peng Chen,Jun-Wei Hsieh,Ping-Yang Chen,Yi-Kuan Hsieh,Bor-Shiun Wang
title: SARAS-Net: Scale and Relation Aware Siamese Network for Change Detection
title_zh: SARAS-Net：用于变化检测的规模和关系感知连体网络
abstract: Change detection (CD) aims to find the difference between two images at different times and outputs a change map to represent whether the region has changed or not. To achieve a better result in generating the change map, many State-of-The-Art (SoTA) methods design a deep learning model that has a powerful discriminative ability. However, these methods still get lower performance because they ignore spatial information and scaling changes between objects, giving rise to blurry or wrong boundaries. In addition to these, they also neglect the interactive information of two different images. To alleviate these problems, we propose our network, the Scale and Relation-Aware Siamese Network (SARAS-Net) to deal with this issue. In this paper, three modules are proposed that include relation-aware, scale-aware, and cross-transformer to tackle the problem of scene change detection more effectively. To verify our model, we tested three public datasets, including LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, and DSFIN, and obtained SoTA accuracy. Our code is available at https://github.com/f64051041/SARAS-Net.
summary: Change detection (CD) aims to find the difference between two images at different times and outputs a change map to represent whether the region has changed or not. To achieve a better result in generating the change map, many State-of-The-Art (SoTA) methods design a deep learning model that has a powerful discriminative ability. However, these methods still get lower performance because they ignore spatial information and scaling changes between objects, giving rise to blurry or wrong boundaries. In addition to these, they also neglect the interactive information of two different images. To alleviate these problems, we propose our network, the Scale and Relation-Aware Siamese Network (SARAS-Net) to deal with this issue. In this paper, three modules are proposed that include relation-aware, scale-aware, and cross-transformer to tackle the problem of scene change detection more effectively. To verify our model, we tested three public datasets, including LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, and DSFIN, and obtained SoTA accuracy. Our code is available at https://github.com/f64051041/SARAS-Net.
abstract_zh: 变化检测（CD）旨在找到不同时间两幅图像之间的差异，并输出变化图来表示该区域是否发生变化。为了在生成变化图方面获得更好的结果，许多最先进的（SoTA）方法设计了具有强大判别能力的深度学习模型。然而，这些方法的性能仍然较低，因为它们忽略了对象之间的空间信息和缩放变化，从而导致边界模糊或错误。除此之外，他们还忽略了两个不同图像的交互信息。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了我们的网络，即规模和关系感知连体网络（SARAS-Net）来处理这个问题。本文提出了三个模块，包括关系感知、尺度感知和交叉变换器，以更有效地解决场景变化检测问题。为了验证我们的模型，我们测试了三个公共数据集，包括 LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD 和 DSFIN，并获得了 SoTA 精度。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/f64051041/SARAS-Net 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SARAS-Net的尺度与关系感知孪生网络，用于改进遥感图像变化检测任务中的边界模糊和错误问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在变化检测中因忽略空间信息、尺度变化及双图像交互信息，导致生成的变化图存在边界模糊或错误。
AI.method: 设计包含关系感知模块、尺度感知模块和跨图像Transformer模块的SARAS-Net网络，通过建模空间关系、处理尺度差异及增强图像间交互来提升检测精度。
AI.result: 在LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD和DSFIN三个数据集上达到SOTA准确率，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SARAS-Net通过融合多尺度特征与跨图像交互信息，有效解决了变化检测中的边界模糊问题，为遥感图像分析提供了新方法。

authors_text: Zih-Ching Chen,Yu-Shun Sung,Hung-yi Lee
title: CHAPTER: Exploiting Convolutional Neural Network Adapters for Self-supervised Speech Models
title_zh: 第章：利用卷积神经网络适配器实现自监督语音模型
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is a powerful technique for learning representations from unlabeled data. Transformer based models such as HuBERT, which consist a feature extractor and transformer layers, are leading the field in the speech domain. SSL models are fine-tuned on a wide range of downstream tasks, which involves re-training the majority of the model for each task. Previous studies have introduced applying adapters, which are small lightweight modules commonly used in Natural Language Processing (NLP) to adapt pre-trained models to new tasks. However, such efficient tuning techniques only provide adaptation at the transformer layer, but failed to perform adaptation at the feature extractor. In this paper, we propose CHAPTER, an efficient tuning method specifically designed for SSL speech model, by applying CNN adapters at the feature extractor. Using this method, we can only fine-tune fewer than 5% of parameters per task compared to fully fine-tuning and achieve better and more stable performance. We empirically found that adding CNN adapters to the feature extractor can help the adaptation on emotion and speaker tasks. For instance, the accuracy of SID is improved from 87.71 to 91.56, and the accuracy of ER is improved by 5%.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is a powerful technique for learning representations from unlabeled data. Transformer based models such as HuBERT, which consist a feature extractor and transformer layers, are leading the field in the speech domain. SSL models are fine-tuned on a wide range of downstream tasks, which involves re-training the majority of the model for each task. Previous studies have introduced applying adapters, which are small lightweight modules commonly used in Natural Language Processing (NLP) to adapt pre-trained models to new tasks. However, such efficient tuning techniques only provide adaptation at the transformer layer, but failed to perform adaptation at the feature extractor. In this paper, we propose CHAPTER, an efficient tuning method specifically designed for SSL speech model, by applying CNN adapters at the feature extractor. Using this method, we can only fine-tune fewer than 5% of parameters per task compared to fully fine-tuning and achieve better and more stable performance. We empirically found that adding CNN adapters to the feature extractor can help the adaptation on emotion and speaker tasks. For instance, the accuracy of SID is improved from 87.71 to 91.56, and the accuracy of ER is improved by 5%.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 是一种从未标记数据中学习表示的强大技术。基于 Transformer 的模型（例如 HuBERT）由特征提取器和转换器层组成，在语音领域处于领先地位。 SSL 模型在广泛的下游任务上进行了微调，其中涉及为每个任务重新训练大部分模型。之前的研究介绍了应用适配器，它们是自然语言处理（NLP）中常用的小型轻量级模块，用于使预训练的模型适应新任务。然而，这种高效的调整技术仅在变换器层提供自适应，而未能在特征提取器处执行自适应。在本文中，我们提出了 CHAPTER，这是一种专门为 SSL 语音模型设计的高效调整方法，通过在特征提取器中应用 CNN 适配器来实现。使用这种方法，与完全微调相比，我们每个任务只能微调不到 5% 的参数，并获得更好、更稳定的性能。我们凭经验发现，将 CNN 适配器添加到特征提取器中可以帮助适应情感和说话人任务。例如，SID的准确率从87.71提高到91.56，ER的准确率提高了5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHAPTER方法，通过在自监督语音模型的特征提取器中引入卷积神经网络适配器，实现高效参数微调。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督语音模型微调需重新训练大部分参数，且仅在Transformer层应用适配器，未有效利用特征提取器的优化潜力。
AI.method: 在特征提取器中插入CNN适配器模块，仅微调少于5%的模型参数以适应下游任务。
AI.result: 在说话人识别（SID）任务中准确率从87.71提升至91.56，在情绪识别（ER）任务中准确率提升5%。
AI.conclusion: CNN适配器能显著提升语音模型在特征提取阶段的适应性，以更少参数量实现更优性能。

search_text: CHAPTER: Exploiting Convolutional Neural Network Adapters for Self-supervised Speech Models 第章：利用卷积神经网络适配器实现自监督语音模型 Self-supervised learning (SSL) is a powerful technique for learning representations from unlabeled data. Transformer based models such as HuBERT, which consist a feature extractor and transformer layers, are leading the field in the speech domain. SSL models are fine-tuned on a wide range of downstream tasks, which involves re-training the majority of the model for each task. Previous studies have introduced applying adapters, which are small lightweight modules commonly used in Natural Language Processing (NLP) to adapt pre-trained models to new tasks. However, such efficient tuning techniques only provide adaptation at the transformer layer, but failed to perform adaptation at the feature extractor. In this paper, we propose CHAPTER, an efficient tuning method specifically designed for SSL speech model, by applying CNN adapters at the feature extractor. Using this method, we can only fine-tune fewer than 5% of parameters per task compared to fully fine-tuning and achieve better and more stable performance. We empirically found that adding CNN adapters to the feature extractor can help the adaptation on emotion and speaker tasks. For instance, the accuracy of SID is improved from 87.71 to 91.56, and the accuracy of ER is improved by 5%. 自监督学习 (SSL) 是一种从未标记数据中学习表示的强大技术。基于 Transformer 的模型（例如 HuBERT）由特征提取器和转换器层组成，在语音领域处于领先地位。 SSL 模型在广泛的下游任务上进行了微调，其中涉及为每个任务重新训练大部分模型。之前的研究介绍了应用适配器，它们是自然语言处理（NLP）中常用的小型轻量级模块，用于使预训练的模型适应新任务。然而，这种高效的调整技术仅在变换器层提供自适应，而未能在特征提取器处执行自适应。在本文中，我们提出了 CHAPTER，这是一种专门为 SSL 语音模型设计的高效调整方法，通过在特征提取器中应用 CNN 适配器来实现。使用这种方法，与完全微调相比，我们每个任务只能微调不到 5% 的参数，并获得更好、更稳定的性能。我们凭经验发现，将 CNN 适配器添加到特征提取器中可以帮助适应情感和说话人任务。例如，SID的准确率从87.71提高到91.56，ER的准确率提高了5%。 本文提出CHAPTER方法，通过在自监督语音模型的特征提取器中引入卷积神经网络适配器，实现高效参数微调。 Zih-Ching Chen,Yu-Shun Sung,Hung-yi Lee eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Pasquale De Rosa,Valerio Schiavoni
title: Understanding Cryptocoins Trends Correlations
title_zh: 了解加密货币趋势相关性
abstract: Crypto-coins (also known as cryptocurrencies) are tradable digital assets. Notable examples include Bitcoin, Ether and Litecoin. Ownerships of cryptocoins are registered on distributed ledgers (i.e., blockchains). Secure encryption techniques guarantee the security of the transactions (transfers of coins across owners), registered into the ledger. Cryptocoins are exchanged for specific trading prices. While history has shown the extreme volatility of such trading prices across all different sets of crypto-assets, it remains unclear what and if there are tight relations between the trading prices of different cryptocoins. Major coin exchanges (i.e., Coinbase) provide trend correlation indicators to coin owners, suggesting possible acquisitions or sells. However, these correlations remain largely unvalidated. In this paper, we shed lights on the trend correlations across a large variety of cryptocoins, by investigating their coin-price correlation trends over a period of two years. Our experimental results suggest strong correlation patterns between main coins (Ethereum, Bitcoin) and alt-coins. We believe our study can support forecasting techniques for time-series modeling in the context of crypto-coins. We release our dataset and code to reproduce our analysis to the research community.

Ownerships of cryptocoins are registered on distributed ledgers (i.e., blockchains). Major coin exchanges (i.e., Coinbase) provide trend correlation indicators to coin owners, suggesting possible acquisitions or sells. However, these correlations remain largely unvalidated. In this paper, we shed lights on the trend correlations across a large variety of cryptocoins, by investigating their coin-price correlation trends over a period of two years. Our experimental results suggest strong correlation patterns between main coins (Ethereum, Bitcoin) and alt-coins. We believe our study can support forecasting techniques for time-series modeling in the context of crypto-coins. We release our dataset and code to reproduce our analysis to the research community.
abstract_zh: 加密货币（也称为加密货币）是可交易的数字资产。著名的例子包括比特币、以太币和莱特币。加密货币的所有权在分布式账本（即区块链）上注册。安全加密技术保证登记到账本中的交易（跨所有者的代币转移）的安全性。加密货币可兑换成特定的交易价格。尽管历史表明所有不同加密资产组的此类交易价格都存在极大波动，但仍不清楚不同加密货币的交易价格之间是否存在紧密关系以及是否存在紧密关系。主要的硬币交易所（即 Coinbase）向硬币所有者提供趋势相关指标，表明可能的收购或出售。然而，这些相关性在很大程度上仍未得到验证。在本文中，我们通过调查两年内各种加密货币的货币价格相关性趋势，揭示了各种加密货币的趋势相关性。我们的实验结果表明，主要代币（以太坊、比特币）和山寨币之间存在很强的相关性模式。我们相信我们的研究可以支持加密货币背景下时间序列建模的预测技术。我们发布了我们的数据集和代码，以便向研究社区重现我们的分析。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析两年内的加密货币价格数据，研究不同加密货币之间的趋势相关性。
AI.motivation: 加密货币价格波动剧烈，但不同加密货币之间是否存在紧密的价格关联尚不明确，现有交易所提供的相关性指标缺乏验证。
AI.method: 基于两年的加密货币价格数据集，采用统计分析方法探究主要加密货币（如比特币、以太坊）与替代币之间的价格相关性趋势。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，主要加密货币与替代币之间存在显著的相关性模式，且这种关联在时间序列上具有可预测性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为加密货币的时间序列预测模型提供了依据，并公开了数据集和代码以支持后续研究。

authors_text: Gabriel Loaiza-Ganem,Brendan Leigh Ross,Luhuan Wu,John P. Cunningham,Jesse C. Cresswell,Anthony L. Caterini
title: Denoising Deep Generative Models
title_zh: 去噪深度生成模型
abstract: Likelihood-based deep generative models have recently been shown to exhibit pathological behaviour under the manifold hypothesis as a consequence of using high-dimensional densities to model data with low-dimensional structure. In this paper we propose two methodologies aimed at addressing this problem. Both are based on adding Gaussian noise to the data to remove the dimensionality mismatch during training, and both provide a denoising mechanism whose goal is to sample from the model as though no noise had been added to the data. Our first approach is based on Tweedie's formula, and the second on models which take the variance of added noise as a conditional input. We show that surprisingly, while well motivated, these approaches only sporadically improve performance over not adding noise, and that other methods of addressing the dimensionality mismatch are more empirically adequate.
summary: Likelihood-based deep generative models have recently been shown to exhibit pathological behaviour under the manifold hypothesis as a consequence of using high-dimensional densities to model data with low-dimensional structure. In this paper we propose two methodologies aimed at addressing this problem. Both are based on adding Gaussian noise to the data to remove the dimensionality mismatch during training, and both provide a denoising mechanism whose goal is to sample from the model as though no noise had been added to the data. Our first approach is based on Tweedie's formula, and the second on models which take the variance of added noise as a conditional input. We show that surprisingly, while well motivated, these approaches only sporadically improve performance over not adding noise, and that other methods of addressing the dimensionality mismatch are more empirically adequate.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于似然的深度生成模型已被证明在流形假设下表现出病态行为，这是使用高维密度对低维结构数据进行建模的结果。在本文中，我们提出了两种旨在解决此问题的方法。两者都基于向数据添加高斯噪声，以消除训练期间的维度不匹配，并且都提供去噪机制，其目标是从模型中进行采样，就好像没有向数据添加噪声一样。我们的第一种方法基于 Tweedie 公式，第二种方法基于将添加噪声的方差作为条件输入的模型。我们发现，令人惊讶的是，虽然动机良好，但与不添加噪声相比，这些方法只能偶尔提高性能，并且解决维度不匹配的其他方法在经验上更充分。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决基于似然的深度生成模型在流形假设下因高维密度与低维数据结构不匹配导致的病态行为，提出两种通过添加高斯噪声并结合去噪机制的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理低维数据结构时因高维密度建模导致性能问题，需解决维度不匹配带来的路径学行为。
AI.method: 方法一基于Tweedie公式，方法二将噪声方差作为条件输入，均通过添加高斯噪声并设计去噪机制实现训练过程中的维度对齐。
AI.result: 实验显示两种方法仅偶尔优于无噪声基线，其他维度匹配方法在实际效果上更优。
AI.conclusion: 理论动机合理但实际效果有限，需进一步探索更有效的维度不匹配解决方案。

result: 实验显示两种方法仅偶尔优于无噪声基线，其他维度匹配方法在实际效果上更优。
conclusion: 理论动机合理但实际效果有限，需进一步探索更有效的维度不匹配解决方案。
search_text: Denoising Deep Generative Models 去噪深度生成模型 Likelihood-based deep generative models have recently been shown to exhibit pathological behaviour under the manifold hypothesis as a consequence of using high-dimensional densities to model data with low-dimensional structure. In this paper we propose two methodologies aimed at addressing this problem. Both are based on adding Gaussian noise to the data to remove the dimensionality mismatch during training, and both provide a denoising mechanism whose goal is to sample from the model as though no noise had been added to the data. Our first approach is based on Tweedie's formula, and the second on models which take the variance of added noise as a conditional input. We show that surprisingly, while well motivated, these approaches only sporadically improve performance over not adding noise, and that other methods of addressing the dimensionality mismatch are more empirically adequate. 最近，基于似然的深度生成模型已被证明在流形假设下表现出病态行为，这是使用高维密度对低维结构数据进行建模的结果。在本文中，我们提出了两种旨在解决此问题的方法。两者都基于向数据添加高斯噪声，以消除训练期间的维度不匹配，并且都提供去噪机制，其目标是从模型中进行采样，就好像没有向数据添加噪声一样。我们的第一种方法基于 Tweedie 公式，第二种方法基于将添加噪声的方差作为条件输入的模型。我们发现，令人惊讶的是，虽然动机良好，但与不添加噪声相比，这些方法只能偶尔提高性能，并且解决维度不匹配的其他方法在经验上更充分。 本文旨在解决基于似然的深度生成模型在流形假设下因高维密度与低维数据结构不匹配导致的病态行为，提出两种通过添加高斯噪声并结合去噪机制的方法。 Gabriel Loaiza-Ganem,Brendan Leigh Ross,Luhuan Wu,John P. Cunningham,Jesse C. Cresswell,Anthony L. Caterini cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Gencer Sumbul,Begüm Demir
title: Generative Reasoning Integrated Label Noise Robust Deep Image Representation Learning
title_zh: 生成推理 集成标签噪声 鲁棒深度图像表示学习
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing. Our code is available at https://github.com/gencersumbul/GRID
comments: Accepted at the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing. Our code is available at https://github.com/gencersumbul/GRID
abstract: The development of deep learning based image representation learning (IRL) methods has attracted great attention for various image understanding problems. Most of these methods require the availability of a high quantity and quality of annotated training images, which can be time-consuming and costly to gather. To reduce labeling costs, crowdsourced data, automatic labeling procedures or citizen science projects can be considered. However, such approaches increase the risk of including label noise in training data. It may result in overfitting on noisy labels when discriminative reasoning is employed. This leads to sub-optimal learning procedures, and thus inaccurate characterization of images. To address this, we introduce a generative reasoning integrated label noise robust deep representation learning (GRID) approach. Our approach aims to model the complementary characteristics of discriminative and generative reasoning for IRL under noisy labels. To this end, we first integrate generative reasoning into discriminative reasoning through a supervised variational autoencoder. This allows GRID to automatically detect training samples with noisy labels. Then, through our label noise robust hybrid representation learning strategy, GRID adjusts the whole learning procedure for IRL of these samples through generative reasoning and that of other samples through discriminative reasoning. Our approach learns discriminative image representations while preventing interference of noisy labels independently from the IRL method being selected. Thus, unlike the existing methods, GRID does not depend on the type of annotation, neural network architecture, loss function or learning task, and thus can be directly utilized for various problems. Experimental results show its effectiveness compared to state-of-the-art methods. The code of GRID is publicly available at https://github.com/gencersumbul/GRID.
summary: The development of deep learning based image representation learning (IRL) methods has attracted great attention for various image understanding problems. Most of these methods require the availability of a high quantity and quality of annotated training images, which can be time-consuming and costly to gather. To reduce labeling costs, crowdsourced data, automatic labeling procedures or citizen science projects can be considered. However, such approaches increase the risk of including label noise in training data. It may result in overfitting on noisy labels when discriminative reasoning is employed. This leads to sub-optimal learning procedures, and thus inaccurate characterization of images. To address this, we introduce a generative reasoning integrated label noise robust deep representation learning (GRID) approach. Our approach aims to model the complementary characteristics of discriminative and generative reasoning for IRL under noisy labels. To this end, we first integrate generative reasoning into discriminative reasoning through a supervised variational autoencoder. This allows GRID to automatically detect training samples with noisy labels. Then, through our label noise robust hybrid representation learning strategy, GRID adjusts the whole learning procedure for IRL of these samples through generative reasoning and that of other samples through discriminative reasoning. Our approach learns discriminative image representations while preventing interference of noisy labels independently from the IRL method being selected. Thus, unlike the existing methods, GRID does not depend on the type of annotation, neural network architecture, loss function or learning task, and thus can be directly utilized for various problems. Experimental results show its effectiveness compared to state-of-the-art methods. The code of GRID is publicly available at https://github.com/gencersumbul/GRID.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的图像表示学习（IRL）方法的发展引起了各种图像理解问题的高度关注。这些方法中的大多数都需要提供大量和高质量的带注释的训练图像，而收集这些图像可能非常耗时且成本高昂。为了降低标签成本，可以考虑众包数据、自动标签程序或公民科学项目。然而，这种方法增加了在训练数据中包含标签噪声的风险。当采用歧视性推理时，可能会导致噪声标签过度拟合。这会导致学习过程不理想，从而导致图像特征不准确。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种生成推理集成标签噪声鲁棒深度表示学习（GRID）方法。我们的方法旨在对嘈杂标签下的 IRL 判别推理和生成推理的互补特征进行建模。为此，我们首先通过监督变分自动编码器将生成推理集成到判别推理中。这使得 GRID 能够自动检测带有噪声标签的训练样本。然后，通过我们的标签噪声鲁棒混合表示学习策略，GRID 通过生成推理调整这些样本的 IRL 的整个学习过程，并通过判别推理调整其他样本的 IRL 的整个学习过程。我们的方法学习有区别的图像表示，同时防止噪声标签的干扰，独立于所选的 IRL 方法。因此，与现有方法不同，GRID 不依赖于注释类型、神经网络架构、损失函数或学习任务，因此可以直接用于各种问题。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，它的有效性。 GRID 的代码可在 https://github.com/gencersumbul/GRID 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合生成推理的标签噪声鲁棒深度图像表示学习方法（GRID），旨在解决图像表示学习中因标签噪声导致的过拟合和学习效果下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度图像表示学习方法依赖大量高质量标注数据，但人工标注成本高且易引入标签噪声，导致模型过拟合和表示不准确。
AI.method: 通过监督变分自编码器将生成推理与判别推理结合，自动检测噪声标签样本，并采用混合表示学习策略，对噪声样本和正常样本分别通过生成推理和判别推理调整学习过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，GRID在多种任务和数据集上优于现有最先进方法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GRID方法独立于标注类型、网络结构和损失函数，可直接应用于各类图像理解问题，有效提升了标签噪声环境下的表示学习鲁棒性。

authors_text: Maxim Khomiakov,Julius Holbech Radzikowski,Carl Anton Schmidt,Mathias Bonde Sørensen,Mads Andersen,Michael Riis Andersen,Jes Frellsen
title: SolarDK: A high-resolution urban solar panel image classification and localization dataset
title_zh: SolarDK：高分辨率城市太阳能电池板图像分类和定位数据集
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, to access the dataset, see https://osf.io/aj539/
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, to access the dataset, see https://osf.io/aj539/
abstract: The body of research on classification of solar panel arrays from aerial imagery is increasing, yet there are still not many public benchmark datasets. This paper introduces two novel benchmark datasets for classifying and localizing solar panel arrays in Denmark: A human annotated dataset for classification and segmentation, as well as a classification dataset acquired using self-reported data from the Danish national building registry. We explore the performance of prior works on the new benchmark dataset, and present results after fine-tuning models using a similar approach as recent works. Furthermore, we train models of newer architectures and provide benchmark baselines to our datasets in several scenarios. We believe the release of these datasets may improve future research in both local and global geospatial domains for identifying and mapping of solar panel arrays from aerial imagery. The data is accessible at https://osf.io/aj539/.
summary: The body of research on classification of solar panel arrays from aerial imagery is increasing, yet there are still not many public benchmark datasets. This paper introduces two novel benchmark datasets for classifying and localizing solar panel arrays in Denmark: A human annotated dataset for classification and segmentation, as well as a classification dataset acquired using self-reported data from the Danish national building registry. We explore the performance of prior works on the new benchmark dataset, and present results after fine-tuning models using a similar approach as recent works. Furthermore, we train models of newer architectures and provide benchmark baselines to our datasets in several scenarios. We believe the release of these datasets may improve future research in both local and global geospatial domains for identifying and mapping of solar panel arrays from aerial imagery. The data is accessible at https://osf.io/aj539/.
abstract_zh: 根据航空图像对太阳能电池板阵列进行分类的研究正在不断增加，但公共基准数据集仍然不多。本文介绍了用于对丹麦太阳能电池板阵列进行分类和本地化的两个新颖的基准数据集：用于分类和分割的人工注释数据集，以及使用丹麦国家建筑登记处的自我报告数据获取的分类数据集。我们探索了先前作品在新基准数据集上的性能，并使用与最近作品类似的方法微调模型后呈现结果。此外，我们训练较新架构的模型，并在多种场景下为我们的数据集提供基准基线。我们相信这些数据集的发布可能会改善本地和全球地理空间领域的未来研究，以从航空图像中识别和绘制太阳能电池板阵列。该数据可通过 https://osf.io/aj539/ 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个用于丹麦城市高分辨率航拍图像中太阳能板阵列分类与定位的基准数据集，并评估了多种方法在该数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管太阳能板图像分类研究增多，但缺乏公开的基准数据集限制了相关算法的评估与改进。
AI.method: 构建人工标注分类/分割数据集及基于丹麦建筑注册数据的分类数据集，测试现有方法并微调模型，同时训练新架构模型提供基准。
AI.result: 验证了现有方法在数据集上的性能，通过微调提升效果，并为不同场景提供了新模型的基准线。
AI.conclusion: 发布的数据集可推动本地及全球地理空间领域太阳能板识别与映射研究的发展。

We believe the release of these datasets may improve future research in both local and global geospatial domains for identifying and mapping of solar panel arrays from aerial imagery. The data is accessible at https://osf.io/aj539/. 根据航空图像对太阳能电池板阵列进行分类的研究正在不断增加，但公共基准数据集仍然不多。本文介绍了用于对丹麦太阳能电池板阵列进行分类和本地化的两个新颖的基准数据集：用于分类和分割的人工注释数据集，以及使用丹麦国家建筑登记处的自我报告数据获取的分类数据集。我们探索了先前作品在新基准数据集上的性能，并使用与最近作品类似的方法微调模型后呈现结果。此外，我们训练较新架构的模型，并在多种场景下为我们的数据集提供基准基线。我们相信这些数据集的发布可能会改善本地和全球地理空间领域的未来研究，以从航空图像中识别和绘制太阳能电池板阵列。该数据可通过 https://osf.io/aj539/ 访问。 本文提出两个用于丹麦城市高分辨率航拍图像中太阳能板阵列分类与定位的基准数据集，并评估了多种方法在该数据集上的性能。 Maxim Khomiakov,Julius Holbech Radzikowski,Carl Anton Schmidt,Mathias Bonde Sørensen,Mads Andersen,Michael Riis Andersen,Jes Frellsen cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tobias Fischer,Yung-Hsu Yang,Suryansh Kumar,Min Sun,Fisher Yu
title: CC-3DT: Panoramic 3D Object Tracking via Cross-Camera Fusion
title_zh: CC-3DT：通过跨摄像机融合进行全景 3D 对象跟踪
abstract: To track the 3D locations and trajectories of the other traffic participants at any given time, modern autonomous vehicles are equipped with multiple cameras that cover the vehicle's full surroundings. Yet, camera-based 3D object tracking methods prioritize optimizing the single-camera setup and resort to post-hoc fusion in a multi-camera setup. In this paper, we propose a method for panoramic 3D object tracking, called CC-3DT, that associates and models object trajectories both temporally and across views, and improves the overall tracking consistency. In particular, our method fuses 3D detections from multiple cameras before association, reducing identity switches significantly and improving motion modeling. Our experiments on large-scale driving datasets show that fusion before association leads to a large margin of improvement over post-hoc fusion. We set a new state-of-the-art with 12.6% improvement in average multi-object tracking accuracy (AMOTA) among all camera-based methods on the competitive NuScenes 3D tracking benchmark, outperforming previously published methods by 6.5% in AMOTA with the same 3D detector.
summary: To track the 3D locations and trajectories of the other traffic participants at any given time, modern autonomous vehicles are equipped with multiple cameras that cover the vehicle's full surroundings. Yet, camera-based 3D object tracking methods prioritize optimizing the single-camera setup and resort to post-hoc fusion in a multi-camera setup. In this paper, we propose a method for panoramic 3D object tracking, called CC-3DT, that associates and models object trajectories both temporally and across views, and improves the overall tracking consistency. In particular, our method fuses 3D detections from multiple cameras before association, reducing identity switches significantly and improving motion modeling. Our experiments on large-scale driving datasets show that fusion before association leads to a large margin of improvement over post-hoc fusion. We set a new state-of-the-art with 12.6% improvement in average multi-object tracking accuracy (AMOTA) among all camera-based methods on the competitive NuScenes 3D tracking benchmark, outperforming previously published methods by 6.5% in AMOTA with the same 3D detector.
abstract_zh: 为了在任何给定时间跟踪其他交通参与者的 3D 位置和轨迹，现代自动驾驶车辆配备了多个摄像头，覆盖车辆的整个周围环境。然而，基于相机的 3D 对象跟踪方法优先考虑优化单相机设置，并在多相机设置中诉诸事后融合。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 CC-3DT 的全景 3D 对象跟踪方法，该方法可以在时间上和跨视图之间关联和建模对象轨迹，并提高整体跟踪一致性。特别是，我们的方法在关联之前融合了来自多个摄像机的 3D 检测，显着减少了身份切换并改进了运动建模。我们对大规模驾驶数据集的实验表明，关联前的融合比事后融合有很大的改进。在竞争性 NuScenes 3D 跟踪基准上，我们在所有基于相机的方法中设定了新的最先进技术，平均多目标跟踪精度 (AMOTA) 提高了 12.6%，比之前发布的具有相同 3D 检测器的 AMOTA 方法高出 6.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于跨摄像头融合的全景3D目标跟踪方法CC-3DT，通过在关联前融合多摄像头检测结果提升跟踪一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于摄像头的3D跟踪方法在多摄像头场景中优先优化单摄像头性能，通过后期融合导致跟踪一致性不足，存在身份切换问题。
AI.method: 在目标关联前融合多摄像头3D检测结果，结合时空信息建模轨迹，减少身份切换并优化运动预测。
AI.result: 在NuScenes基准测试中，AMOTA指标较现有方法提升12.6%，相较同类方法提升6.5%，达到相机基方法新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 跨摄像头早期融合策略显著优于后期融合，验证了时空联合建模在多视角3D跟踪中的有效性。

authors_text: Shamel Fahmi,Victor Barasuol,Domingo Esteban,Octavio Villarreal,Claudio Semini
title: ViTAL: Vision-Based Terrain-Aware Locomotion for Legged Robots
title_zh: ViTAL：基于视觉的腿式机器人地形感知运动
comment: IEEE Transactions on Robotics, 2022. part of dissertation arXiv:2212.00683
comments: IEEE Transactions on Robotics, 2022. part of dissertation arXiv:2212.00683
abstract: This work is on vision-based planning strategies for legged robots that separate locomotion planning into foothold selection and pose adaptation. Current pose adaptation strategies optimize the robot's body pose relative to given footholds. If these footholds are not reached, the robot may end up in a state with no reachable safe footholds. Therefore, we present a Vision-Based Terrain-Aware Locomotion (ViTAL) strategy that consists of novel pose adaptation and foothold selection algorithms. ViTAL introduces a different paradigm in pose adaptation that does not optimize the body pose relative to given footholds, but the body pose that maximizes the chances of the legs in reaching safe footholds. ViTAL plans footholds and poses based on skills that characterize the robot's capabilities and its terrain-awareness. We use the 90 kg HyQ and 140 kg HyQReal quadruped robots to validate ViTAL, and show that they are able to climb various obstacles including stairs, gaps, and rough terrains at different speeds and gaits. We compare ViTAL with a baseline strategy that selects the robot pose based on given selected footholds, and show that ViTAL outperforms the baseline.
summary: This work is on vision-based planning strategies for legged robots that separate locomotion planning into foothold selection and pose adaptation. Current pose adaptation strategies optimize the robot's body pose relative to given footholds. If these footholds are not reached, the robot may end up in a state with no reachable safe footholds. Therefore, we present a Vision-Based Terrain-Aware Locomotion (ViTAL) strategy that consists of novel pose adaptation and foothold selection algorithms. ViTAL introduces a different paradigm in pose adaptation that does not optimize the body pose relative to given footholds, but the body pose that maximizes the chances of the legs in reaching safe footholds. ViTAL plans footholds and poses based on skills that characterize the robot's capabilities and its terrain-awareness. We use the 90 kg HyQ and 140 kg HyQReal quadruped robots to validate ViTAL, and show that they are able to climb various obstacles including stairs, gaps, and rough terrains at different speeds and gaits. We compare ViTAL with a baseline strategy that selects the robot pose based on given selected footholds, and show that ViTAL outperforms the baseline.
abstract_zh: 这项工作是基于视觉的腿式机器人规划策略，将运动规划分为立足点选择和姿势适应。当前的姿势适应策略优化了机器人相对于给定立足点的身体姿势。如果达不到这些立足点，机器人最终可能会处于无法到达安全立足点的状态。因此，我们提出了一种基于视觉的地形感知运动（ViTAL）策略，该策略由新颖的姿势适应和立足点选择算法组成。 ViTAL 在姿势适应中引入了不同的范例，它不会优化相对于给定立足点的身体姿势，而是最大化腿部到达安全立足点的机会的身体姿势。 ViTAL 根据体现机器人能力及其地形感知的技能来规划立足点和姿势。我们使用 90 公斤 HyQ 和 140 公斤 HyQReal 四足机器人来验证 ViTAL，并表明它们能够以不同的速度和步态攀爬各种障碍物，包括楼梯、间隙和崎岖地形。我们将 ViTAL 与基于给定选定立足点选择机器人姿势的基线策略进行比较，并表明 ViTAL 优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的地形感知腿部机器人移动策略ViTAL，旨在提高机器人在复杂地形中的运动能力。
AI.motivation: 当前腿部机器人的姿态调整策略依赖于给定的脚踏点，若这些脚踏点无法到达，可能导致机器人陷入无安全脚踏点的状态。因此，需要一种新的策略来提高腿部机器人在复杂地形中的运动能力。
AI.method: ViTAL策略引入了一种新的姿态调整方法，不基于给定脚踏点优化身体姿态，而是最大化腿部到达安全脚踏点的可能性。同时，ViTAL结合了机器人能力和地形感知的技能进行脚踏点选择和姿态规划。
AI.result: 通过90公斤的HyQ和140公斤的HyQReal四足机器人验证了ViTAL的有效性，展示了其在不同速度和步态下攀爬楼梯、间隙和粗糙地形的能力，并优于基于给定脚踏点选择姿态的基线策略。
AI.conclusion: ViTAL策略通过结合机器人能力和地形感知的技能，提高了腿部机器人在复杂地形中的运动能力，并在实验中表现出优于基线策略的性能。

authors_text: Sotheara Leang,Eric Castelli,Dominique Vaufreydaz,Sethserey Sam
title: Preliminary Study on SSCF-derived Polar Coordinate for ASR
title_zh: SSCF导出的ASR极坐标的初步研究
abstract: The transition angles are defined to describe the vowel-to-vowel transitions in the acoustic space of the Spectral Subband Centroids, and the findings show that they are similar among speakers and speaking rates. In this paper, we propose to investigate the usage of polar coordinates in favor of angles to describe a speech signal by characterizing its acoustic trajectory and using them in Automatic Speech Recognition. According to the experimental results evaluated on the BRAF100 dataset, the polar coordinates achieved significantly higher accuracy than the angles in the mixed and cross-gender speech recognitions, demonstrating that these representations are superior at defining the acoustic trajectory of the speech signal. Furthermore, the accuracy was significantly improved when they were utilized with their first and second-order derivatives ($Δ$, $Δ$$Δ$), especially in cross-female recognition. However, the results showed they were not much more gender-independent than the conventional Mel-frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCCs).
summary: The transition angles are defined to describe the vowel-to-vowel transitions in the acoustic space of the Spectral Subband Centroids, and the findings show that they are similar among speakers and speaking rates. In this paper, we propose to investigate the usage of polar coordinates in favor of angles to describe a speech signal by characterizing its acoustic trajectory and using them in Automatic Speech Recognition. According to the experimental results evaluated on the BRAF100 dataset, the polar coordinates achieved significantly higher accuracy than the angles in the mixed and cross-gender speech recognitions, demonstrating that these representations are superior at defining the acoustic trajectory of the speech signal. Furthermore, the accuracy was significantly improved when they were utilized with their first and second-order derivatives ($Δ$, $Δ$$Δ$), especially in cross-female recognition. However, the results showed they were not much more gender-independent than the conventional Mel-frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCCs).
abstract_zh: 过渡角被定义为描述频谱子带质心声学空间中元音到元音的过渡，研究结果表明它们在说话者和语速之间是相似的。在本文中，我们建议通过表征语音轨迹并在自动语音识别中使用它们来研究使用有利于角度的极坐标来描述语音信号。根据在 BRAF100 数据集上评估的实验结果，极坐标在混合和跨性别语音识别中取得了明显高于角度的精度，表明这些表示在定义语音信号的声学轨迹方面具有优越性。此外，当它们与一阶和二阶导数（$Δ$、$Δ$$Δ$）一起使用时，准确性显着提高，特别是在跨女性识别中。然而，结果表明它们并不比传统的梅尔频率倒谱系数（MFCC）更加独立于性别。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于SSCF（频谱子带质心）的极坐标表示在自动语音识别（ASR）中的应用，通过分析音素间过渡角度的性别独立性，提出利用极坐标及其导数改进声学轨迹建模。
AI.motivation: 传统MFCC特征在性别无关性方面存在局限，而SSCF过渡角度具有跨说话人和语速的相似性，可能为ASR提供更稳健的声学轨迹表示。
AI.method: 定义SSCF频谱过渡角度，将其转换为极坐标表示并结合一阶、二阶导数（Δ、ΔΔ），在BRAF100数据集上对比角度特征与极坐标特征的识别性能。
AI.result: 极坐标特征在混合性别和跨女性语音识别中显著优于角度特征，但性别无关性提升有限，未超越传统MFCC的表现。
AI.conclusion: 极坐标能有效表征声学轨迹，尤其在跨性别识别中表现突出，但其性别无关性仍需进一步优化以替代MFCC。
