authors_text: Masoomeh Rahimpour,Ahmed Radwan,Henri Vandermeulen,Stefan Sunaert,Karolien Goffin,Michel Koole
title: Investigating certain choices of CNN configurations for brain lesion segmentation
title_zh: 研究用于脑病灶分割的 CNN 配置的某些选择
abstract: Brain tumor imaging has been part of the clinical routine for many years to perform non-invasive detection and grading of tumors. Tumor segmentation is a crucial step for managing primary brain tumors because it allows a volumetric analysis to have a longitudinal follow-up of tumor growth or shrinkage to monitor disease progression and therapy response. In addition, it facilitates further quantitative analysis such as radiomics. Deep learning models, in particular CNNs, have been a methodology of choice in many applications of medical image analysis including brain tumor segmentation. In this study, we investigated the main design aspects of CNN models for the specific task of MRI-based brain tumor segmentation. Two commonly used CNN architectures (i.e. DeepMedic and U-Net) were used to evaluate the impact of the essential parameters such as learning rate, batch size, loss function, and optimizer. The performance of CNN models using different configurations was assessed with the BraTS 2018 dataset to determine the most performant model. Then, the generalization ability of the model was assessed using our in-house dataset. For all experiments, U-Net achieved a higher DSC compared to the DeepMedic. However, the difference was only statistically significant for whole tumor segmentation using FLAIR sequence data and tumor core segmentation using T1w sequence data. Adam and SGD both with the initial learning rate set to 0.001 provided the highest segmentation DSC when training the CNN model using U-Net and DeepMedic architectures, respectively. No significant difference was observed when using different normalization approaches. In terms of loss functions, a weighted combination of soft Dice and cross-entropy loss with the weighting term set to 0.5 resulted in an improved segmentation performance and training stability for both DeepMedic and U-Net models.
summary: Brain tumor imaging has been part of the clinical routine for many years to perform non-invasive detection and grading of tumors. Tumor segmentation is a crucial step for managing primary brain tumors because it allows a volumetric analysis to have a longitudinal follow-up of tumor growth or shrinkage to monitor disease progression and therapy response. In addition, it facilitates further quantitative analysis such as radiomics. Deep learning models, in particular CNNs, have been a methodology of choice in many applications of medical image analysis including brain tumor segmentation. In this study, we investigated the main design aspects of CNN models for the specific task of MRI-based brain tumor segmentation. Two commonly used CNN architectures (i.e. DeepMedic and U-Net) were used to evaluate the impact of the essential parameters such as learning rate, batch size, loss function, and optimizer. The performance of CNN models using different configurations was assessed with the BraTS 2018 dataset to determine the most performant model. Then, the generalization ability of the model was assessed using our in-house dataset. For all experiments, U-Net achieved a higher DSC compared to the DeepMedic. However, the difference was only statistically significant for whole tumor segmentation using FLAIR sequence data and tumor core segmentation using T1w sequence data. Adam and SGD both with the initial learning rate set to 0.001 provided the highest segmentation DSC when training the CNN model using U-Net and DeepMedic architectures, respectively. No significant difference was observed when using different normalization approaches. In terms of loss functions, a weighted combination of soft Dice and cross-entropy loss with the weighting term set to 0.5 resulted in an improved segmentation performance and training stability for both DeepMedic and U-Net models.
abstract_zh: 多年来，脑肿瘤成像已成为临床常规的一部分，用于对肿瘤进行非侵入性检测和分级。肿瘤分割是治疗原发性脑肿瘤的关键步骤，因为它允许体积分析对肿瘤生长或缩小进行纵向随访，以监测疾病进展和治疗反应。此外，它还有助于进一步的定量分析，例如放射组学。深度学习模型，特别是 CNN，已成为包括脑肿瘤分割在内的许多医学图像分析应用中的首选方法。在本研究中，我们研究了用于基于 MRI 的脑肿瘤分割特定任务的 CNN 模型的主要设计方面。使用两种常用的 CNN 架构（即 DeepMedic 和 U-Net）来评估学习率、批量大小、损失函数和优化器等基本参数的影响。使用 BraTS 2018 数据集评估使用不同配置的 CNN 模型的性能，以确定性能最佳的模型。然后，使用我们的内部数据集评估模型的泛化能力。对于所有实验，与 DeepMedic 相比，U-Net 实现了更高的 DSC。然而，仅对于使用 FLAIR 序列数据的整个肿瘤分割和使用 T1w 序列数据的肿瘤核心分割，差异具有统计学意义。 Adam 和 SGD 的初始学习率均设置为 0.001，分别在使用 U-Net 和 DeepMedic 架构训练 CNN 模型时提供了最高的分割 DSC。使用不同的标准化方法时没有观察到显着差异。在损失函数方面，软 Dice 和交叉熵损失的加权组合（加权项设置为 0.5）提高了 DeepMedic 和 U-Net 模型的分割性能和训练稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同CNN配置在脑肿瘤分割任务中的性能，比较了DeepMedic和U-Net架构及关键参数的影响。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤分割对疾病监测和治疗评估至关重要，但现有CNN模型的配置选择缺乏系统性研究，需优化参数以提高分割精度。
AI.method: 采用DeepMedic和U-Net两种架构，通过调整学习率、批量大小、损失函数和优化器等参数，在BraTS 2018数据集和内部数据集上评估模型性能。
AI.result: U-Net在多数任务中DSC高于DeepMedic（仅在特定序列分割中显著），Adam和SGD分别在U-Net和DeepMedic中表现最佳，加权Dice-交叉熵损失提升性能。
AI.conclusion: U-Net在脑肿瘤分割中更具优势，优化器和损失函数的选择显著影响性能，而归一化方法影响较小。

authors_text: Thomas Nowotny,James P. Turner,James C. Knight
title: Loss shaping enhances exact gradient learning with Eventprop in spiking neural networks
title_zh: 损失整形利用 Eventprop 在尖峰神经网络中增强精确的梯度学习
comment: 36 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Neuromorphic Computing and Engineering (2022)
comments: 36 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Neuromorphic Computing and Engineering (2022)
abstract: Event-based machine learning promises more energy-efficient AI on future neuromorphic hardware. Here, we investigate how the recently discovered Eventprop algorithm for gradient descent on exact gradients in spiking neural networks can be scaled up to challenging keyword recognition benchmarks. We implemented Eventprop in the GPU-enhanced Neural Networks framework and used it for training recurrent spiking neural networks on the Spiking Heidelberg Digits and Spiking Speech Commands datasets. We found that learning depended strongly on the loss function and extended Eventprop to a wider class of loss functions to enable effective training. We then tested a large number of data augmentations and regularisations as well as exploring different network structures; and heterogeneous and trainable timescales. We found that when combined with two specific augmentations, the right regularisation and a delay line input, Eventprop networks with one recurrent layer achieved state-of-the-art performance on Spiking Heidelberg Digits and good accuracy on Spiking Speech Commands. In comparison to a leading surrogate-gradient-based SNN training method, our GeNN Eventprop implementation is 3X faster and uses 4X less memory. This work is a significant step towards a low-power neuromorphic alternative to current machine learning paradigms.
summary: Event-based machine learning promises more energy-efficient AI on future neuromorphic hardware. Here, we investigate how the recently discovered Eventprop algorithm for gradient descent on exact gradients in spiking neural networks can be scaled up to challenging keyword recognition benchmarks. We implemented Eventprop in the GPU-enhanced Neural Networks framework and used it for training recurrent spiking neural networks on the Spiking Heidelberg Digits and Spiking Speech Commands datasets. We found that learning depended strongly on the loss function and extended Eventprop to a wider class of loss functions to enable effective training. We then tested a large number of data augmentations and regularisations as well as exploring different network structures; and heterogeneous and trainable timescales. We found that when combined with two specific augmentations, the right regularisation and a delay line input, Eventprop networks with one recurrent layer achieved state-of-the-art performance on Spiking Heidelberg Digits and good accuracy on Spiking Speech Commands. In comparison to a leading surrogate-gradient-based SNN training method, our GeNN Eventprop implementation is 3X faster and uses 4X less memory. This work is a significant step towards a low-power neuromorphic alternative to current machine learning paradigms.
abstract_zh: 基于事件的机器学习有望在未来的神经形态硬件上实现更节能的人工智能。在这里，我们研究了最近发现的用于尖峰神经网络中精确梯度的梯度下降的 Eventprop 算法如何扩展到具有挑战性的关键字识别基准。我们在 GPU 增强型神经网络框架中实现了 Eventprop，并使用它在脉冲海德堡数字和脉冲语音命令数据集上训练循环脉冲神经网络。我们发现学习在很大程度上依赖于损失函数，并将 Eventprop 扩展到更广泛的损失函数类别以实现有效的训练。然后，我们测试了大量的数据增强和正则化，并探索了不同的网络结构；以及异构且可训练的时间尺度。我们发现，当与两种特定的增强、正确的正则化和延迟线输入相结合时，具有一个循环层的 Eventprop 网络在尖峰海德堡数字上实现了最先进的性能，并且在尖峰语音命令上实现了良好的准确性。与领先的基于代理梯度的 SNN 训练方法相比，我们的 GeNN Eventprop 实现速度提高了 3 倍，并且使用的内存减少了 4 倍。这项工作是朝着当前机器学习范式的低功耗神经形态替代方案迈出的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过改进Eventprop算法和损失函数设计，提升脉冲神经网络在关键词识别任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 事件驱动的机器学习有望在神经形态硬件上实现更高效的AI，但需解决Eventprop算法在复杂任务中的扩展性和训练效果问题。
AI.method: 在GeNN框架中实现Eventprop，扩展其支持的损失函数类别，并系统测试数据增强、正则化、网络结构及异构时间尺度组合。
AI.result: 结合特定增强方法、正则化和延迟线输入的单层循环网络，在Spiking Heidelberg Digits数据集上达到SOTA性能，在Speech Commands上表现良好，且训练速度比主流替代方法快3倍、内存占用少4倍。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为低功耗神经形态计算提供了可行的脉冲神经网络训练方案，推动了事件驱动AI的实用化进程。

search_text: Loss shaping enhances exact gradient learning with Eventprop in spiking neural networks 损失整形利用 Eventprop 在尖峰神经网络中增强精确的梯度学习 Event-based machine learning promises more energy-efficient AI on future neuromorphic hardware. Here, we investigate how the recently discovered Eventprop algorithm for gradient descent on exact gradients in spiking neural networks can be scaled up to challenging keyword recognition benchmarks. We implemented Eventprop in the GPU-enhanced Neural Networks framework and used it for training recurrent spiking neural networks on the Spiking Heidelberg Digits and Spiking Speech Commands datasets. We found that learning depended strongly on the loss function and extended Eventprop to a wider class of loss functions to enable effective training. We then tested a large number of data augmentations and regularisations as well as exploring different network structures; and heterogeneous and trainable timescales. We found that when combined with two specific augmentations, the right regularisation and a delay line input, Eventprop networks with one recurrent layer achieved state-of-the-art performance on Spiking Heidelberg Digits and good accuracy on Spiking Speech Commands. In comparison to a leading surrogate-gradient-based SNN training method, our GeNN Eventprop implementation is 3X faster and uses 4X less memory. This work is a significant step towards a low-power neuromorphic alternative to current machine learning paradigms. 基于事件的机器学习有望在未来的神经形态硬件上实现更节能的人工智能。在这里，我们研究了最近发现的用于尖峰神经网络中精确梯度的梯度下降的 Eventprop 算法如何扩展到具有挑战性的关键字识别基准。我们在 GPU 增强型神经网络框架中实现了 Eventprop，并使用它在脉冲海德堡数字和脉冲语音命令数据集上训练循环脉冲神经网络。我们发现学习在很大程度上依赖于损失函数，并将 Eventprop 扩展到更广泛的损失函数类别以实现有效的训练。然后，我们测试了大量的数据增强和正则化，并探索了不同的网络结构；以及异构且可训练的时间尺度。我们发现，当与两种特定的增强、正确的正则化和延迟线输入相结合时，具有一个循环层的 Eventprop 网络在尖峰海德堡数字上实现了最先进的性能，并且在尖峰语音命令上实现了良好的准确性。与领先的基于代理梯度的 SNN 训练方法相比，我们的 GeNN Eventprop 实现速度提高了 3 倍，并且使用的内存减少了 4 倍。这项工作是朝着当前机器学习范式的低功耗神经形态替代方案迈出的重要一步。 本文研究如何通过改进Eventprop算法和损失函数设计，提升脉冲神经网络在关键词识别任务中的性能。 Thomas Nowotny,James P. authors_text: Xiaowei Chi,Jiaming Liu,Ming Lu,Rongyu Zhang,Zhaoqing Wang,Yandong Guo,Shanghang Zhang
title: BEV-SAN: Accurate BEV 3D Object Detection via Slice Attention Networks
title_zh: BEV-SAN：通过切片注意力网络进行准确的 BEV 3D 对象检测
abstract: Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) 3D Object Detection is a crucial multi-view technique for autonomous driving systems. Recently, plenty of works are proposed, following a similar paradigm consisting of three essential components, i.e., camera feature extraction, BEV feature construction, and task heads. Among the three components, BEV feature construction is BEV-specific compared with 2D tasks. Existing methods aggregate the multi-view camera features to the flattened grid in order to construct the BEV feature. However, flattening the BEV space along the height dimension fails to emphasize the informative features of different heights. For example, the barrier is located at a low height while the truck is located at a high height. In this paper, we propose a novel method named BEV Slice Attention Network (BEV-SAN) for exploiting the intrinsic characteristics of different heights. Instead of flattening the BEV space, we first sample along the height dimension to build the global and local BEV slices. Then, the features of BEV slices are aggregated from the camera features and merged by the attention mechanism. Finally, we fuse the merged local and global BEV features by a transformer to generate the final feature map for task heads. The purpose of local BEV slices is to emphasize informative heights. In order to find them, we further propose a LiDAR-guided sampling strategy to leverage the statistical distribution of LiDAR to determine the heights of local slices. Compared with uniform sampling, LiDAR-guided sampling can determine more informative heights. We conduct detailed experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of BEV-SAN. Code will be released.
summary: Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) 3D Object Detection is a crucial multi-view technique for autonomous driving systems. Recently, plenty of works are proposed, following a similar paradigm consisting of three essential components, i.e., camera feature extraction, BEV feature construction, and task heads. Among the three components, BEV feature construction is BEV-specific compared with 2D tasks. Existing methods aggregate the multi-view camera features to the flattened grid in order to construct the BEV feature. However, flattening the BEV space along the height dimension fails to emphasize the informative features of different heights. For example, the barrier is located at a low height while the truck is located at a high height. In this paper, we propose a novel method named BEV Slice Attention Network (BEV-SAN) for exploiting the intrinsic characteristics of different heights. Instead of flattening the BEV space, we first sample along the height dimension to build the global and local BEV slices. Then, the features of BEV slices are aggregated from the camera features and merged by the attention mechanism. Finally, we fuse the merged local and global BEV features by a transformer to generate the final feature map for task heads. The purpose of local BEV slices is to emphasize informative heights. In order to find them, we further propose a LiDAR-guided sampling strategy to leverage the statistical distribution of LiDAR to determine the heights of local slices. Compared with uniform sampling, LiDAR-guided sampling can determine more informative heights. We conduct detailed experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of BEV-SAN. Code will be released.
abstract_zh: 鸟瞰 (BEV) 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶系统的一项重要的多视图技术。最近，人们提出了大量的工作，遵循由三个基本组件组成的类似范式，即相机特征提取、BEV 特征构建和任务头。在这三个组件中，与 2D 任务相比，BEV 特征构建是 BEV 特定的。现有方法将多视图相机特征聚合到扁平网格中以构建 BEV 特征。然而，沿高度维度展平 BEV 空间并不能强调不同高度的信息特征。例如，护栏位置较低，而卡车位置较高。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 BEV Slice Attention Network (BEV-SAN) 的新方法，用于利用不同高度的内在特征。我们没有展平 BEV 空间，而是首先沿高度维度采样以构建全局和局部 BEV 切片。然后，BEV 切片的特征从相机特征中聚合出来，并通过注意力机制进行合并。最后，我们通过变压器融合合并的本地和全局 BEV 特征，以生成任务头的最终特征图。本地 BEV 切片的目的是强调信息高度。为了找到它们，我们进一步提出了一种激光雷达引导采样策略，利用激光雷达的统计分布来确定局部切片的高度。与均匀采样相比，激光雷达引导采样可以确定更多信息的高度。我们进行了详细的实验来证明 BEV-SAN 的有效性。代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEV-SAN方法，通过切片注意力网络提升鸟瞰图（BEV）三维目标检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV特征构建方法沿高度维度扁平化处理，无法突出不同高度的特征信息（如低处的障碍物和高处的卡车），导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 通过沿高度采样构建全局和局部BEV切片，结合LiDAR引导的采样策略确定关键高度，利用注意力机制聚合特征并用Transformer融合生成最终特征图。
AI.result: 实验验证了BEV-SAN在BEV三维目标检测任务中的有效性，代码将公开。
AI.conclusion: BEV-SAN通过高度感知的切片注意力机制，有效提升了不同高度目标的检测能力，为BEV特征构建提供了新思路。

authors_text: A. Zhukov,J. Benois-Pineau,R. Giot
title: Evaluation of Explanation Methods of AI -- CNNs in Image Classification Tasks with Reference-based and No-reference Metrics
title_zh: 人工智能解释方法的评估——基于参考和无参考指标的图像分类任务中的 CNN
comment: Due to a bug found in the code, all tables and figures were redone. The new results did not change the main conclusion, except for the best explainer. FEM has performed better than MLFEM; 25 pages, 16 tables, 16 figures; Submitted to "Advances in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning" (ISSN: 2582-9793)
comments: Due to a bug found in the code, all tables and figures were redone. The new results did not change the main conclusion, except for the best explainer. FEM has performed better than MLFEM; 25 pages, 16 tables, 16 figures; Submitted to "Advances in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning" (ISSN: 2582-9793)
abstract: The most popular methods in AI-machine learning paradigm are mainly black boxes. This is why explanation of AI decisions is of emergency. Although dedicated explanation tools have been massively developed, the evaluation of their quality remains an open research question. In this paper, we generalize the methodologies of evaluation of post-hoc explainers of CNNs' decisions in visual classification tasks with reference and no-reference based metrics. We apply them on our previously developed explainers (FEM, MLFEM), and popular Grad-CAM. The reference-based metrics are Pearson correlation coefficient and Similarity computed between the explanation map and its ground truth represented by a Gaze Fixation Density Map obtained with a psycho-visual experiment. As a no-reference metric, we use stability metric, proposed by Alvarez-Melis and Jaakkola. We study its behaviour, consensus with reference-based metrics and show that in case of several kinds of degradation on input images, this metric is in agreement with reference-based ones. Therefore, it can be used for evaluation of the quality of explainers when the ground truth is not available.

Although dedicated explanation tools have been massively developed, the evaluation of their quality remains an open research question. We apply them on our previously developed explainers (FEM, MLFEM), and popular Grad-CAM. The reference-based metrics are Pearson correlation coefficient and Similarity computed between the explanation map and its ground truth represented by a Gaze Fixation Density Map obtained with a psycho-visual experiment. As a no-reference metric, we use stability metric, proposed by Alvarez-Melis and Jaakkola. We study its behaviour, consensus with reference-based metrics and show that in case of several kinds of degradation on input images, this metric is in agreement with reference-based ones. Therefore, it can be used for evaluation of the quality of explainers when the ground truth is not available.
abstract_zh: 人工智能机器学习范式中最流行的方法主要是黑盒。这就是为什么对人工智能决策的解释是紧急的。尽管专用的解释工具已经被大规模开发，但对其质量的评估仍然是一个悬而未决的研究问题。在本文中，我们概括了基于参考和无参考指标的视觉分类任务中 CNN 决策事后解释器的评估方法。我们将它们应用到我们之前开发的解释器（FEM、MLFEM）和流行的 Grad-CAM 上。基于参考的指标是皮尔逊相关系数和解释图与通过心理视觉实验获得的注视密度图表示的基本事实之间计算的相似度。作为无参考指标，我们使用 Alvarez-Melis 和 Jaakkola 提出的稳定性指标。我们研究了它的行为，与基于参考的指标达成共识，并表明，在输入图像出现多种退化的情况下，该指标与基于参考的指标一致。因此，当真实情况不可用时，它可以用于评估解释器的质量。

AI.tldr: 评估CNN图像分类任务中AI解释方法的质量，采用基于参考和无参考的指标。
AI.motivation: AI模型多为黑箱，解释其决策至关重要，但现有评估方法不足，需系统化评估框架。
AI.method: 采用基于参考的皮尔逊相关系数和相似度，以及无参考的稳定性指标，评估FEM、MLFEM和Grad-CAM等解释器。
AI.result: 稳定性指标在输入退化情况下与参考指标一致，适用于无地面真实数据的解释器评估。
AI.conclusion: 无参考稳定性指标在输入退化时与参考指标一致，可有效评估解释器质量，尤其在无地面真实数据时。

search_text: Evaluation of Explanation Methods of AI -- CNNs in Image Classification Tasks with Reference-based and No-reference Metrics 人工智能解释方法的评估——基于参考和无参考指标的图像分类任务中的 CNN The most popular methods in AI-machine learning paradigm are mainly black boxes. This is why explanation of AI decisions is of emergency. Although dedicated explanation tools have been massively developed, the evaluation of their quality remains an open research question. In this paper, we generalize the methodologies of evaluation of post-hoc explainers of CNNs' decisions in visual classification tasks with reference and no-reference based metrics. We apply them on our previously developed explainers (FEM, MLFEM), and popular Grad-CAM. The reference-based metrics are Pearson correlation coefficient and Similarity computed between the explanation map and its ground truth represented by a Gaze Fixation Density Map obtained with a psycho-visual experiment. As a no-reference metric, we use stability metric, proposed by Alvarez-Melis and Jaakkola. We study its behaviour, consensus with reference-based metrics and show that in case of several kinds of degradation on input images, this metric is in agreement with reference-based ones. Therefore, it can be used for evaluation of the quality of explainers when the ground truth is not available. 人工智能机器学习范式中最流行的方法主要是黑盒。这就是为什么对人工智能决策的解释是紧急的。尽管专用的解释工具已经被大规模开发，但对其质量的评估仍然是一个悬而未决的研究问题。在本文中，我们概括了基于参考和无参考指标的视觉分类任务中 CNN 决策事后解释器的评估方法。我们将它们应用到我们之前开发的解释器（FEM、MLFEM）和流行的 Grad-CAM 上。基于参考的指标是皮尔逊相关系数和解释图与通过心理视觉实验获得的注视密度图表示的基本事实之间计算的相似度。作为无参考指标，我们使用 Alvarez-Melis 和 Jaakkola 提出的稳定性指标。我们研究了它的行为，与基于参考的指标达成共识，并表明，在输入图像出现多种退化的情况下，该指标与基于参考的指标一致。因此，当真实情况不可用时，它可以用于评估解释器的质量。 评估CNN图像分类任务中AI解释方法的质量，采用基于参考和无参考的指标。 A. Zhukov,J. Benois-Pineau,R. Giot cs.CV

authors_text: Wenhua Li,Xingyi Yao,Kaiwen Li,Rui Wang,Tao Zhang,Ling Wang
title: Coevolutionary Framework for Generalized Multimodal Multi-objective Optimization
title_zh: 广义多模态多目标优化的协同进化框架
abstract: Most multimodal multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MMEAs) aim to find all global Pareto optimal sets (PSs) for a multimodal multi-objective optimization problem (MMOP). However, in real-world problems, decision makers (DMs) may be also interested in local PSs. Also, searching for both global and local PSs is more general in view of dealing with MMOPs, which can be seen as a generalized MMOP. In addition, the state-of-the-art MMEAs exhibit poor convergence on high-dimension MMOPs. To address the above two issues, in this study, a novel coevolutionary framework termed CoMMEA for multimodal multi-objective optimization is proposed to better obtain both global and local PSs, and simultaneously, to improve the convergence performance in dealing with high-dimension MMOPs. Specifically, the CoMMEA introduces two archives to the search process, and coevolves them simultaneously through effective knowledge transfer. The convergence archive assists the CoMMEA to quickly approaching the Pareto optimal front (PF). The knowledge of the converged solutions is then transferred to the diversity archive which utilizes the local convergence indicator and the $ε$-dominance-based method to obtain global and local PSs effectively. Experimental results show that CoMMEA is competitive compared to seven state-of-the-art MMEAs on fifty-four complex MMOPs.
summary: Most multimodal multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MMEAs) aim to find all global Pareto optimal sets (PSs) for a multimodal multi-objective optimization problem (MMOP). However, in real-world problems, decision makers (DMs) may be also interested in local PSs. Also, searching for both global and local PSs is more general in view of dealing with MMOPs, which can be seen as a generalized MMOP. In addition, the state-of-the-art MMEAs exhibit poor convergence on high-dimension MMOPs. To address the above two issues, in this study, a novel coevolutionary framework termed CoMMEA for multimodal multi-objective optimization is proposed to better obtain both global and local PSs, and simultaneously, to improve the convergence performance in dealing with high-dimension MMOPs. Specifically, the CoMMEA introduces two archives to the search process, and coevolves them simultaneously through effective knowledge transfer. The convergence archive assists the CoMMEA to quickly approaching the Pareto optimal front (PF). The knowledge of the converged solutions is then transferred to the diversity archive which utilizes the local convergence indicator and the $ε$-dominance-based method to obtain global and local PSs effectively. Experimental results show that CoMMEA is competitive compared to seven state-of-the-art MMEAs on fifty-four complex MMOPs.
abstract_zh: 大多数多模态多目标进化算法（MMEA）旨在找到多模态多目标优化问题（MMOP）的所有全局帕累托最优集（PS）。然而，在现实问题中，决策者 (DM) 也可能对本地 PS 感兴趣。此外，考虑到处理 MMOP，搜索全局和局部 PS 更为通用，可以将其视为广义 MMOP。此外，最先进的 MMEA 在高维 MMOP 上表现出较差的收敛性。为了解决上述两个问题，本研究提出了一种用于多模态多目标优化的新型协同进化框架 CoMMEA，以更好地获得全局和局部 PS，同时提高处理高维 MMOP 的收敛性能。具体来说，CoMMEA 在搜索过程中引入了两个档案，并通过有效的知识转移同时共同进化它们。收敛存档帮助 CoMMEA 快速逼近 Pareto 最优前沿（PF）。然后将收敛解的知识转移到多样性档案中，利用局部收敛指标和基于 $ε$ 优势的方法来有效地获得全局和局部 PS。实验结果表明，与 54 个复杂 MMOP 上的 7 个最先进的 MMEA 相比，CoMMEA 具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CoMMEA的协同进化框架，用于解决广义多模态多目标优化问题，旨在同时获取全局和局部帕累托最优解集，并提升高维问题的收敛性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态多目标进化算法（MMEAs）在处理高维问题时收敛性较差，且未充分考虑决策者可能关注的局部帕累托最优解，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: CoMMEA引入两个协同进化的存档：收敛存档用于快速逼近帕累托前沿，多样性存档结合局部收敛指标和ε-支配方法，通过知识迁移有效获取全局和局部帕累托最优解。
AI.result: 实验表明，CoMMEA在54个复杂多模态多目标优化问题上优于七种先进MMEAs，展现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: CoMMEA通过协同进化框架有效平衡了全局与局部解的搜索，并提升了高维问题的收敛性，为广义多模态多目标优化提供了新方法。

authors_text: Zongzhe Xu
title: Using Large Pre-Trained Language Model to Assist FDA in Premarket Medical Device
title_zh: 使用大型预训练语言模型协助 FDA 进行医疗器械上市前工作
abstract: This paper proposes a possible method using natural language processing that might assist in the FDA medical device marketing process. Actual device descriptions are taken and matched with the device description in FDA Title 21 of CFR to determine their corresponding device type. Both pre-trained word embeddings such as FastText and large pre-trained sentence embedding models such as sentence transformers are evaluated on their accuracy in characterizing a piece of device description. An experiment is also done to test whether these models can identify the devices wrongly classified in the FDA database. The result shows that sentence transformer with T5 and MPNet and GPT-3 semantic search embedding show high accuracy in identifying the correct classification by narrowing down the correct label to be contained in the first 15 most likely results, as compared to 2585 types of device descriptions that must be manually searched through. On the other hand, all methods demonstrate high accuracy in identifying completely incorrectly labeled devices, but all fail to identify false device classifications that are wrong but closely related to the true label.
summary: This paper proposes a possible method using natural language processing that might assist in the FDA medical device marketing process. Actual device descriptions are taken and matched with the device description in FDA Title 21 of CFR to determine their corresponding device type. Both pre-trained word embeddings such as FastText and large pre-trained sentence embedding models such as sentence transformers are evaluated on their accuracy in characterizing a piece of device description. An experiment is also done to test whether these models can identify the devices wrongly classified in the FDA database. The result shows that sentence transformer with T5 and MPNet and GPT-3 semantic search embedding show high accuracy in identifying the correct classification by narrowing down the correct label to be contained in the first 15 most likely results, as compared to 2585 types of device descriptions that must be manually searched through. On the other hand, all methods demonstrate high accuracy in identifying completely incorrectly labeled devices, but all fail to identify false device classifications that are wrong but closely related to the true label.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用自然语言处理的可能方法，可能有助于 FDA 医疗器械营销流程。实际的器械描述将与 FDA CFR 第 21 条中的器械描述进行匹配，以确定其相应的器械类型。预训练的单词嵌入（例如 FastText）和大型预训练的句子嵌入模型（例如句子转换器）都根据其在表征设备描述方面的准确性进行评估。还进行了一项实验来测试这些模型是否能够识别 FDA 数据库中错误分类的设备。结果表明，与必须手动搜索的 2585 种设备描述相比，具有 T5 和 MPNet 以及 GPT-3 语义搜索嵌入的句子转换器通过缩小前 15 个最可能结果中包含的正确标签，在识别正确分类方面表现出很高的准确性。另一方面，所有方法在识别完全错误标记的设备方面都表现出很高的准确性，但都无法识别错误但与真实标签密切相关的错误设备分类。

AI.tldr: 提出使用大型预训练语言模型辅助FDA进行医疗器械分类的方法
AI.motivation: FDA需人工搜索大量设备描述以确定分类，效率低且易出错
AI.method: 评估预训练词嵌入和句子嵌入模型在设备描述分类和错误识别中的效果
AI.result: Sentence Transformer等模型在缩小正确分类范围上表现优异，但无法识别与真实标签相近的错误分类
AI.conclusion: 模型能有效提升分类效率，但对近似错误分类的识别能力不足，需进一步改进

motivation: FDA需人工搜索大量设备描述以确定分类，效率低且易出错
method: 评估预训练词嵌入和句子嵌入模型在设备描述分类和错误识别中的效果
result: Sentence Transformer等模型在缩小正确分类范围上表现优异，但无法识别与真实标签相近的错误分类
conclusion: 模型能有效提升分类效率，但对近似错误分类的识别能力不足，需进一步改进
search_text: Using Large Pre-Trained Language Model to Assist FDA in Premarket Medical Device 使用大型预训练语言模型协助 FDA 进行医疗器械上市前工作 This paper proposes a possible method using natural language processing that might assist in the FDA medical device marketing process. Actual device descriptions are taken and matched with the device description in FDA Title 21 of CFR to determine their corresponding device type. Both pre-trained word embeddings such as FastText and large pre-trained sentence embedding models such as sentence transformers are evaluated on their accuracy in characterizing a piece of device description. An experiment is also done to test whether these models can identify the devices wrongly classified in the FDA database. The result shows that sentence transformer with T5 and MPNet and GPT-3 semantic search embedding show high accuracy in identifying the correct classification by narrowing down the correct label to be contained in the first 15 most likely results, as compared to 2585 types of device descriptions that must be manually searched through. On the other hand, all methods demonstrate high accuracy in identifying completely incorrectly labeled devices, but all fail to identify false device classifications that are wrong but closely related to the true label. 本文提出了一种使用自然语言处理的可能方法，可能有助于 FDA 医疗器械营销流程。实际的器械描述将与 FDA CFR 第 21 条中的器械描述进行匹配，以确定其相应的器械类型。预训练的单词嵌入（例如 FastText）和大型预训练的句子嵌入模型（例如句子转换器）都根据其在表征设备描述方面的准确性进行评估。还进行了一项实验来测试这些模型是否能够识别 FDA 数据库中错误分类的设备。结果表明，与必须手动搜索的 2585 种设备描述相比，具有 T5 和 MPNet 以及 GPT-3 语义搜索嵌入的句子转换器通过缩小前 15 个最可能结果中包含的正确标签，在识别正确分类方面表现出很高的准确性。另一方面，所有方法在识别完全错误标记的设备方面都表现出很高的准确性，但都无法识别错误但与真实标签密切相关的错误设备分类。 提出使用大型预训练语言模型辅助FDA进行医疗器械分类的方法 Zongzhe Xu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Qingze Fang,Zhiwei Zhai,Shuai Yu,Qiong Wu,Xiaowen Gong,Xu Chen
title: Olive Branch Learning: A Topology-Aware Federated Learning Framework for Space-Air-Ground Integrated Network
title_zh: 橄榄枝学习：天地一体化网络的拓扑感知联邦学习框架
comment: accepted by IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications, Dec. 2022
comments: accepted by IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications, Dec. 2022
abstract: The space-air-ground integrated network (SAGIN), one of the key technologies for next-generation mobile communication systems, can facilitate data transmission for users all over the world, especially in some remote areas where vast amounts of informative data are collected by Internet of remote things (IoRT) devices to support various data-driven artificial intelligence (AI) services. However, training AI models centrally with the assistance of SAGIN faces the challenges of highly constrained network topology, inefficient data transmission, and privacy issues. To tackle these challenges, we first propose a novel topology-aware federated learning framework for the SAGIN, namely Olive Branch Learning (OBL). Specifically, the IoRT devices in the ground layer leverage their private data to perform model training locally, while the air nodes in the air layer and the ring-structured low earth orbit (LEO) satellite constellation in the space layer are in charge of model aggregation (synchronization) at different scales.To further enhance communication efficiency and inference performance of OBL, an efficient Communication and Non-IID-aware Air node-Satellite Assignment (CNASA) algorithm is designed by taking the data class distribution of the air nodes as well as their geographic locations into account. Furthermore, we extend our OBL framework and CNASA algorithm to adapt to more complex multi-orbit satellite networks. We analyze the convergence of our OBL framework and conclude that the CNASA algorithm contributes to the fast convergence of the global model. Extensive experiments based on realistic datasets corroborate the superior performance of our algorithm over the benchmark policies.
summary: The space-air-ground integrated network (SAGIN), one of the key technologies for next-generation mobile communication systems, can facilitate data transmission for users all over the world, especially in some remote areas where vast amounts of informative data are collected by Internet of remote things (IoRT) devices to support various data-driven artificial intelligence (AI) services. However, training AI models centrally with the assistance of SAGIN faces the challenges of highly constrained network topology, inefficient data transmission, and privacy issues. To tackle these challenges, we first propose a novel topology-aware federated learning framework for the SAGIN, namely Olive Branch Learning (OBL). Specifically, the IoRT devices in the ground layer leverage their private data to perform model training locally, while the air nodes in the air layer and the ring-structured low earth orbit (LEO) satellite constellation in the space layer are in charge of model aggregation (synchronization) at different scales.To further enhance communication efficiency and inference performance of OBL, an efficient Communication and Non-IID-aware Air node-Satellite Assignment (CNASA) algorithm is designed by taking the data class distribution of the air nodes as well as their geographic locations into account. Furthermore, we extend our OBL framework and CNASA algorithm to adapt to more complex multi-orbit satellite networks. We analyze the convergence of our OBL framework and conclude that the CNASA algorithm contributes to the fast convergence of the global model. Extensive experiments based on realistic datasets corroborate the superior performance of our algorithm over the benchmark policies.
abstract_zh: 天地空地一体化网络（SAGIN）是下一代移动通信系统的关键技术之一，可以方便世界各地用户的数据传输，特别是在一些偏远地区，远程物联网（IoRT）设备收集大量信息数据，以支持各种数据驱动的人工智能（AI）服务。然而，借助SAGIN集中训练AI模型面临着网络拓扑高度受限、数据传输效率低下和隐私问题的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们首先为 SAGIN 提出了一种新颖的拓扑感知联邦学习框架，即橄榄枝学习（OBL）。具体来说，地面层的IoRT设备利用其私有数据在本地进行模型训练，而空中层的空中节点和空间层的环形结构低地球轨道（LEO）卫星星座负责不同尺度的模型聚合（同步）。为了进一步提高OBL的通信效率和推理性能，通过考虑空中数据类别分布，设计了一种高效的通信和非IID感知的空中节点卫星分配（CNASA）算法节点及其地理位置考虑在内。此外，我们扩展了 OBL 框架和 CNASA 算法，以适应更复杂的多轨道卫星网络。我们分析了 OBL 框架的收敛性，并得出结论：CNAS 算法有助于全局模型的快速收敛。基于现实数据集的大量实验证实了我们的算法相对于基准策略的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Olive Branch Learning (OBL)的拓扑感知联邦学习框架，以解决空天地一体化网络(SAGIN)中AI模型训练的网络拓扑约束、数据传输效率低下和隐私问题。
AI.motivation: SAGIN在支持全球数据传输尤其是偏远地区物联网设备数据驱动的AI服务时，面临中心化训练导致的网络拓扑受限、传输效率低和隐私泄露等挑战。
AI.method: 设计OBL框架使地面层IoRT设备本地训练模型，空层节点与低轨卫星星座分层聚合模型；提出CNASA算法优化通信效率与非独立同分布数据处理，并扩展至多轨道卫星网络。
AI.result: 基于真实数据集的实验表明，OBL在通信效率和推理性能上优于基准方法，且CNASA算法加速了全局模型收敛。
AI.conclusion: OBL框架通过CNASA算法有效解决了SAGIN的拓扑与数据分布挑战，验证了其在复杂多轨道卫星网络中的优越性与收敛性优势。

authors_text: Nedim Osmic,Adnan Tahirovic,Bakir Lacevic
title: Octocopter Design: Modelling, Control and Motion Planning
title_zh: 八轴飞行器设计：建模、控制和运动规划
abstract: This book provides a solution to the control and motion planning design for an octocopter system. It includes a particular choice of control and motion planning algorithms which is based on the authors' previous research work, so it can be used as a reference design guidance for students, researchers as well as autonomous vehicles hobbyists. The control is constructed based on a fault tolerant approach aiming to increase the chances of the system to detect and isolate a potential failure in order to produce feasible control signals to the remaining active motors. The used motion planning algorithm is risk-aware by means that it takes into account the constraints related to the fault-dependant and mission-related maneuverability analysis of the octocopter system during the planning stage. Such a planner generates only those reference trajectories along which the octocopter system would be safe and capable of good tracking in case of a single motor fault and of majority of double motor fault scenarios. The control and motion planning algorithms presented in the book aim to increase the overall reliability of the system for completing the mission.
summary: This book provides a solution to the control and motion planning design for an octocopter system. It includes a particular choice of control and motion planning algorithms which is based on the authors' previous research work, so it can be used as a reference design guidance for students, researchers as well as autonomous vehicles hobbyists. The control is constructed based on a fault tolerant approach aiming to increase the chances of the system to detect and isolate a potential failure in order to produce feasible control signals to the remaining active motors. The used motion planning algorithm is risk-aware by means that it takes into account the constraints related to the fault-dependant and mission-related maneuverability analysis of the octocopter system during the planning stage. Such a planner generates only those reference trajectories along which the octocopter system would be safe and capable of good tracking in case of a single motor fault and of majority of double motor fault scenarios. The control and motion planning algorithms presented in the book aim to increase the overall reliability of the system for completing the mission.
abstract_zh: 本书提供了八旋翼系统的控制和运动规划设计的解决方案。它包括基于作者之前的研究工作的控制和运动规划算法的特定选择，因此可以用作学生、研究人员以及自动驾驶汽车爱好者的参考设计指南。该控制是基于容错方法构建的，旨在增加系统检测和隔离潜在故障的机会，以便为剩余的活动电机产生可行的控制信号。所使用的运动规划算法具有风险意识，因为它在规划阶段考虑了与八轴飞行器系统的故障相关和任务相关的机动性分析相关的约束。这样的规划器仅生成那些参考轨迹，沿着这些参考轨迹八轴飞行器系统将是安全的并且能够在单电机故障和大多数双电机故障情况下进行良好的跟踪。书中提出的控制和运动规划算法旨在提高系统完成任务的整体可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一种八旋翼飞行器的容错控制与风险感知运动规划方法，以提高系统在故障情况下的可靠性和任务完成能力。
AI.motivation: 传统八旋翼飞行器控制方法在单机或多机故障时易失效，需通过容错机制和风险评估提升系统鲁棒性与安全性，满足科研与工程应用需求。
AI.method: 基于容错控制理论构建故障检测隔离算法，并结合任务约束与故障依赖的机动性分析，设计风险感知型运动规划算法生成安全轨迹。
AI.result: 所提方法可使系统在单电机故障及多数双电机故障场景下仍保持稳定控制，显著提升任务完成可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合容错控制与风险驱动规划，本文为八旋翼飞行器提供了高可靠性的设计框架，可作为相关领域研究的参考方案。

search_text: Octocopter Design: Modelling, Control and Motion Planning 八轴飞行器设计：建模、控制和运动规划 This book provides a solution to the control and motion planning design for an octocopter system. It includes a particular choice of control and motion planning algorithms which is based on the authors' previous research work, so it can be used as a reference design guidance for students, researchers as well as autonomous vehicles hobbyists. The control is constructed based on a fault tolerant approach aiming to increase the chances of the system to detect and isolate a potential failure in order to produce feasible control signals to the remaining active motors. The used motion planning algorithm is risk-aware by means that it takes into account the constraints related to the fault-dependant and mission-related maneuverability analysis of the octocopter system during the planning stage. Such a planner generates only those reference trajectories along which the octocopter system would be safe and capable of good tracking in case of a single motor fault and of majority of double motor fault scenarios. The control and motion planning algorithms presented in the book aim to increase the overall reliability of the system for completing the mission. 本书提供了八旋翼系统的控制和运动规划设计的解决方案。它包括基于作者之前的研究工作的控制和运动规划算法的特定选择，因此可以用作学生、研究人员以及自动驾驶汽车爱好者的参考设计指南。该控制是基于容错方法构建的，旨在增加系统检测和隔离潜在故障的机会，以便为剩余的活动电机产生可行的控制信号。所使用的运动规划算法具有风险意识，因为它在规划阶段考虑了与八轴飞行器系统的故障相关和任务相关的机动性分析相关的约束。这样的规划器仅生成那些参考轨迹，沿着这些参考轨迹八轴飞行器系统将是安全的并且能够在单电机故障和大多数双电机故障情况下进行良好的跟踪。书中提出的控制和运动规划算法旨在提高系统完成任务的整体可靠性。 本文旨在设计一种八旋翼飞行器的容错控制与风险感知运动规划方法，以提高系统在故障情况下的可靠性和任务完成能力。 Nedim Osmic,Adnan Tahirovic,Bakir Lacevic cs.RO

authors_text: Maowei Jiang,Pengyu Zeng,Kai Wang,Huan Liu,Wenbo Chen,Haoran Liu
title: FECAM: Frequency Enhanced Channel Attention Mechanism for Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: FECAM：用于时间序列预测的频率增强通道注意机制
comment: 11pages.10 figures,conference. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.14415 by other authors
comments: 11pages.10 figures,conference. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.14415 by other authors
abstract: Time series forecasting is a long-standing challenge due to the real-world information is in various scenario (e.g., energy, weather, traffic, economics, earthquake warning). However some mainstream forecasting model forecasting result is derailed dramatically from ground truth. We believe it's the reason that model's lacking ability of capturing frequency information which richly contains in real world datasets. At present, the mainstream frequency information extraction methods are Fourier transform(FT) based. However, use of FT is problematic due to Gibbs phenomenon. If the values on both sides of sequences differ significantly, oscillatory approximations are observed around both sides and high frequency noise will be introduced. Therefore We propose a novel frequency enhanced channel attention that adaptively modelling frequency interdependencies between channels based on Discrete Cosine Transform which would intrinsically avoid high frequency noise caused by problematic periodity during Fourier Transform, which is defined as Gibbs Phenomenon. We show that this network generalize extremely effectively across six real-world datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performance, we further demonstrate that frequency enhanced channel attention mechanism module can be flexibly applied to different networks. This module can improve the prediction ability of existing mainstream networks, which reduces 35.99% MSE on LSTM, 10.01% on Reformer, 8.71% on Informer, 8.29% on Autoformer, 8.06% on Transformer, etc., at a slight computational cost ,with just a few line of code. Our codes and data are available at https://github.com/Zero-coder/FECAM.
summary: Time series forecasting is a long-standing challenge due to the real-world information is in various scenario (e.g., energy, weather, traffic, economics, earthquake warning). However some mainstream forecasting model forecasting result is derailed dramatically from ground truth. We believe it's the reason that model's lacking ability of capturing frequency information which richly contains in real world datasets. At present, the mainstream frequency information extraction methods are Fourier transform(FT) based. However, use of FT is problematic due to Gibbs phenomenon. If the values on both sides of sequences differ significantly, oscillatory approximations are observed around both sides and high frequency noise will be introduced. Therefore We propose a novel frequency enhanced channel attention that adaptively modelling frequency interdependencies between channels based on Discrete Cosine Transform which would intrinsically avoid high frequency noise caused by problematic periodity during Fourier Transform, which is defined as Gibbs Phenomenon. We show that this network generalize extremely effectively across six real-world datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performance, we further demonstrate that frequency enhanced channel attention mechanism module can be flexibly applied to different networks. This module can improve the prediction ability of existing mainstream networks, which reduces 35.99% MSE on LSTM, 10.01% on Reformer, 8.71% on Informer, 8.29% on Autoformer, 8.06% on Transformer, etc., at a slight computational cost ,with just a few line of code. Our codes and data are available at https://github.com/Zero-coder/FECAM.
abstract_zh: 由于现实世界的信息存在于各种场景中（例如能源、天气、交通、经济、地震预警），时间序列预测是一个长期存在的挑战。然而，一些主流预测模型的预测结果与真实情况严重脱轨。我们认为这是模型缺乏捕获现实世界数据集中丰富的频率信息的能力的原因。目前主流的频率信息提取方法是基于傅里叶变换（FT）的。然而，由于吉布斯现象，FT的使用存在问题。如果序列两侧的值显着不同，则会在两侧观察到振荡近似，并且将引入高频噪声。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的频率增强通道注意力，基于离散余弦变换对通道之间的频率相互依赖性进行自适应建模，这将从本质上避免傅立叶变换期间由有问题的周期性引起的高频噪声，这被定义为吉布斯现象。我们证明该网络在六个现实世界数据集上极其有效地泛化并实现了最先进的性能，我们进一步证明了频率增强通道注意机制模块可以灵活地应用于不同的网络。该模块可以提高现有主流网络的预测能力，在LSTM上降低35.99%，在Reformer上降低10.01%，在Informer上降低8.71%，在Autoformer上降低8.29%，在Transformer上降低8.06%等，计算成本很小，只需几行代码。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Zero-coder/FECAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FECAM频率增强通道注意力机制，用于改进时间序列预测模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 主流时间序列预测模型因无法有效捕捉真实世界数据中的频率信息，导致预测结果与实际值偏差较大，而傅里叶变换存在吉布斯现象引发高频噪声问题。
AI.method: 基于离散余弦变换（DCT）设计自适应通道注意力机制，通过建模通道间的频率依赖关系，避免傅里叶变换的周期性问题带来的噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集上实现SOTA性能，使LSTM、Reformer等主流模型的MSE分别降低35.99%、10.01%等，计算成本增加极小。
AI.conclusion: FECAM模块可灵活集成到不同网络结构中，显著提升预测精度且易于实现。

authors_text: Yinan Liu,Wei Shen,Yuanfei Wang,Jianyong Wang,Zhenglu Yang,Xiaojie Yuan
title: Joint Open Knowledge Base Canonicalization and Linking
title_zh: 联合开放知识库规范化和链接
abstract: Open Information Extraction (OIE) methods extract a large number of OIE triples (noun phrase, relation phrase, noun phrase) from text, which compose large Open Knowledge Bases (OKBs). However, noun phrases (NPs) and relation phrases (RPs) in OKBs are not canonicalized and often appear in different paraphrased textual variants, which leads to redundant and ambiguous facts. To address this problem, there are two related tasks: OKB canonicalization (i.e., convert NPs and RPs to canonicalized form) and OKB linking (i.e., link NPs and RPs with their corresponding entities and relations in a curated Knowledge Base (e.g., DBPedia). These two tasks are tightly coupled, and one task can benefit significantly from the other. However, they have been studied in isolation so far. In this paper, we explore the task of joint OKB canonicalization and linking for the first time, and propose a novel framework JOCL based on factor graph model to make them reinforce each other. JOCL is flexible enough to combine different signals from both tasks, and able to extend to fit any new signals. A thorough experimental study over two large scale OIE triple data sets shows that our framework outperforms all the baseline methods for the task of OKB canonicalization (OKB linking) in terms of average F1 (accuracy).
summary: Open Information Extraction (OIE) methods extract a large number of OIE triples (noun phrase, relation phrase, noun phrase) from text, which compose large Open Knowledge Bases (OKBs). However, noun phrases (NPs) and relation phrases (RPs) in OKBs are not canonicalized and often appear in different paraphrased textual variants, which leads to redundant and ambiguous facts. To address this problem, there are two related tasks: OKB canonicalization (i.e., convert NPs and RPs to canonicalized form) and OKB linking (i.e., link NPs and RPs with their corresponding entities and relations in a curated Knowledge Base (e.g., DBPedia). These two tasks are tightly coupled, and one task can benefit significantly from the other. However, they have been studied in isolation so far. In this paper, we explore the task of joint OKB canonicalization and linking for the first time, and propose a novel framework JOCL based on factor graph model to make them reinforce each other. JOCL is flexible enough to combine different signals from both tasks, and able to extend to fit any new signals. A thorough experimental study over two large scale OIE triple data sets shows that our framework outperforms all the baseline methods for the task of OKB canonicalization (OKB linking) in terms of average F1 (accuracy).
abstract_zh: 开放信息提取（OIE）方法从文本中提取大量的OIE三元组（名词短语、关系短语、名词短语），这些三元组组成了大型开放知识库（OKB）。然而，OKB 中的名词短语 (NP) 和关系短语 (RP) 并未规范化，并且经常出现在不同的释义文本变体中，从而导致事实冗余且含糊不清。为了解决这个问题，有两个相关的任务：OKB 规范化（即将 NP 和 RP 转换为规范化形式）和 OKB 链接（即将 NP 和 RP 与它们在策划的知识库（例如 DBPedia）中相应的实体和关系链接起来。这两个任务紧密耦合，一个任务可以从另一个任务中显着受益。但是，到目前为止，它们都是孤立研究的。在本文中，我们将探讨该任务首次提出了联合 OKB 规范化和链接的方法，并提出了一种基于因子图模型的新颖框架 JOCL，使它们能够足够灵活地组合来自两个任务的不同信号，并且能够扩展以适应任何新信号。对两个大规模 OIE 三元组数据集的彻底实验研究表明，我们的框架在平均 F1（准确度）方面优于 OKB 规范化（OKB 链接）任务的所有基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出联合开放知识库规范化与链接的框架JOCL，通过因子图模型解决OKB中实体和关系短语的冗余与歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将OKB规范化与链接任务独立处理，未能利用两者间的关联性，导致冗余和歧义问题难以有效解决。
AI.method: 设计基于因子图模型的JOCL框架，通过联合优化两个任务的信号，实现相互增强，并支持扩展新信号。
AI.result: 在两个大规模OIE数据集上，JOCL在规范化任务的F1值和链接任务的准确率均优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合处理OKB规范化与链接可显著提升效果，JOCL框架具有灵活性和可扩展性，为未来研究提供新方向。

search_text: Joint Open Knowledge Base Canonicalization and Linking 联合开放知识库规范化和链接 Open Information Extraction (OIE) methods extract a large number of OIE triples (noun phrase, relation phrase, noun phrase) from text, which compose large Open Knowledge Bases (OKBs). However, noun phrases (NPs) and relation phrases (RPs) in OKBs are not canonicalized and often appear in different paraphrased textual variants, which leads to redundant and ambiguous facts. To address this problem, there are two related tasks: OKB canonicalization (i.e., convert NPs and RPs to canonicalized form) and OKB linking (i.e., link NPs and RPs with their corresponding entities and relations in a curated Knowledge Base (e.g., DBPedia). In this paper, we explore the task of joint OKB canonicalization and linking for the first time, and propose a novel framework JOCL based on factor graph model to make them reinforce each other. JOCL is flexible enough to combine different signals from both tasks, and able to extend to fit any new signals. A thorough experimental study over two large scale OIE triple data sets shows that our framework outperforms all the baseline methods for the task of OKB canonicalization (OKB linking) in terms of average F1 (accuracy). 开放信息提取（OIE）方法从文本中提取大量的OIE三元组（名词短语、关系短语、名词短语），这些三元组组成了大型开放知识库（OKB）。然而，OKB 中的名词短语 (NP) 和关系短语 (RP) 并未规范化，并且经常出现在不同的释义文本变体中，从而导致事实冗余且含糊不清。为了解决这个问题，有两个相关的任务：OKB 规范化（即将 NP 和 RP 转换为规范化形式）和 OKB 链接（即将 NP 和 RP 与它们在策划的知识库（例如 DBPedia）中相应的实体和关系链接起来。这两个任务紧密耦合，一个任务可以从另一个任务中显着受益。但是，到目前为止，它们都是孤立研究的。在本文中，我们将探讨该任务首次提出了联合 OKB 规范化和链接的方法，并提出了一种基于因子图模型的新颖框架 JOCL，使它们能够足够灵活地组合来自两个任务的不同信号，并且能够扩展以适应任何新信号。对两个大规模 OIE 三元组数据集的彻底实验研究表明，我们的框架在平均 F1（准确度）方面优于 OKB 规范化（OKB 链接）任务的所有基线方法。 本文提出联合开放知识库规范化与链接的框架JOCL，通过因子图模型解决OKB中实体和关系短语的冗余与歧义问题。 Yinan Liu,Wei Shen,Yuanfei Wang,Jianyong Wang,Zhenglu Yang,Xiaojie Yuan cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Norman Müller,Yawar Siddiqui,Lorenzo Porzi,Samuel Rota Bulò,Peter Kontschieder,Matthias Nießner
title: DiffRF: Rendering-Guided 3D Radiance Field Diffusion
title_zh: DiffRF：渲染引导的 3D 辐射场扩散
comment: Project page: https://sirwyver.github.io/DiffRF/ Video: https://youtu.be/qETBcLu8SUk - CVPR 2023 Highlight - updated evaluations after fixing initial data mapping error on all methods
comments: Project page: https://sirwyver.github.io/DiffRF/ Video: https://youtu.be/qETBcLu8SUk - CVPR 2023 Highlight - updated evaluations after fixing initial data mapping error on all methods
abstract: We introduce DiffRF, a novel approach for 3D radiance field synthesis based on denoising diffusion probabilistic models. While existing diffusion-based methods operate on images, latent codes, or point cloud data, we are the first to directly generate volumetric radiance fields. To this end, we propose a 3D denoising model which directly operates on an explicit voxel grid representation. However, as radiance fields generated from a set of posed images can be ambiguous and contain artifacts, obtaining ground truth radiance field samples is non-trivial. We address this challenge by pairing the denoising formulation with a rendering loss, enabling our model to learn a deviated prior that favours good image quality instead of trying to replicate fitting errors like floating artifacts. In contrast to 2D-diffusion models, our model learns multi-view consistent priors, enabling free-view synthesis and accurate shape generation. Compared to 3D GANs, our diffusion-based approach naturally enables conditional generation such as masked completion or single-view 3D synthesis at inference time.
summary: We introduce DiffRF, a novel approach for 3D radiance field synthesis based on denoising diffusion probabilistic models. While existing diffusion-based methods operate on images, latent codes, or point cloud data, we are the first to directly generate volumetric radiance fields. To this end, we propose a 3D denoising model which directly operates on an explicit voxel grid representation. However, as radiance fields generated from a set of posed images can be ambiguous and contain artifacts, obtaining ground truth radiance field samples is non-trivial. We address this challenge by pairing the denoising formulation with a rendering loss, enabling our model to learn a deviated prior that favours good image quality instead of trying to replicate fitting errors like floating artifacts. In contrast to 2D-diffusion models, our model learns multi-view consistent priors, enabling free-view synthesis and accurate shape generation. Compared to 3D GANs, our diffusion-based approach naturally enables conditional generation such as masked completion or single-view 3D synthesis at inference time.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 DiffRF，一种基于去噪扩散概率模型的 3D 辐射场合成新方法。虽然现有的基于扩散的方法对图像、潜在代码或点云数据进行操作，但我们是第一个直接生成体积辐射场的方法。为此，我们提出了一种直接在显式体素网格表示上运行的 3D 去噪模型。然而，由于从一组姿势图像生成的辐射场可能不明确并且包含伪影，因此获得地面真实辐射场样本并非易事。我们通过将去噪公式与渲染损失配对来解决这一挑战，使我们的模型能够学习有利于良好图像质量的偏差先验，而不是尝试复制诸如浮动伪影之类的拟合错误。与 2D 扩散模型相比，我们的模型学习多视图一致先验，从而实现自由视图合成和准确的形状生成。与 3D GAN 相比，我们基于扩散的方法自然可以实现条件生成，例如推理时的掩模完成或单视图 3D 合成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffRF，一种基于去噪扩散概率模型的3D辐射场合成方法，直接生成体素网格表示的体积辐射场。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型局限于图像、潜在码或点云数据，难以直接生成具有多视角一致性的体积辐射场，且存在模糊性和伪影问题。
AI.method: 设计3D去噪模型直接操作显式体素网格，并结合渲染损失引导模型学习以图像质量为导向的先验分布，实现多视角一致的辐射场生成。
AI.result: 模型在自由视角合成和形状生成上优于3D GANs，支持条件生成（如遮挡补全），且避免了拟合误差伪影。
AI.conclusion: DiffRF通过渲染引导的扩散框架，解决了体积辐射场生成的模糊性与一致性难题，为高质量3D内容生成提供了新方法。

authors_text: Chelsey Edge,Junaed Sattar
title: Diver Interest via Pointing: Human-Directed Object Inspection for AUVs
title_zh: 潜水员通过指向产生兴趣：AUV 的人为目标检测
abstract: In this paper, we present the Diver Interest via Pointing (DIP) algorithm, a highly modular method for conveying a diver's area of interest to an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) using pointing gestures for underwater human-robot collaborative tasks. DIP uses a single monocular camera and exploits human body pose, even with complete dive gear, to extract underwater human pointing gesture poses and their directions. By extracting 2D scene geometry based on the human body pose and density of salient feature points along the direction of pointing, using a low-level feature detector, the DIP algorithm is able to locate objects of interest as indicated by the diver.
summary: In this paper, we present the Diver Interest via Pointing (DIP) algorithm, a highly modular method for conveying a diver's area of interest to an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) using pointing gestures for underwater human-robot collaborative tasks. DIP uses a single monocular camera and exploits human body pose, even with complete dive gear, to extract underwater human pointing gesture poses and their directions. By extracting 2D scene geometry based on the human body pose and density of salient feature points along the direction of pointing, using a low-level feature detector, the DIP algorithm is able to locate objects of interest as indicated by the diver.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了潜水员兴趣通过指向（DIP）算法，这是一种高度模块化的方法，用于使用指向手势将潜水员的兴趣区域传达给自主水下航行器（AUV），以执行水下人机协作任务。 DIP 使用单个单目摄像头并利用人体姿势（即使具有完整的潜水装备）来提取水下人体指向手势姿势及其方向。通过使用低级特征检测器，基于人体姿势和沿指向方向的显着特征点密度提取 2D 场景几何形状，DIP 算法能够根据潜水员的指示定位感兴趣的对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DIP的算法，通过潜水员的指向手势将感兴趣区域传递给水下自主航行器（AUV），实现水下人机协作任务中的目标检测。
AI.motivation: 传统水下目标检测方法在复杂环境中存在局限性，需开发更直观的人机交互方式以提高自主水下机器人任务效率。
AI.method: 利用单目摄像头捕捉潜水员全身姿态，通过人体关键点检测和显著特征点密度分析，结合指向手势方向实现目标定位。
AI.result: 成功实现了在复杂水下场景中通过潜水员指向手势准确识别目标物体，验证了算法在实际环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DIP算法为水下人机协作提供了模块化、鲁棒性强的解决方案，可广泛应用于水下勘探等实际场景。

authors_text: Jianqing Zhang,Yang Hua,Hao Wang,Tao Song,Zhengui Xue,Ruhui Ma,Haibing Guan
title: FedALA: Adaptive Local Aggregation for Personalized Federated Learning
title_zh: FedALA：个性化联合学习的自适应本地聚合
abstract: A key challenge in federated learning (FL) is the statistical heterogeneity that impairs the generalization of the global model on each client. To address this, we propose a method Federated learning with Adaptive Local Aggregation (FedALA) by capturing the desired information in the global model for client models in personalized FL. The key component of FedALA is an Adaptive Local Aggregation (ALA) module, which can adaptively aggregate the downloaded global model and local model towards the local objective on each client to initialize the local model before training in each iteration. To evaluate the effectiveness of FedALA, we conduct extensive experiments with five benchmark datasets in computer vision and natural language processing domains. FedALA outperforms eleven state-of-the-art baselines by up to 3.27% in test accuracy. Furthermore, we also apply ALA module to other federated learning methods and achieve up to 24.19% improvement in test accuracy.
summary: A key challenge in federated learning (FL) is the statistical heterogeneity that impairs the generalization of the global model on each client. To address this, we propose a method Federated learning with Adaptive Local Aggregation (FedALA) by capturing the desired information in the global model for client models in personalized FL. The key component of FedALA is an Adaptive Local Aggregation (ALA) module, which can adaptively aggregate the downloaded global model and local model towards the local objective on each client to initialize the local model before training in each iteration. To evaluate the effectiveness of FedALA, we conduct extensive experiments with five benchmark datasets in computer vision and natural language processing domains. FedALA outperforms eleven state-of-the-art baselines by up to 3.27% in test accuracy. Furthermore, we also apply ALA module to other federated learning methods and achieve up to 24.19% improvement in test accuracy.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 的一个关键挑战是统计异质性，它会损害每个客户端的全局模型的泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种采用自适应本地聚合（FedALA）的联邦学习方法，通过捕获个性化 FL 中客户端模型的全局模型中所需的信息。 FedALA 的关键组件是自适应本地聚合（ALA）模块，它可以针对每个客户端上的本地目标自适应聚合下载的全局模型和本地模型，以便在每次迭代训练之前初始化本地模型。为了评估 FedALA 的有效性，我们使用计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域的五个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验。 FedALA 的测试准确度比 11 个最先进的基线高出 3.27%。此外，我们还将ALA模块应用到其他联邦学习方法中，测试精度提高了24.19%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedALA方法，通过自适应局部聚合模块解决联邦学习中的个性化模型泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中统计异质性导致全局模型在客户端泛化能力不足，需个性化方法提升本地模型性能。
AI.method: 设计自适应局部聚合（ALA）模块，在每次迭代中结合下载的全局模型与本地模型，按本地目标初始化本地模型。
AI.result: 在5个基准数据集上超越11种基线方法，最高提升3.27%；ALA模块应用于其他方法时最高提升24.19%。
AI.conclusion: FedALA有效解决联邦学习个性化问题，ALA模块具有通用性，可提升多种方法的测试准确率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出FedALA方法，通过自适应局部聚合模块解决联邦学习中的个性化模型泛化问题。
ai_content.motivation: 联邦学习中统计异质性导致全局模型在客户端泛化能力不足，需个性化方法提升本地模型性能。
ai_content.method: 设计自适应局部聚合（ALA）模块，在每次迭代中结合下载的全局模型与本地模型，按本地目标初始化本地模型。
ai_content.result: 在5个基准数据集上超越11种基线方法，最高提升3.27%；ALA模块应用于其他方法时最高提升24.19%。
ai_content.conclusion: FedALA有效解决联邦学习个性化问题，ALA模块具有通用性，可提升多种方法的测试准确率。

search_text: FedALA: Adaptive Local Aggregation for Personalized Federated Learning FedALA：个性化联合学习的自适应本地聚合 A key challenge in federated learning (FL) is the statistical heterogeneity that impairs the generalization of the global model on each client. To address this, we propose a method Federated learning with Adaptive Local Aggregation (FedALA) by capturing the desired information in the global model for client models in personalized FL. The key component of FedALA is an Adaptive Local Aggregation (ALA) module, which can adaptively aggregate the downloaded global model and local model towards the local objective on each client to initialize the local model before training in each iteration. To evaluate the effectiveness of FedALA, we conduct extensive experiments with five benchmark datasets in computer vision and natural language processing domains. FedALA outperforms eleven state-of-the-art baselines by up to 3.27% in test accuracy. Furthermore, we also apply ALA module to other federated learning methods and achieve up to 24.19% improvement in test accuracy. 联邦学习 (FL) 的一个关键挑战是统计异质性，它会损害每个客户端的全局模型的泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种采用自适应本地聚合（FedALA）的联邦学习方法，通过捕获个性化 FL 中客户端模型的全局模型中所需的信息。 FedALA 的关键组件是自适应本地聚合（ALA）模块，它可以针对每个客户端上的本地目标自适应聚合下载的全局模型和本地模型，以便在每次迭代训练之前初始化本地模型。为了评估 FedALA 的有效性，我们使用计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域的五个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验。 FedALA 的测试准确度比 11 个最先进的基线高出 3.27%。此外，我们还将ALA模块应用到其他联邦学习方法中，测试精度提高了24.19%。 本文提出FedALA方法，通过自适应局部聚合模块解决联邦学习中的个性化模型泛化问题。 Jianqing Zhang,Yang Hua,Hao Wang,Tao Song,Zhengui Xue,Ruhui Ma,Haibing Guan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Madison Cotteret,Hugh Greatorex,Martin Ziegler,Elisabetta Chicca
title: Vector Symbolic Finite State Machines in Attractor Neural Networks
title_zh: 吸引子神经网络中的矢量符号有限状态机
comment: 26 pages, 13 figures. This is the authors' final version before publication in Neural Computation
comments: 26 pages, 13 figures. This is the authors' final version before publication in Neural Computation
abstract: Hopfield attractor networks are robust distributed models of human memory, but lack a general mechanism for effecting state-dependent attractor transitions in response to input. We propose construction rules such that an attractor network may implement an arbitrary finite state machine (FSM), where states and stimuli are represented by high-dimensional random vectors, and all state transitions are enacted by the attractor network's dynamics. Numerical simulations show the capacity of the model, in terms of the maximum size of implementable FSM, to be linear in the size of the attractor network for dense bipolar state vectors, and approximately quadratic for sparse binary state vectors. We show that the model is robust to imprecise and noisy weights, and so a prime candidate for implementation with high-density but unreliable devices. By endowing attractor networks with the ability to emulate arbitrary FSMs, we propose a plausible path by which FSMs could exist as a distributed computational primitive in biological neural networks.
summary: Hopfield attractor networks are robust distributed models of human memory, but lack a general mechanism for effecting state-dependent attractor transitions in response to input. We propose construction rules such that an attractor network may implement an arbitrary finite state machine (FSM), where states and stimuli are represented by high-dimensional random vectors, and all state transitions are enacted by the attractor network's dynamics. Numerical simulations show the capacity of the model, in terms of the maximum size of implementable FSM, to be linear in the size of the attractor network for dense bipolar state vectors, and approximately quadratic for sparse binary state vectors. We show that the model is robust to imprecise and noisy weights, and so a prime candidate for implementation with high-density but unreliable devices. By endowing attractor networks with the ability to emulate arbitrary FSMs, we propose a plausible path by which FSMs could exist as a distributed computational primitive in biological neural networks.
abstract_zh: Hopfield 吸引子网络是人类记忆的鲁棒分布式模型，但缺乏响应输入而影响状态依赖吸引子转换的通用机制。我们提出了构造规则，使得吸引子网络可以实现任意有限状态机（FSM），其中状态和刺激由高维随机向量表示，并且所有状态转换都是由吸引子网络的动态制定的。数值模拟表明，就可实现的 FSM 的最大尺寸而言，该模型的容量对于密集双极状态向量而言与吸引子网络的大小呈线性关系，而对于稀疏二元状态向量而言则与吸引子网络的大小呈近似二次关系。我们证明该模型对于不精确和噪声权重具有鲁棒性，因此是使用高密度但不可靠的设备实现的主要候选者。通过赋予吸引子网络模拟任意 FSM 的能力，我们提出了一条可行的路径，通过该路径 FSM 可以作为生物神经网络中的分布式计算原语存在。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过构造规则，使吸引子网络能够实现任意有限状态机（FSM），其中状态和刺激由高维随机向量表示，并通过网络动态实现状态转换。
AI.motivation: Hopfield吸引子网络虽能模拟人类记忆，但缺乏根据输入进行状态依赖的吸引子转换机制，限制了其在复杂计算任务中的应用。
AI.method: 设计高维随机向量表示状态和刺激，通过吸引子网络动力学实现状态转换，并通过数值模拟验证模型容量与噪声鲁棒性。
AI.result: 模型容量对密集双极向量呈线性关系，对稀疏二进制向量呈二次关系，且对权重噪声具有鲁棒性，适合高密度不可靠设备实现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为有限状态机作为生物神经网络中的分布式计算原语提供了可行路径，拓展了吸引子网络的应用范围。

authors_text: Sumyeong Ahn,Se-Young Yun
title: Denoising after Entropy-based Debiasing A Robust Training Method for Dataset Bias with Noisy Labels
title_zh: 基于熵的去偏后的去噪 带有噪声标签的数据集偏差的鲁棒训练方法
abstract: Improperly constructed datasets can result in inaccurate inferences. For instance, models trained on biased datasets perform poorly in terms of generalization (i.e., dataset bias). Recent debiasing techniques have successfully achieved generalization performance by underestimating easy-to-learn samples (i.e., bias-aligned samples) and highlighting difficult-to-learn samples (i.e., bias-conflicting samples). However, these techniques may fail owing to noisy labels, because the trained model recognizes noisy labels as difficult-to-learn and thus highlights them. In this study, we find that earlier approaches that used the provided labels to quantify difficulty could be affected by the small proportion of noisy labels. Furthermore, we find that running denoising algorithms before debiasing is ineffective because denoising algorithms reduce the impact of difficult-to-learn samples, including valuable bias-conflicting samples. Therefore, we propose an approach called denoising after entropy-based debiasing, i.e., DENEB, which has three main stages. (1) The prejudice model is trained by emphasizing (bias-aligned, clean) samples, which are selected using a Gaussian Mixture Model. (2) Using the per-sample entropy from the output of the prejudice model, the sampling probability of each sample that is proportional to the entropy is computed. (3) The final model is trained using existing denoising algorithms with the mini-batches constructed by following the computed sampling probability. Compared to existing debiasing and denoising algorithms, our method achieves better debiasing performance on multiple benchmarks.
summary: Improperly constructed datasets can result in inaccurate inferences. For instance, models trained on biased datasets perform poorly in terms of generalization (i.e., dataset bias). Recent debiasing techniques have successfully achieved generalization performance by underestimating easy-to-learn samples (i.e., bias-aligned samples) and highlighting difficult-to-learn samples (i.e., bias-conflicting samples). However, these techniques may fail owing to noisy labels, because the trained model recognizes noisy labels as difficult-to-learn and thus highlights them. In this study, we find that earlier approaches that used the provided labels to quantify difficulty could be affected by the small proportion of noisy labels. Furthermore, we find that running denoising algorithms before debiasing is ineffective because denoising algorithms reduce the impact of difficult-to-learn samples, including valuable bias-conflicting samples. Therefore, we propose an approach called denoising after entropy-based debiasing, i.e., DENEB, which has three main stages. (1) The prejudice model is trained by emphasizing (bias-aligned, clean) samples, which are selected using a Gaussian Mixture Model. (2) Using the per-sample entropy from the output of the prejudice model, the sampling probability of each sample that is proportional to the entropy is computed. (3) The final model is trained using existing denoising algorithms with the mini-batches constructed by following the computed sampling probability. Compared to existing debiasing and denoising algorithms, our method achieves better debiasing performance on multiple benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 不正确构建的数据集可能会导致不准确的推论。例如，在有偏差的数据集上训练的模型在泛化方面表现不佳（即数据集偏差）。最近的去偏差技术通过低估易于学习的样本（即偏差对齐样本）并突出显示难以学习的样本（即偏差冲突样本），成功地实现了泛化性能。然而，这些技术可能会因噪声标签而失败，因为经过训练的模型将噪声标签识别为难以学习，从而突出显示它们。在这项研究中，我们发现早期使用提供的标签来量化难度的方法可能会受到一小部分噪声标签的影响。此外，我们发现在去偏差之前运行去噪算法是无效的，因为去噪算法减少了难以学习的样本的影响，包括有价值的偏差冲突样本。因此，我们提出了一种基于熵的去偏后去噪的方法，即 DENEB，它具有三个主要阶段。 (1) 通过强调（偏差对齐、干净）样本来训练偏见模型，这些样本是使用高斯混合模型选择的。 (2)使用偏见模型输出的每个样本的熵，计算与熵成正比的每个样本的采样概率。 (3) 使用现有的去噪算法和按照计算的采样概率构建的小批量来训练最终模型。与现有的去偏和去噪算法相比，我们的方法在多个基准上实现了更好的去偏性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DENEB的方法，通过熵基去偏后去噪的三阶段流程，解决带噪声标签的数据集偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法在噪声标签下失效，因模型将噪声误判为难样本；而先去噪再去偏的策略会削弱有价值的冲突样本。
AI.method: DENEB包含三阶段：1) 用高斯混合模型筛选干净样本训练偏见模型；2) 根据偏见模型输出熵计算样本采样概率；3) 用该概率构造mini-batch，结合现有去噪算法训练最终模型。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，DENEB在去偏性能上优于现有去偏和去噪算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过调整去偏与去噪的顺序并结合熵采样，DENEB有效解决了噪声标签下的数据集偏差问题。

Recent debiasing techniques have successfully achieved generalization performance by underestimating easy-to-learn samples (i.e., bias-aligned samples) and highlighting difficult-to-learn samples (i.e., bias-conflicting samples). However, these techniques may fail owing to noisy labels, because the trained model recognizes noisy labels as difficult-to-learn and thus highlights them. In this study, we find that earlier approaches that used the provided labels to quantify difficulty could be affected by the small proportion of noisy labels. Furthermore, we find that running denoising algorithms before debiasing is ineffective because denoising algorithms reduce the impact of difficult-to-learn samples, including valuable bias-conflicting samples. Therefore, we propose an approach called denoising after entropy-based debiasing, i.e., DENEB, which has three main stages. (1) The prejudice model is trained by emphasizing (bias-aligned, clean) samples, which are selected using a Gaussian Mixture Model. (2) Using the per-sample entropy from the output of the prejudice model, the sampling probability of each sample that is proportional to the entropy is computed. (3) The final model is trained using existing denoising algorithms with the mini-batches constructed by following the computed sampling probability. Compared to existing debiasing and denoising algorithms, our method achieves better debiasing performance on multiple benchmarks. 不正确构建的数据集可能会导致不准确的推论。例如，在有偏差的数据集上训练的模型在泛化方面表现不佳（即数据集偏差）。最近的去偏差技术通过低估易于学习的样本（即偏差对齐样本）并突出显示难以学习的样本（即偏差冲突样本），成功地实现了泛化性能。然而，这些技术可能会因噪声标签而失败，因为经过训练的模型将噪声标签识别为难以学习，从而突出显示它们。在这项研究中，我们发现早期使用提供的标签来量化难度的方法可能会受到一小部分噪声标签的影响。此外，我们发现在去偏差之前运行去噪算法是无效的，因为去噪算法减少了难以学习的样本的影响，包括有价值的偏差冲突样本。因此，我们提出了一种基于熵的去偏后去噪的方法，即 DENEB，它具有三个主要阶段。 (1) 通过强调（偏差对齐、干净）样本来训练偏见模型，这些样本是使用高斯混合模型选择的。 (2)使用偏见模型输出的每个样本的熵，计算与熵成正比的每个样本的采样概率。 (3) 使用现有的去噪算法和按照计算的采样概率构建的小批量来训练最终模型。与现有的去偏和去噪算法相比，我们的方法在多个基准上实现了更好的去偏性能。 本文提出了一种名为DENEB的方法，通过熵基去偏后去噪的三阶段流程，解决带噪声标签的数据集偏差问题。 Sumyeong Ahn,Se-Young Yun cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Alexandre Bittar,Philip N. Garner
title: Surrogate Gradient Spiking Neural Networks as Encoders for Large Vocabulary Continuous Speech Recognition
title_zh: 代理梯度尖峰神经网络作为大词汇量连续语音识别的编码器
abstract: Compared to conventional artificial neurons that produce dense and real-valued responses, biologically-inspired spiking neurons transmit sparse and binary information, which can also lead to energy-efficient implementations. Recent research has shown that spiking neural networks can be trained like standard recurrent neural networks using the surrogate gradient method. They have shown promising results on speech command recognition tasks. Using the same technique, we show that they are scalable to large vocabulary continuous speech recognition, where they are capable of replacing LSTMs in the encoder with only minor loss of performance. This suggests that they may be applicable to more involved sequence-to-sequence tasks. Moreover, in contrast to their recurrent non-spiking counterparts, they show robustness to exploding gradient problems without the need to use gates.
summary: Compared to conventional artificial neurons that produce dense and real-valued responses, biologically-inspired spiking neurons transmit sparse and binary information, which can also lead to energy-efficient implementations. Recent research has shown that spiking neural networks can be trained like standard recurrent neural networks using the surrogate gradient method. They have shown promising results on speech command recognition tasks. Using the same technique, we show that they are scalable to large vocabulary continuous speech recognition, where they are capable of replacing LSTMs in the encoder with only minor loss of performance. This suggests that they may be applicable to more involved sequence-to-sequence tasks. Moreover, in contrast to their recurrent non-spiking counterparts, they show robustness to exploding gradient problems without the need to use gates.
abstract_zh: 与产生密集和实值响应的传统人工神经元相比，受生物学启发的尖峰神经元传输稀疏和二进制信息，这也可以实现节能的实现。最近的研究表明，尖峰神经网络可以使用替代梯度方法像标准循环神经网络一样进行训练。他们在语音命令识别任务上显示出了有希望的结果。使用相同的技术，我们证明它们可以扩展到大词汇量连续语音识别，它们能够取代编码器中的 LSTM，而性能损失很小。这表明它们可能适用于更复杂的序列到序列任务。此外，与循环非尖峰对应物相比，它们在不需要使用门的情况下表现出对梯度爆炸问题的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文将替代梯度脉冲神经网络应用于大词汇量连续语音识别任务，验证其作为编码器的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统人工神经元存在能效不足问题，而脉冲神经元具有稀疏二进制特性，且先前研究显示其在语音指令识别中有效，需验证其在更复杂任务中的表现。
AI.method: 采用替代梯度方法训练脉冲神经网络，将其作为编码器替代LSTM用于大词汇量连续语音识别任务。
AI.result: 脉冲神经网络在替换LSTM后仅损失少量性能，且无需门控机制即可避免梯度爆炸问题。
AI.conclusion: 脉冲神经网络在序列到序列任务中展现潜力，其能效优势与鲁棒性或可拓展至更复杂应用场景。

authors_text: Kunal Pratap Singh,Jordi Salvador,Luca Weihs,Aniruddha Kembhavi
title: A General Purpose Supervisory Signal for Embodied Agents
title_zh: 体现代理的通用监督信号
abstract: Training effective embodied AI agents often involves manual reward engineering, expert imitation, specialized components such as maps, or leveraging additional sensors for depth and localization. Another approach is to use neural architectures alongside self-supervised objectives which encourage better representation learning. In practice, there are few guarantees that these self-supervised objectives encode task-relevant information. We propose the Scene Graph Contrastive (SGC) loss, which uses scene graphs as general-purpose, training-only, supervisory signals. The SGC loss does away with explicit graph decoding and instead uses contrastive learning to align an agent's representation with a rich graphical encoding of its environment. The SGC loss is generally applicable, simple to implement, and encourages representations that encode objects' semantics, relationships, and history. Using the SGC loss, we attain significant gains on three embodied tasks: Object Navigation, Multi-Object Navigation, and Arm Point Navigation. Finally, we present studies and analyses which demonstrate the ability of our trained representation to encode semantic cues about the environment.
summary: Training effective embodied AI agents often involves manual reward engineering, expert imitation, specialized components such as maps, or leveraging additional sensors for depth and localization. Another approach is to use neural architectures alongside self-supervised objectives which encourage better representation learning. In practice, there are few guarantees that these self-supervised objectives encode task-relevant information. We propose the Scene Graph Contrastive (SGC) loss, which uses scene graphs as general-purpose, training-only, supervisory signals. The SGC loss does away with explicit graph decoding and instead uses contrastive learning to align an agent's representation with a rich graphical encoding of its environment. The SGC loss is generally applicable, simple to implement, and encourages representations that encode objects' semantics, relationships, and history. Using the SGC loss, we attain significant gains on three embodied tasks: Object Navigation, Multi-Object Navigation, and Arm Point Navigation. Finally, we present studies and analyses which demonstrate the ability of our trained representation to encode semantic cues about the environment.
abstract_zh: 训练有效的具体人工智能代理通常涉及手动奖励工程、专家模仿、地图等专用组件，或利用额外的传感器进行深度和定位。另一种方法是使用神经架构和自我监督目标，以鼓励更好的表征学习。在实践中，几乎无法保证这些自我监督目标编码与任务相关的信息。我们提出了场景图对比（SGC）损失，它使用场景图作为通用的、仅供训练的监督信号。 SGC 损失消除了显式图形解码，而是使用对比学习来将代理的表示与其环境的丰富图形编码保持一致。 SGC 损失普遍适用，易于实现，并且鼓励对对象的语义、关系和历史进行编码的表示。使用 SGC 损失，我们在三个具体任务上获得了显着的收益：对象导航、多对象导航和臂点导航。最后，我们提出的研究和分析证明了我们训练有素的表示对有关环境的语义线索进行编码的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用监督信号SGC损失，通过场景图对比学习提升具身智能体的表示能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工设计奖励或自监督目标，难以保证任务相关性，需更通用的监督信号。
AI.method: 设计SGC损失函数，利用场景图作为训练信号，通过对比学习对齐智能体表示与环境语义结构。
AI.result: 在三个具身任务中显著提升性能，验证了表示对物体语义、关系及历史信息的编码能力。
AI.conclusion: SGC损失为具身智能体提供了简单有效的通用监督方案，展示了语义感知能力的提升潜力。

authors_text: Sinem Gumus,Fatih Kamisli
title: A Learned Pixel-by-Pixel Lossless Image Compression Method with 59K Parameters and Parallel Decoding
title_zh: 一种具有 59K 参数和并行解码的学习型逐像素无损图像压缩方法
abstract: This paper considers lossless image compression and presents a learned compression system that can achieve state-of-the-art lossless compression performance but uses only 59K parameters, which is more than 30x less than other learned systems proposed recently in the literature. The explored system is based on a learned pixel-by-pixel lossless image compression method, where each pixel's probability distribution parameters are obtained by processing the pixel's causal neighborhood (i.e. previously encoded/decoded pixels) with a simple neural network comprising 59K parameters. This causality causes the decoder to operate sequentially, i.e. the neural network has to be evaluated for each pixel sequentially, which increases decoding time significantly with common GPU software and hardware. To reduce the decoding time, parallel decoding algorithms are proposed and implemented. The obtained lossless image compression system is compared to traditional and learned systems in the literature in terms of compression performance, encoding-decoding times and computational complexity.
summary: This paper considers lossless image compression and presents a learned compression system that can achieve state-of-the-art lossless compression performance but uses only 59K parameters, which is more than 30x less than other learned systems proposed recently in the literature. The explored system is based on a learned pixel-by-pixel lossless image compression method, where each pixel's probability distribution parameters are obtained by processing the pixel's causal neighborhood (i.e. previously encoded/decoded pixels) with a simple neural network comprising 59K parameters. This causality causes the decoder to operate sequentially, i.e. the neural network has to be evaluated for each pixel sequentially, which increases decoding time significantly with common GPU software and hardware. To reduce the decoding time, parallel decoding algorithms are proposed and implemented. The obtained lossless image compression system is compared to traditional and learned systems in the literature in terms of compression performance, encoding-decoding times and computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了无损图像压缩，并提出了一种学习压缩系统，该系统可以实现最先进的无损压缩性能，但仅使用 59K 参数，比文献中最近提出的其他学习系统少 30 倍以上。所探索的系统基于学习的逐像素无损图像压缩方法，其中每个像素的概率分布参数是通过使用包含 59K 参数的简单神经网络处理像素的因果邻域（即先前编码/解码的像素）来获得的。这种因果关系导致解码器按顺序操作，即必须按顺序评估每个像素的神经网络，这会显着增加常见 GPU 软件和硬件的解码时间。为了减少解码时间，提出并实现了并行解码算法。所获得的无损图像压缩系统在压缩性能、编码解码时间和计算复杂度方面与文献中的传统系统和学习系统进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种参数仅为59K的像素级无损图像压缩方法，并实现了并行解码以提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有学习型无损图像压缩系统参数过多，且解码速度慢，因此需要一种更高效、参数更少且解码更快的压缩方法。
AI.method: 本文基于像素级无损压缩方法，利用简单神经网络处理每个像素的因果邻域以获取概率分布参数，并提出并行解码算法以减少解码时间。
AI.result: 该系统在压缩性能、编码解码时间和计算复杂度方面优于传统和现有学习系统，且参数仅为59K，解码效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在保持高性能的同时显著减少了参数数量和解码时间，为无损图像压缩提供了新的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种参数仅为59K的像素级无损图像压缩方法，并实现了并行解码以提升效率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有学习型无损图像压缩系统参数过多，且解码速度慢，因此需要一种更高效、参数更少且解码更快的压缩方法。
ai_content.method: 本文基于像素级无损压缩方法，利用简单神经网络处理每个像素的因果邻域以获取概率分布参数，并提出并行解码算法以减少解码时间。
ai_content.result: 该系统在压缩性能、编码解码时间和计算复杂度方面优于传统和现有学习系统，且参数仅为59K，解码效率显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在保持高性能的同时显著减少了参数数量和解码时间，为无损图像压缩提供了新的解决方案。
