motivation: 人脸识别中存在数据不确定性，但现有深度学习模型对不确定或无关输入仍给出高置信度预测，缺乏对不确定性和OOD样本的有效建模与检测机制。
method: 从概率视角出发，通过调整softmax函数中温度标量（反映不确定性噪声尺度）的随机学习，构建RTS框架。训练阶段动态调节清洁样本与噪声样本的学习强度，测试阶段利用温度标量方差作为不确定性度量进行OOD检测。
result: RTS在FR基准测试中取得SOTA性能，其方差指标与输入图像不确定性紧密相关，且在噪声数据集上表现鲁棒。该模块计算成本低，仅增加微不足道的计算开销。
conclusion: RTS通过统一建模不确定性，有效提升了人脸识别的稳定性与可靠性，同时实现了高效的OOD检测，为实际应用中处理数据不确定性提供了轻量级解决方案。
search_text: Improving Training and Inference of Face Recognition Models via Random Temperature Scaling 通过随机温度缩放改进人脸识别模型的训练和推理 Data uncertainty is commonly observed in the images for face recognition (FR). However, deep learning algorithms often make predictions with high confidence even for uncertain or irrelevant inputs. Intuitively, FR algorithms can benefit from both the estimation of uncertainty and the detection of out-of-distribution (OOD) samples. Taking a probabilistic view of the current classification model, the temperature scalar is exactly the scale of uncertainty noise implicitly added in the softmax function. Meanwhile, the uncertainty of images in a dataset should follow a prior distribution. Based on the observation, a unified framework for uncertainty modeling and FR, Random Temperature Scaling (RTS), is proposed to learn a reliable FR algorithm. The benefits of RTS are two-fold. (1) In the training phase, it can adjust the learning strength of clean and noisy samples for stability and accuracy. (2) In the test phase, it can provide a score of confidence to detect uncertain, low-quality and even OOD samples, without training on extra labels. Extensive experiments on FR benchmarks demonstrate that the magnitude of variance in RTS, which serves as an OOD detection metric, is closely related to the uncertainty of the input image. RTS can achieve top performance on both the FR and OOD detection tasks. Moreover, the model trained with RTS can perform robustly on datasets with noise. The proposed module is light-weight and only adds negligible computation cost to the model. 人脸识别 (FR) 图像中经常观察到数据不确定性。然而，即使对于不确定或不相关的输入，深度学习算法通常也能做出高置信度的预测。直观上，FR 算法可以受益于不确定性的估计和分布外 (OOD) 样本的检测。从当前分类模型的概率角度来看，温度标量正是隐式添加到 softmax 函数中的不确定性噪声的标度。同时，数据集中图像的不确定性应遵循先验分布。基于观察，提出了不确定性建模和FR的统一框架，即随机温度缩放（RTS），以学习可靠的FR算法。 RTS 的好处有两个。 （1）在训练阶段，可以调整干净样本和噪声样本的学习强度，以保证稳定性和准确性。 （2）在测试阶段，它可以提供检测不确定、低质量甚至OOD样本的置信度分数，而无需额外标签的训练。对 FR 基准的大量实验表明，作为 OOD 检测指标的 RTS 的方差大小与输入图像的不确定性密切相关。 RTS 可以在 FR 和 OOD 检测任务上实现顶级性能。此外，使用 RTS 训练的模型可以在有噪声的数据集上表现稳健。所提出的模块是轻量级的，只给模型增加了可以忽略不计的计算成本。 本文提出了一种名为随机温度缩放（RTS）的统一框架，通过建模不确定性来提升人脸识别（FR）模型的训练与推理性能，并实现无需额外标签的分布外（OOD）检测。 Lei Shang,Mouxiao Huang,Wu Shi,Yuchen Liu,Yang Liu,Fei Wang,Baigui Sun,Xuansong Xie,Yu Qiao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Xinmeng Xu,Weiping Tu,Yuhong Yang
title: Injecting Spatial Information for Monaural Speech Enhancement via Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 通过知识蒸馏注入空间信息以增强单声道语音
abstract: Monaural speech enhancement (SE) provides a versatile and cost-effective approach to SE tasks by utilizing recordings from a single microphone. However, the monaural SE lags performance behind multi-channel SE as the monaural SE methods are unable to extract spatial information from one-channel recordings, which greatly limits their application scenarios. To address this issue, we inject spatial information into the monaural SE model and propose a knowledge distillation strategy to enable the monaural SE model to learn binaural speech features from the binaural SE model, which makes monaural SE model possible to reconstruct higher intelligibility and quality enhanced speeches under low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) conditions. Extensive experiments show that our proposed monaural SE model by injecting spatial information via knowledge distillation achieves favorable performance against other monaural SE models with fewer parameters.
summary: Monaural speech enhancement (SE) provides a versatile and cost-effective approach to SE tasks by utilizing recordings from a single microphone. However, the monaural SE lags performance behind multi-channel SE as the monaural SE methods are unable to extract spatial information from one-channel recordings, which greatly limits their application scenarios. To address this issue, we inject spatial information into the monaural SE model and propose a knowledge distillation strategy to enable the monaural SE model to learn binaural speech features from the binaural SE model, which makes monaural SE model possible to reconstruct higher intelligibility and quality enhanced speeches under low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) conditions. Extensive experiments show that our proposed monaural SE model by injecting spatial information via knowledge distillation achieves favorable performance against other monaural SE models with fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 单耳语音增强 (SE) 通过利用单个麦克风的录音，为 SE 任务提供了一种多功能且经济高效的方法。然而，单声道SE的性能落后于多通道SE，因为单声道SE方法无法从单通道录音中提取空间信息，这极大地限制了其应用场景。为了解决这个问题，我们将空间信息注入单耳SE模型，并提出一种知识蒸馏策略，使单耳SE模型能够从双耳SE模型中学习双耳语音特征，这使得单耳SE模型可以在低信噪比（SNR）条件下重建更高清晰度和质量增强的语音。大量实验表明，我们提出的单声道 SE 模型通过知识蒸馏注入空间信息，与其他参数较少的单声道 SE 模型相比，取得了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过知识蒸馏向单通道语音增强模型注入空间信息，以提升其在低信噪比条件下的语音可懂度和质量。
AI.motivation: 单通道语音增强因无法提取空间信息导致性能落后于多通道方法，限制了其应用范围，需寻找有效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计知识蒸馏策略，使单通道模型学习双耳语音增强模型的特征，从而注入空间信息并提升性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在参数更少的情况下，于低信噪比场景中实现了优于其他单通道模型的语音增强效果。
AI.conclusion: 注入空间信息结合知识蒸馏可有效提升单通道语音增强性能，为资源受限场景提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Lechao Cheng,Chaowei Fang,Dingwen Zhang,Guanbin Li,Gang Huang
title: Compound Batch Normalization for Long-tailed Image Classification
title_zh: 长尾图像分类的复合批量归一化
abstract: Significant progress has been made in learning image classification neural networks under long-tail data distribution using robust training algorithms such as data re-sampling, re-weighting, and margin adjustment. Those methods, however, ignore the impact of data imbalance on feature normalization. The dominance of majority classes (head classes) in estimating statistics and affine parameters causes internal covariate shifts within less-frequent categories to be overlooked. To alleviate this challenge, we propose a compound batch normalization method based on a Gaussian mixture. It can model the feature space more comprehensively and reduce the dominance of head classes. In addition, a moving average-based expectation maximization (EM) algorithm is employed to estimate the statistical parameters of multiple Gaussian distributions. However, the EM algorithm is sensitive to initialization and can easily become stuck in local minima where the multiple Gaussian components continue to focus on majority classes. To tackle this issue, we developed a dual-path learning framework that employs class-aware split feature normalization to diversify the estimated Gaussian distributions, allowing the Gaussian components to fit with training samples of less-frequent classes more comprehensively. Extensive experiments on commonly used datasets demonstrated that the proposed method outperforms existing methods on long-tailed image classification.
summary: Significant progress has been made in learning image classification neural networks under long-tail data distribution using robust training algorithms such as data re-sampling, re-weighting, and margin adjustment. Those methods, however, ignore the impact of data imbalance on feature normalization. The dominance of majority classes (head classes) in estimating statistics and affine parameters causes internal covariate shifts within less-frequent categories to be overlooked. To alleviate this challenge, we propose a compound batch normalization method based on a Gaussian mixture. It can model the feature space more comprehensively and reduce the dominance of head classes. In addition, a moving average-based expectation maximization (EM) algorithm is employed to estimate the statistical parameters of multiple Gaussian distributions. However, the EM algorithm is sensitive to initialization and can easily become stuck in local minima where the multiple Gaussian components continue to focus on majority classes. To tackle this issue, we developed a dual-path learning framework that employs class-aware split feature normalization to diversify the estimated Gaussian distributions, allowing the Gaussian components to fit with training samples of less-frequent classes more comprehensively. Extensive experiments on commonly used datasets demonstrated that the proposed method outperforms existing methods on long-tailed image classification.
abstract_zh: 使用数据重采样、重加权和边距调整等鲁棒训练算法在长尾数据分布下学习图像分类神经网络取得了重大进展。然而，这些方法忽略了数据不平衡对特征标准化的影响。大多数类（头类）在估计统计数据和仿射参数中的主导地位导致不太频繁的类别内的内部协变量变化被忽视。为了缓解这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于高斯混合的复合批量归一化方法。它可以更全面地对特征空间进行建模，并减少头类的主导地位。此外，采用基于移动平均的期望最大化（EM）算法来估计多个高斯分布的统计参数。然而，EM 算法对初始化很敏感，很容易陷入局部最小值，其中多个高斯分量继续关注多数类。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一个双路径学习框架，该框架采用类别感知的分割特征归一化来使估计的高斯分布多样化，从而使高斯分量能够更全面地适应不太频繁类别的训练样本。对常用数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的方法在长尾图像分类方面优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯混合模型的复合批量归一化方法，用于解决长尾图像分类中类别不平衡导致的特征归一化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理长尾数据时忽略了类别不平衡对特征归一化的影响，多数类（头类）在统计参数估计中占据主导地位，导致少样本类的内部协变量偏移被忽视。
AI.method: 提出高斯混合复合批量归一化方法，结合移动平均的EM算法估计多高斯分布参数，并设计双路径学习框架通过类感知特征分割归一化，提升少样本类的分布拟合能力。
AI.result: 在常用数据集上的实验表明，该方法在长尾图像分类任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模更全面的特征空间并抑制多数类主导效应，所提方法有效提升了长尾场景下的分类性能。

authors_text: Jiahe Shi,Yawen Wu,Dewen Zeng,Jun Tao,Jingtong Hu,Yiyu Shi
title: Self-supervised On-device Federated Learning from Unlabeled Streams
title_zh: 来自未标记流的自监督设备上联合学习
abstract: The ubiquity of edge devices has led to a growing amount of unlabeled data produced at the edge. Deep learning models deployed on edge devices are required to learn from these unlabeled data to continuously improve accuracy. Self-supervised representation learning has achieved promising performances using centralized unlabeled data. However, the increasing awareness of privacy protection limits centralizing the distributed unlabeled image data on edge devices. While federated learning has been widely adopted to enable distributed machine learning with privacy preservation, without a data selection method to efficiently select streaming data, the traditional federated learning framework fails to handle these huge amounts of decentralized unlabeled data with limited storage resources on edge. To address these challenges, we propose a Self-supervised On-device Federated learning framework with coreset selection, which we call SOFed, to automatically select a coreset that consists of the most representative samples into the replay buffer on each device. It preserves data privacy as each client does not share raw data while learning good visual representations. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and significance of the proposed method in visual representation learning.
summary: The ubiquity of edge devices has led to a growing amount of unlabeled data produced at the edge. Deep learning models deployed on edge devices are required to learn from these unlabeled data to continuously improve accuracy. Self-supervised representation learning has achieved promising performances using centralized unlabeled data. However, the increasing awareness of privacy protection limits centralizing the distributed unlabeled image data on edge devices. While federated learning has been widely adopted to enable distributed machine learning with privacy preservation, without a data selection method to efficiently select streaming data, the traditional federated learning framework fails to handle these huge amounts of decentralized unlabeled data with limited storage resources on edge. To address these challenges, we propose a Self-supervised On-device Federated learning framework with coreset selection, which we call SOFed, to automatically select a coreset that consists of the most representative samples into the replay buffer on each device. It preserves data privacy as each client does not share raw data while learning good visual representations. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and significance of the proposed method in visual representation learning.
abstract_zh: 边缘设备的普遍存在导致边缘产生的未标记数据数量不断增加。部署在边缘设备上的深度学习模型需要从这些未标记的数据中学习，以不断提高准确性。自监督表示学习使用集中式未标记数据取得了有希望的性能。然而，隐私保护意识的增强限制了将分布式未标记图像数据集中在边缘设备上。虽然联邦学习已被广​​泛采用来实现具有隐私保护的分布式机器学习，但如果没有数据选择方法来有效地选择流数据，传统的联邦学习框架无法在边缘存储资源有限的情况下处理这些大量分散的未标记数据。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种具有核心集选择功能的自监督设备端联邦学习框架（我们称之为 SOFed），以自动选择由最具代表性的样本组成的核心集到每个设备上的重播缓冲区中。它保护了数据隐私，因为每个客户端在学习良好的视觉表示时不会共享原始数据。实验证明了该方法在视觉表示学习中的有效性和意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合自监督学习和联邦学习的框架SOFed，用于在边缘设备上处理未标记数据流，通过核心集选择机制提升视觉表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备产生的未标记数据激增，但传统联邦学习框架因存储限制和缺乏数据选择方法，难以有效处理分布式未标记数据，同时需满足隐私保护需求。
AI.method: 设计SOFed框架，在设备端通过核心集选择自动筛选代表性样本存入重放缓冲区，结合自监督学习训练视觉表示，无需共享原始数据以保护隐私。
AI.result: 实验验证了SOFed在视觉表示学习中的有效性，证明其能在隐私保护和存储受限条件下显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: SOFed通过创新的数据选择机制，为分布式未标记数据的隐私保护与高效学习提供了可行方案，具有重要的实际应用价值。

authors_text: M. Erkin Yücel,Cem Ünsalan
title: Planogram Compliance Control via Object Detection, Sequence Alignment, and Focused Iterative Search
title_zh: 通过对象检测、序列对齐和集中迭代搜索进行货架图合规性控制
abstract: Smart retail stores are becoming the fact of our lives. Several computer vision and sensor based systems are working together to achieve such a complex and automated operation. Besides, the retail sector already has several open and challenging problems which can be solved with the help of pattern recognition and computer vision methods. One important problem to be tackled is the planogram compliance control. In this study, we propose a novel method to solve it. The proposed method is based on object detection, planogram compliance control, and focused and iterative search steps. The object detection step is formed by local feature extraction and implicit shape model formation. The planogram compliance control step is formed by sequence alignment via the modified Needleman-Wunsch algorithm. The focused and iterative search step aims to improve the performance of the object detection and planogram compliance control steps. We tested all three steps on two different datasets. Based on these tests, we summarize the key findings as well as strengths and weaknesses of the proposed method.
summary: Smart retail stores are becoming the fact of our lives. Several computer vision and sensor based systems are working together to achieve such a complex and automated operation. Besides, the retail sector already has several open and challenging problems which can be solved with the help of pattern recognition and computer vision methods. One important problem to be tackled is the planogram compliance control. In this study, we propose a novel method to solve it. The proposed method is based on object detection, planogram compliance control, and focused and iterative search steps. The object detection step is formed by local feature extraction and implicit shape model formation. The planogram compliance control step is formed by sequence alignment via the modified Needleman-Wunsch algorithm. The focused and iterative search step aims to improve the performance of the object detection and planogram compliance control steps. We tested all three steps on two different datasets. Based on these tests, we summarize the key findings as well as strengths and weaknesses of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 智能零售店正在成为我们生活的一部分。多个基于计算机视觉和传感器的系统正在协同工作，以实现如此复杂和自动化的操作。此外，零售业已经存在一些开放且具有挑战性的问题，可以借助模式识别和计算机视觉方法来解决。需要解决的一个重要问题是货架图合规性控制。在本研究中，我们提出了一种解决该问题的新方法。所提出的方法基于对象检测、货架图合规性控制以及集中和迭代搜索步骤。目标检测步骤由局部特征提取和隐式形状模型形成形成。货架图合规性控制步骤是通过改进的 Needleman-Wunsch 算法进行序列比对而形成的。集中和迭代搜索步骤旨在提高对象检测和货架图合规性控制步骤的性能。我们在两个不同的数据集上测试了所有三个步骤。根据这些测试，我们总结了所提出方法的主要发现以及优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合物体检测、序列对齐和聚焦迭代搜索的新方法，用于解决智能零售店中的货架合规性控制问题。
AI.motivation: 零售业需要自动化解决方案来确保货架布局符合计划图要求，现有方法在复杂场景下存在检测精度和效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 方法包含三步骤：基于局部特征提取和隐式形状模型的物体检测、改进的Needleman-Wunsch算法实现序列对齐、以及通过聚焦迭代搜索优化检测与对齐性能。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上验证了方法的有效性，总结出该方法在复杂货架场景中的优势及当前存在的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法提升了货架合规性检测的准确率和鲁棒性，但需进一步优化计算效率以适应实时零售场景。

Besides, the retail sector already has several open and challenging problems which can be solved with the help of pattern recognition and computer vision methods. Erkin Yücel,Cem Ünsalan cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaodong Li,Chenxin Zou,Yi Cai,Yuelong Zhu
title: Knowledge Graph Quality Evaluation under Incomplete Information
title_zh: 不完全信息下的知识图谱质量评估
abstract: Knowledge graphs (KGs) have attracted more and more attentions because of their fundamental roles in many tasks. Quality evaluation for KGs is thus crucial and indispensable. Existing methods in this field evaluate KGs by either proposing new quality metrics from different dimensions or measuring performances at KG construction stages. However, there are two major issues with those methods. First, they highly rely on raw data in KGs, which makes KGs' internal information exposed during quality evaluation. Second, they consider more about the quality at data level instead of ability level, where the latter one is more important for downstream applications. To address these issues, we propose a knowledge graph quality evaluation framework under incomplete information (QEII). The quality evaluation task is transformed into an adversarial Q&A game between two KGs. Winner of the game is thus considered to have better qualities. During the evaluation process, no raw data is exposed, which ensures information protection. Experimental results on four pairs of KGs demonstrate that, compared with baselines, the QEII implements a reasonable quality evaluation at ability level under incomplete information.
summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) have attracted more and more attentions because of their fundamental roles in many tasks. Quality evaluation for KGs is thus crucial and indispensable. Existing methods in this field evaluate KGs by either proposing new quality metrics from different dimensions or measuring performances at KG construction stages. However, there are two major issues with those methods. First, they highly rely on raw data in KGs, which makes KGs' internal information exposed during quality evaluation. Second, they consider more about the quality at data level instead of ability level, where the latter one is more important for downstream applications. To address these issues, we propose a knowledge graph quality evaluation framework under incomplete information (QEII). The quality evaluation task is transformed into an adversarial Q&A game between two KGs. Winner of the game is thus considered to have better qualities. During the evaluation process, no raw data is exposed, which ensures information protection. Experimental results on four pairs of KGs demonstrate that, compared with baselines, the QEII implements a reasonable quality evaluation at ability level under incomplete information.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）因其在许多任务中的基础作用而受到越来越多的关注。因此，对幼儿园的质量评估至关重要且不可或缺。该领域的现有方法通过从不同维度提出新的质量指标或在知识图谱构建阶段测量性能来评估知识图谱。然而，这些方法存在两个主要问题。首先，它们高度依赖知识图谱中的原始数据，这使得知识图谱的内部信息在质量评估时暴露出来。其次，他们更多地考虑数据层面的质量而不是能力层面，其中后者对于下游应用程序更重要。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了不完全信息下的知识图质量评估框架（QEII）。质量评估任务转化为两个KG之间的对抗性问答游戏。因此，比赛的获胜者被认为具有更好的素质。评估过程中不暴露任何原始数据，保证信息安全。四对知识图谱的实验结果表明，与基线相比，QEII 在不完全信息下在能力层面实现了合理的质量评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在不完全信息下评估知识图谱质量的框架QEII，通过对抗性问答游戏比较两个知识图谱的能力层级质量。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱质量评估方法依赖原始数据导致信息暴露，且侧重数据层面质量而非对下游应用更重要的能力层面质量。
AI.method: 设计对抗性问答游戏框架QEII，通过两个知识图谱间的问答博弈评估能力层级质量，无需暴露原始数据。
AI.result: 在四个知识图谱对的实验中，QEII相比基线方法能更合理地实现能力层级质量评估，且保护了知识图谱内部信息。
AI.conclusion: QEII框架有效解决了知识图谱质量评估中的信息暴露问题，并实现了更符合下游应用需求的能力层级评估。

search_text: Knowledge Graph Quality Evaluation under Incomplete Information 不完全信息下的知识图谱质量评估 Knowledge graphs (KGs) have attracted more and more attentions because of their fundamental roles in many tasks. Quality evaluation for KGs is thus crucial and indispensable. Existing methods in this field evaluate KGs by either proposing new quality metrics from different dimensions or measuring performances at KG construction stages. However, there are two major issues with those methods. First, they highly rely on raw data in KGs, which makes KGs' internal information exposed during quality evaluation. Second, they consider more about the quality at data level instead of ability level, where the latter one is more important for downstream applications. To address these issues, we propose a knowledge graph quality evaluation framework under incomplete information (QEII). The quality evaluation task is transformed into an adversarial Q&A game between two KGs. Winner of the game is thus considered to have better qualities. During the evaluation process, no raw data is exposed, which ensures information protection. Experimental results on four pairs of KGs demonstrate that, compared with baselines, the QEII implements a reasonable quality evaluation at ability level under incomplete information. 知识图（KG）因其在许多任务中的基础作用而受到越来越多的关注。因此，对幼儿园的质量评估至关重要且不可或缺。该领域的现有方法通过从不同维度提出新的质量指标或在知识图谱构建阶段测量性能来评估知识图谱。然而，这些方法存在两个主要问题。首先，它们高度依赖知识图谱中的原始数据，这使得知识图谱的内部信息在质量评估时暴露出来。其次，他们更多地考虑数据层面的质量而不是能力层面，其中后者对于下游应用程序更重要。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了不完全信息下的知识图质量评估框架（QEII）。质量评估任务转化为两个KG之间的对抗性问答游戏。因此，比赛的获胜者被认为具有更好的素质。评估过程中不暴露任何原始数据，保证信息安全。四对知识图谱的实验结果表明，与基线相比，QEII 在不完全信息下在能力层面实现了合理的质量评估。 本文提出一种在不完全信息下评估知识图谱质量的框架QEII，通过对抗性问答游戏比较两个知识图谱的能力层级质量。 Xiaodong Li,Chenxin Zou,Yi Cai,Yuelong Zhu cs.AI

authors_text: Tao Zhou,Yi Zhou,Chen Gong,Jian Yang,Yu Zhang
title: Feature Aggregation and Propagation Network for Camouflaged Object Detection
title_zh: 用于伪装物体检测的特征聚合和传播网络
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures, accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
abstract: Camouflaged object detection (COD) aims to detect/segment camouflaged objects embedded in the environment, which has attracted increasing attention over the past decades. Although several COD methods have been developed, they still suffer from unsatisfactory performance due to the intrinsic similarities between the foreground objects and background surroundings. In this paper, we propose a novel Feature Aggregation and Propagation Network (FAP-Net) for camouflaged object detection. Specifically, we propose a Boundary Guidance Module (BGM) to explicitly model the boundary characteristic, which can provide boundary-enhanced features to boost the COD performance. To capture the scale variations of the camouflaged objects, we propose a Multi-scale Feature Aggregation Module (MFAM) to characterize the multi-scale information from each layer and obtain the aggregated feature representations. Furthermore, we propose a Cross-level Fusion and Propagation Module (CFPM). In the CFPM, the feature fusion part can effectively integrate the features from adjacent layers to exploit the cross-level correlations, and the feature propagation part can transmit valuable context information from the encoder to the decoder network via a gate unit. Finally, we formulate a unified and end-to-end trainable framework where cross-level features can be effectively fused and propagated for capturing rich context information. Extensive experiments on three benchmark camouflaged datasets demonstrate that our FAP-Net outperforms other state-of-the-art COD models. Moreover, our model can be extended to the polyp segmentation task, and the comparison results further validate the effectiveness of the proposed model in segmenting polyps. The source code and results will be released at https://github.com/taozh2017/FAPNet.
summary: Camouflaged object detection (COD) aims to detect/segment camouflaged objects embedded in the environment, which has attracted increasing attention over the past decades. Although several COD methods have been developed, they still suffer from unsatisfactory performance due to the intrinsic similarities between the foreground objects and background surroundings. In this paper, we propose a novel Feature Aggregation and Propagation Network (FAP-Net) for camouflaged object detection. Specifically, we propose a Boundary Guidance Module (BGM) to explicitly model the boundary characteristic, which can provide boundary-enhanced features to boost the COD performance. To capture the scale variations of the camouflaged objects, we propose a Multi-scale Feature Aggregation Module (MFAM) to characterize the multi-scale information from each layer and obtain the aggregated feature representations. Furthermore, we propose a Cross-level Fusion and Propagation Module (CFPM). In the CFPM, the feature fusion part can effectively integrate the features from adjacent layers to exploit the cross-level correlations, and the feature propagation part can transmit valuable context information from the encoder to the decoder network via a gate unit. Finally, we formulate a unified and end-to-end trainable framework where cross-level features can be effectively fused and propagated for capturing rich context information. Extensive experiments on three benchmark camouflaged datasets demonstrate that our FAP-Net outperforms other state-of-the-art COD models. Moreover, our model can be extended to the polyp segmentation task, and the comparison results further validate the effectiveness of the proposed model in segmenting polyps. The source code and results will be released at https://github.com/taozh2017/FAPNet.
abstract_zh: 伪装物体检测（COD）旨在检测/分割嵌入环境中的伪装物体，在过去几十年中引起了越来越多的关注。尽管已经开发了几种 COD 方法，但由于前景物体和背景环境之间的内在相似性，它们的性能仍然不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于伪装物体检测的新型特征聚合和传播网络（FAP-Net）。具体来说，我们提出了一个边界指导模块（BGM）来显式地建模边界特征，它可以提供边界增强特征来提高 COD 性能。为了捕获伪装对象的尺度变化，我们提出了多尺度特征聚合模块（MFAM）来表征每一层的多尺度信息并获得聚合的特征表示。此外，我们提出了跨级融合和传播模块（CFPM）。在CFPM中，特征融合部分可以有效地集成相邻层的特征以利用跨层相关性，特征传播部分可以通过门单元将有价值的上下文信息从编码器传输到解码器网络。最后，我们制定了一个统一的端到端可训练框架，可以有效地融合和传播跨级特征以捕获丰富的上下文信息。对三个基准伪装数据集的大量实验表明，我们的 FAP-Net 优于其他最先进的 COD 模型。此外，我们的模型可以扩展到息肉分割任务，比较结果进一步验证了所提出的模型在息肉分割方面的有效性。源代码和结果将在https://github.com/taozh2017/FAPNet发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FAP-Net的新网络架构，用于解决伪装目标检测（COD）任务中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有COD方法因伪装目标与背景的相似性导致性能不足，需通过建模边界特征、多尺度信息及跨层上下文关联来提升检测效果。
AI.method: 设计了边界引导模块（BGM）、多尺度特征聚合模块（MFAM）和跨层融合传播模块（CFPM），通过边界增强、多尺度特征提取及跨层特征融合与传播实现端到端检测。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，并成功扩展至息肉分割任务，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FAP-Net通过模块化设计有效捕捉伪装目标的边界与上下文信息，为COD及医学图像分割提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Yuqun Wu,Jae Yong Lee,Derek Hoiem
title: Sparse SPN: Depth Completion from Sparse Keypoints
title_zh: 稀疏 SPN：稀疏关键点的深度补全
abstract: Our long term goal is to use image-based depth completion to quickly create 3D models from sparse point clouds, e.g. from SfM or SLAM. Much progress has been made in depth completion. However, most current works assume well distributed samples of known depth, e.g. Lidar or random uniform sampling, and perform poorly on uneven samples, such as from keypoints, due to the large unsampled regions. To address this problem, we extend CSPN with multiscale prediction and a dilated kernel, leading to much better completion of keypoint-sampled depth. We also show that a model trained on NYUv2 creates surprisingly good point clouds on ETH3D by completing sparse SfM points.
summary: Our long term goal is to use image-based depth completion to quickly create 3D models from sparse point clouds, e.g. from SfM or SLAM. Much progress has been made in depth completion. However, most current works assume well distributed samples of known depth, e.g. Lidar or random uniform sampling, and perform poorly on uneven samples, such as from keypoints, due to the large unsampled regions. To address this problem, we extend CSPN with multiscale prediction and a dilated kernel, leading to much better completion of keypoint-sampled depth. We also show that a model trained on NYUv2 creates surprisingly good point clouds on ETH3D by completing sparse SfM points.
abstract_zh: 我们的长期目标是使用基于图像的深度补全从稀疏点云快速创建 3D 模型，例如来自 SfM 或 SLAM。深度完成工作取得较大进展。然而，当前的大多数工作都假设已知深度的分布良好的样本，例如激光雷达或随机均匀采样，由于未采样区域较大，因此在不均匀样本（例如来自关键点的样本）上表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们通过多尺度预测和扩张内核扩展了 CSPN，从而更好地完成了关键点采样深度。我们还表明，在 NYUv2 上训练的模型通过完成稀疏 SfM 点，在 ETH3D 上创建了令人惊讶的良好点云。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于稀疏关键点的深度补全方法，用于快速生成高质量的3D模型
AI.motivation: 现有深度补全方法在处理稀疏且不均匀的关键点采样时效果不佳，导致大区域未采样问题，需要更有效的解决方案
AI.method: 通过扩展CSPN网络，引入多尺度预测机制和扩张卷积核，以更有效地处理稀疏关键点的深度补全问题
AI.result: 在ETH3D数据集上，使用NYUv2训练的模型能够有效补全稀疏SfM点，生成高质量点云
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了稀疏关键点深度补全问题，展示了模型在不同数据集上的良好泛化能力，为快速生成3D模型提供了新思路

conclusion: 该方法有效解决了稀疏关键点深度补全问题，展示了模型在不同数据集上的良好泛化能力，为快速生成3D模型提供了新思路
search_text: Sparse SPN: Depth Completion from Sparse Keypoints 稀疏 SPN：稀疏关键点的深度补全 Our long term goal is to use image-based depth completion to quickly create 3D models from sparse point clouds, e.g. from SfM or SLAM. Much progress has been made in depth completion. However, most current works assume well distributed samples of known depth, e.g. Lidar or random uniform sampling, and perform poorly on uneven samples, such as from keypoints, due to the large unsampled regions. To address this problem, we extend CSPN with multiscale prediction and a dilated kernel, leading to much better completion of keypoint-sampled depth. We also show that a model trained on NYUv2 creates surprisingly good point clouds on ETH3D by completing sparse SfM points. 我们的长期目标是使用基于图像的深度补全从稀疏点云快速创建 3D 模型，例如来自 SfM 或 SLAM。深度完成工作取得较大进展。然而，当前的大多数工作都假设已知深度的分布良好的样本，例如激光雷达或随机均匀采样，由于未采样区域较大，因此在不均匀样本（例如来自关键点的样本）上表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们通过多尺度预测和扩张内核扩展了 CSPN，从而更好地完成了关键点采样深度。我们还表明，在 NYUv2 上训练的模型通过完成稀疏 SfM 点，在 ETH3D 上创建了令人惊讶的良好点云。 提出一种基于稀疏关键点的深度补全方法，用于快速生成高质量的3D模型 Yuqun Wu,Jae Yong Lee,Derek Hoiem cs.CV

authors_text: Fangxun Shu,Biaolong Chen,Yue Liao,Shuwen Xiao,Wenyu Sun,Xiaobo Li,Yousong Zhu,Jinqiao Wang,Si Liu
title: Masked Contrastive Pre-Training for Efficient Video-Text Retrieval
title_zh: 用于高效视频文本检索的蒙版对比预训练
abstract: We present a simple yet effective end-to-end Video-language Pre-training (VidLP) framework, Masked Contrastive Video-language Pretraining (MAC), for video-text retrieval tasks. Our MAC aims to reduce video representation's spatial and temporal redundancy in the VidLP model by a mask sampling mechanism to improve pre-training efficiency. Comparing conventional temporal sparse sampling, we propose to randomly mask a high ratio of spatial regions and only feed visible regions into the encoder as sparse spatial sampling. Similarly, we adopt the mask sampling technique for text inputs for consistency. Instead of blindly applying the mask-then-prediction paradigm from MAE, we propose a masked-then-alignment paradigm for efficient video-text alignment. The motivation is that video-text retrieval tasks rely on high-level alignment rather than low-level reconstruction, and multimodal alignment with masked modeling encourages the model to learn a robust and general multimodal representation from incomplete and unstable inputs. Coupling these designs enables efficient end-to-end pre-training: reduce FLOPs (60% off), accelerate pre-training (by 3x), and improve performance. Our MAC achieves state-of-the-art results on various video-text retrieval datasets, including MSR-VTT, DiDeMo, and ActivityNet. Our approach is omnivorous to input modalities. With minimal modifications, we achieve competitive results on image-text retrieval tasks.
summary: We present a simple yet effective end-to-end Video-language Pre-training (VidLP) framework, Masked Contrastive Video-language Pretraining (MAC), for video-text retrieval tasks. Our MAC aims to reduce video representation's spatial and temporal redundancy in the VidLP model by a mask sampling mechanism to improve pre-training efficiency. Comparing conventional temporal sparse sampling, we propose to randomly mask a high ratio of spatial regions and only feed visible regions into the encoder as sparse spatial sampling. Similarly, we adopt the mask sampling technique for text inputs for consistency. Instead of blindly applying the mask-then-prediction paradigm from MAE, we propose a masked-then-alignment paradigm for efficient video-text alignment. The motivation is that video-text retrieval tasks rely on high-level alignment rather than low-level reconstruction, and multimodal alignment with masked modeling encourages the model to learn a robust and general multimodal representation from incomplete and unstable inputs. Coupling these designs enables efficient end-to-end pre-training: reduce FLOPs (60% off), accelerate pre-training (by 3x), and improve performance. Our MAC achieves state-of-the-art results on various video-text retrieval datasets, including MSR-VTT, DiDeMo, and ActivityNet. Our approach is omnivorous to input modalities. With minimal modifications, we achieve competitive results on image-text retrieval tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个简单而有效的端到端视频语言预训练（VidLP）框架，即掩模对比视频语言预训练（MAC），用于视频文本检索任务。我们的MAC旨在通过掩模采样机制来减少VidLP模型中视频表示的空间和时间冗余，以提高预训练效率。与传统的时间稀疏采样相比，我们建议随机屏蔽高比例的空间区域，并且仅将可见区域作为稀疏空间采样输入编码器。同样，我们对文本输入采用掩模采样技术以保持一致性。我们没有盲目地应用 MAE 中的“mask-then-prediction”范式，而是提出了一种“masked-then-alignment”范式来实现高效的视频文本对齐。其动机是视频文本检索任务依赖于高级对齐而不是低级重建，并且带有掩码建模的多模态对齐鼓励模型从不完整和不稳定的输入中学习鲁棒且通用的多模态表示。将这些设计结合起来可实现高效的端到端预训练：减少 FLOP（减少 60%）、加速预训练（提高 3 倍）并提高性能。我们的 MAC 在各种视频文本检索数据集（包括 MSR-VTT、DiDeMo 和 ActivityNet）上取得了最先进的结果。我们的方法对输入方式是杂食性的。通过最小的修改，我们在图像文本检索任务上取得了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MAC的视频-文本检索预训练框架，通过掩码对比学习减少视频表示的冗余，提升预训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统视频-文本检索方法存在时空冗余和计算效率低的问题，而高阶语义对齐比低阶重建更能提升检索性能。
AI.method: 通过随机掩码视频的高比例空间区域并仅输入可见区域进行稀疏采样，结合文本掩码技术，采用掩码后对齐而非重建的范式，减少计算量并加速预训练。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT、DiDeMo等数据集上达到SOTA性能，计算量减少60%，预训练加速3倍，并可扩展至图像-文本检索任务。
AI.conclusion: MAC通过掩码对比预训练有效提升了视频-文本检索的效率与性能，且具有跨模态适应性。

authors_text: Dat Viet Thanh Nguyen,Phong Tran The,Tan M. Dinh,Cuong Pham,Anh Tuan Tran
title: QC-StyleGAN -- Quality Controllable Image Generation and Manipulation
title_zh: QC-StyleGAN——质量可控的图像生成和操作
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022; The code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/QC-StyleGAN
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022; The code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/QC-StyleGAN
abstract: The introduction of high-quality image generation models, particularly the StyleGAN family, provides a powerful tool to synthesize and manipulate images. However, existing models are built upon high-quality (HQ) data as desired outputs, making them unfit for in-the-wild low-quality (LQ) images, which are common inputs for manipulation. In this work, we bridge this gap by proposing a novel GAN structure that allows for generating images with controllable quality. The network can synthesize various image degradation and restore the sharp image via a quality control code. Our proposed QC-StyleGAN can directly edit LQ images without altering their quality by applying GAN inversion and manipulation techniques. It also provides for free an image restoration solution that can handle various degradations, including noise, blur, compression artifacts, and their mixtures. Finally, we demonstrate numerous other applications such as image degradation synthesis, transfer, and interpolation. The code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/QC-StyleGAN.
summary: The introduction of high-quality image generation models, particularly the StyleGAN family, provides a powerful tool to synthesize and manipulate images. However, existing models are built upon high-quality (HQ) data as desired outputs, making them unfit for in-the-wild low-quality (LQ) images, which are common inputs for manipulation. In this work, we bridge this gap by proposing a novel GAN structure that allows for generating images with controllable quality. The network can synthesize various image degradation and restore the sharp image via a quality control code. Our proposed QC-StyleGAN can directly edit LQ images without altering their quality by applying GAN inversion and manipulation techniques. It also provides for free an image restoration solution that can handle various degradations, including noise, blur, compression artifacts, and their mixtures. Finally, we demonstrate numerous other applications such as image degradation synthesis, transfer, and interpolation. The code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/QC-StyleGAN.
abstract_zh: 高质量图像生成模型（尤其是 StyleGAN 系列）的引入，为合成和操作图像提供了强大的工具。然而，现有模型是建立在高质量 (HQ) 数据作为所需输出的基础上的，这使得它们不适合野外低质量 (LQ) 图像，而这些图像是操作的常见输入。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种新颖的 GAN 结构来弥补这一差距，该结构允许生成质量可控的图像。该网络可以综合各种图像退化并通过质量控制代码恢复清晰的图像。我们提出的 QC-StyleGAN 可以通过应用 GAN 反转和操作技术直接编辑 LQ 图像，而不改变其质量。它还免费提供图像恢复解决方案，可以处理各种退化，包括噪声、模糊、压缩伪影及其混合。最后，我们演示了许多其他应用，例如图像退化合成、传输和插值。代码可在 https://github.com/VinAIResearch/QC-StyleGAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QC-StyleGAN，一种可控制图像质量生成和编辑的生成对抗网络（GAN）结构，能够处理低质量图像并实现质量可控的图像生成与修复。
AI.motivation: 现有高质量图像生成模型（如StyleGAN）依赖高质量数据训练，难以处理现实场景中常见的低质量图像输入，限制了其在图像编辑和修复中的应用。
AI.method: 设计新型GAN架构，通过质量控制代码（quality control code）合成不同退化程度的图像，并实现低质量图像的无损编辑与多退化类型的修复（如噪声、模糊、压缩伪影等）。
AI.result: QC-StyleGAN可直接编辑低质量图像而不改变其质量，提供通用图像修复方案，并支持退化合成、迁移和插值等应用，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了高质量生成模型与低质量图像处理之间的技术鸿沟，为图像生成、编辑和修复提供了统一的质量控制框架。

search_text: QC-StyleGAN -- Quality Controllable Image Generation and Manipulation QC-StyleGAN——质量可控的图像生成和操作 The introduction of high-quality image generation models, particularly the StyleGAN family, provides a powerful tool to synthesize and manipulate images. However, existing models are built upon high-quality (HQ) data as desired outputs, making them unfit for in-the-wild low-quality (LQ) images, which are common inputs for manipulation. In this work, we bridge this gap by proposing a novel GAN structure that allows for generating images with controllable quality. The network can synthesize various image degradation and restore the sharp image via a quality control code. Our proposed QC-StyleGAN can directly edit LQ images without altering their quality by applying GAN inversion and manipulation techniques. It also provides for free an image restoration solution that can handle various degradations, including noise, blur, compression artifacts, and their mixtures. Finally, we demonstrate numerous other applications such as image degradation synthesis, transfer, and interpolation. The code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/QC-StyleGAN. 高质量图像生成模型（尤其是 StyleGAN 系列）的引入，为合成和操作图像提供了强大的工具。然而，现有模型是建立在高质量 (HQ) 数据作为所需输出的基础上的，这使得它们不适合野外低质量 (LQ) 图像，而这些图像是操作的常见输入。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种新颖的 GAN 结构来弥补这一差距，该结构允许生成质量可控的图像。该网络可以综合各种图像退化并通过质量控制代码恢复清晰的图像。我们提出的 QC-StyleGAN 可以通过应用 GAN 反转和操作技术直接编辑 LQ 图像，而不改变其质量。它还免费提供图像恢复解决方案，可以处理各种退化，包括噪声、模糊、压缩伪影及其混合。最后，我们演示了许多其他应用，例如图像退化合成、传输和插值。代码可在 https://github.com/VinAIResearch/QC-StyleGAN 获取。 本文提出QC-StyleGAN，一种可控制图像质量生成和编辑的生成对抗网络（GAN）结构，能够处理低质量图像并实现质量可控的图像生成与修复。 Dat Viet Thanh Nguyen,Phong Tran The,Tan M. Dinh,Cuong Pham,Anh Tuan Tran cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Prithvijit Chattopadhyay,Kartik Sarangmath,Vivek Vijaykumar,Judy Hoffman
title: PASTA: Proportional Amplitude Spectrum Training Augmentation for Syn-to-Real Domain Generalization
title_zh: PASTA：用于同步到实数域泛化的比例幅度谱训练增强
abstract: Synthetic data offers the promise of cheap and bountiful training data for settings where labeled real-world data is scarce. However, models trained on synthetic data significantly underperform when evaluated on real-world data. In this paper, we propose Proportional Amplitude Spectrum Training Augmentation (PASTA), a simple and effective augmentation strategy to improve out-of-the-box synthetic-to-real (syn-to-real) generalization performance. PASTA perturbs the amplitude spectra of synthetic images in the Fourier domain to generate augmented views. Specifically, with PASTA we propose a structured perturbation strategy where high-frequency components are perturbed relatively more than the low-frequency ones. For the tasks of semantic segmentation (GTAV-to-Real), object detection (Sim10K-to-Real), and object recognition (VisDA-C Syn-to-Real), across a total of 5 syn-to-real shifts, we find that PASTA outperforms more complex state-of-the-art generalization methods while being complementary to the same.
summary: Synthetic data offers the promise of cheap and bountiful training data for settings where labeled real-world data is scarce. However, models trained on synthetic data significantly underperform when evaluated on real-world data. In this paper, we propose Proportional Amplitude Spectrum Training Augmentation (PASTA), a simple and effective augmentation strategy to improve out-of-the-box synthetic-to-real (syn-to-real) generalization performance. PASTA perturbs the amplitude spectra of synthetic images in the Fourier domain to generate augmented views. Specifically, with PASTA we propose a structured perturbation strategy where high-frequency components are perturbed relatively more than the low-frequency ones. For the tasks of semantic segmentation (GTAV-to-Real), object detection (Sim10K-to-Real), and object recognition (VisDA-C Syn-to-Real), across a total of 5 syn-to-real shifts, we find that PASTA outperforms more complex state-of-the-art generalization methods while being complementary to the same.
abstract_zh: 合成数据为标记的真实世界数据稀缺的环境提供了廉价且丰富的训练数据的希望。然而，在真实数据上进行评估时，基于合成数据训练的模型明显表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了比例幅度谱训练增强（PASTA），这是一种简单有效的增强策略，可以提高开箱即用的合成到真实（syn-to-real）的泛化性能。 PASTA 扰动傅里叶域中合成图像的幅度谱以生成增强视图。具体来说，通过 PASTA，我们提出了一种结构化扰动策略，其中高频分量比低频分量受到的扰动相对更多。对于语义分割 (GTAV-to-Real)、对象检测 (Sim10K-to-Real) 和对象识别 (VisDA-C Syn-to-Real) 任务，在总共 5 个 syn-to-real 转换中，我们发现 PASTA 优于更复杂的最先进的泛化方法，同时与其互补。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PASTA的频域幅度谱扰动方法，通过增强合成数据的高频特征来提升模型在真实场景中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 合成数据虽能提供大量标注样本，但直接训练的模型在真实场景中表现不佳，现有领域适应方法复杂且效果有限。
AI.method: 在傅里叶域对合成图像幅度谱进行结构化扰动，采用高频率成分更大扰动比例的策略生成增强样本。
AI.result: 在语义分割、目标检测和图像分类等5个合成到真实数据的迁移任务中，PASTA优于复杂方法且可与其他技术结合使用。
AI.conclusion: PASTA通过简单有效的频域增强策略显著提升合成到真实场景的泛化性能，具有良好的通用性和互补性。

authors_text: Jinyoung Park,Hyeong Kyu Choi,Juyeon Ko,Hyeonjin Park,Ji-Hoon Kim,Jisu Jeong,Kyungmin Kim,Hyunwoo J. Kim
title: Relation-Aware Language-Graph Transformer for Question Answering
title_zh: 用于问答的关系感知语言图转换器
abstract: Question Answering (QA) is a task that entails reasoning over natural language contexts, and many relevant works augment language models (LMs) with graph neural networks (GNNs) to encode the Knowledge Graph (KG) information. However, most existing GNN-based modules for QA do not take advantage of rich relational information of KGs and depend on limited information interaction between the LM and the KG. To address these issues, we propose Question Answering Transformer (QAT), which is designed to jointly reason over language and graphs with respect to entity relations in a unified manner. Specifically, QAT constructs Meta-Path tokens, which learn relation-centric embeddings based on diverse structural and semantic relations. Then, our Relation-Aware Self-Attention module comprehensively integrates different modalities via the Cross-Modal Relative Position Bias, which guides information exchange between relevant entites of different modalities. We validate the effectiveness of QAT on commonsense question answering datasets like CommonsenseQA and OpenBookQA, and on a medical question answering dataset, MedQA-USMLE. On all the datasets, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at http://github.com/mlvlab/QAT.
summary: Question Answering (QA) is a task that entails reasoning over natural language contexts, and many relevant works augment language models (LMs) with graph neural networks (GNNs) to encode the Knowledge Graph (KG) information. However, most existing GNN-based modules for QA do not take advantage of rich relational information of KGs and depend on limited information interaction between the LM and the KG. To address these issues, we propose Question Answering Transformer (QAT), which is designed to jointly reason over language and graphs with respect to entity relations in a unified manner. Specifically, QAT constructs Meta-Path tokens, which learn relation-centric embeddings based on diverse structural and semantic relations. Then, our Relation-Aware Self-Attention module comprehensively integrates different modalities via the Cross-Modal Relative Position Bias, which guides information exchange between relevant entites of different modalities. We validate the effectiveness of QAT on commonsense question answering datasets like CommonsenseQA and OpenBookQA, and on a medical question answering dataset, MedQA-USMLE. On all the datasets, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at http://github.com/mlvlab/QAT.
abstract_zh: 问答 (QA) 是一项需要对自然语言上下文进行推理的任务，许多相关工作使用图神经网络 (GNN) 来增强语言模型 (LM)，以对知识图 (KG) 信息进行编码。然而，大多数现有的基于 GNN 的 QA 模块并没有利用 KG 丰富的关系信息，而是依赖于 LM 和 KG 之间有限的信息交互。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了问答变压器（QAT），它旨在以统一的方式对实体关系的语言和图形进行联合推理。具体来说，QAT 构建元路径令牌，它根据不同的结构和语义关系学习以关系为中心的嵌入。然后，我们的关系感知自注意力模块通过跨模态相对位置偏差全面集成不同模态，指导不同模态相关实体之间的信息交换。我们在 CommonsenseQA 和 OpenBookQA 等常识问答数据集以及医学问答数据集 MedQA-USMLE 上验证了 QAT 的有效性。在所有数据集上，我们的方法都实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可从 http://github.com/mlvlab/QAT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合语言模型和图神经网络的问答系统，通过利用知识图谱中的关系信息提升问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的问答方法未能充分利用知识图谱的丰富关系信息，且语言模型与知识图谱之间的信息交互有限。
AI.method: 提出Question Answering Transformer（QAT），通过构建Meta-Path tokens学习关系中心嵌入，并设计跨模态相对位置偏置的自注意力机制，实现语言与图结构的联合推理。
AI.result: 在CommonsenseQA、OpenBookQA和MedQA-USMLE等数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: QAT通过有效整合知识图谱关系信息，显著提升了问答系统的推理能力。

authors_text: Z. Guo,J. Kang,D. Herremans
title: A Domain-Knowledge-Inspired Music Embedding Space and a Novel Attention Mechanism for Symbolic Music Modeling
title_zh: 领域知识启发的音乐嵌入空间和符号音乐建模的新颖注意机制
comment: This paper is accepted at AAAI 2023
comments: This paper is accepted at AAAI 2023
abstract: Following the success of the transformer architecture in the natural language domain, transformer-like architectures have been widely applied to the domain of symbolic music recently. Symbolic music and text, however, are two different modalities. Symbolic music contains multiple attributes, both absolute attributes (e.g., pitch) and relative attributes (e.g., pitch interval). These relative attributes shape human perception of musical motifs. These important relative attributes, however, are mostly ignored in existing symbolic music modeling methods with the main reason being the lack of a musically-meaningful embedding space where both the absolute and relative embeddings of the symbolic music tokens can be efficiently represented. In this paper, we propose the Fundamental Music Embedding (FME) for symbolic music based on a bias-adjusted sinusoidal encoding within which both the absolute and the relative attributes can be embedded and the fundamental musical properties (e.g., translational invariance) are explicitly preserved. Taking advantage of the proposed FME, we further propose a novel attention mechanism based on the relative index, pitch and onset embeddings (RIPO attention) such that the musical domain knowledge can be fully utilized for symbolic music modeling. Experiment results show that our proposed model: RIPO transformer which utilizes FME and RIPO attention outperforms the state-of-the-art transformers (i.e., music transformer, linear transformer) in a melody completion task. Moreover, using the RIPO transformer in a downstream music generation task, we notice that the notorious degeneration phenomenon no longer exists and the music generated by the RIPO transformer outperforms the music generated by state-of-the-art transformer models in both subjective and objective evaluations.
summary: Following the success of the transformer architecture in the natural language domain, transformer-like architectures have been widely applied to the domain of symbolic music recently. Symbolic music and text, however, are two different modalities. Symbolic music contains multiple attributes, both absolute attributes (e.g., pitch) and relative attributes (e.g., pitch interval). These relative attributes shape human perception of musical motifs. These important relative attributes, however, are mostly ignored in existing symbolic music modeling methods with the main reason being the lack of a musically-meaningful embedding space where both the absolute and relative embeddings of the symbolic music tokens can be efficiently represented. In this paper, we propose the Fundamental Music Embedding (FME) for symbolic music based on a bias-adjusted sinusoidal encoding within which both the absolute and the relative attributes can be embedded and the fundamental musical properties (e.g., translational invariance) are explicitly preserved. Taking advantage of the proposed FME, we further propose a novel attention mechanism based on the relative index, pitch and onset embeddings (RIPO attention) such that the musical domain knowledge can be fully utilized for symbolic music modeling. Experiment results show that our proposed model: RIPO transformer which utilizes FME and RIPO attention outperforms the state-of-the-art transformers (i.e., music transformer, linear transformer) in a melody completion task. Moreover, using the RIPO transformer in a downstream music generation task, we notice that the notorious degeneration phenomenon no longer exists and the music generated by the RIPO transformer outperforms the music generated by state-of-the-art transformer models in both subjective and objective evaluations.
abstract_zh: 继 Transformer 架构在自然语言领域的成功之后，类 Transformer 架构最近已广泛应用于符号音乐领域。然而，象征性音乐和文本是两种不同的形式。象征音乐包含多种属性，既有绝对属性（例如音高），也有相对属性（例如音高音程）。这些相对属性塑造了人类对音乐主题的感知。然而，这些重要的相对属性在现有的符号音乐建模方法中大多被忽略，主要原因是缺乏可以有效表示符号音乐标记的绝对和相对嵌入的具有音乐意义的嵌入空间。在本文中，我们提出了基于偏差调整正弦编码的符号音乐的基本音乐嵌入（FME），其中可以嵌入绝对属性和相对属性，并且显式保留基本音乐属性（例如平移不变性）。利用所提出的 FME，我们进一步提出了一种基于相对索引、音高和起始嵌入（RIPO 注意）的新颖注意机制，以便可以充分利用音乐领域知识进行符号音乐建模。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型：利用 FME 和 RIPO 注意力的 RIPO Transformer 在旋律完成任务中优于最先进的 Transformer（即音乐 Transformer、线性 Transformer）。此外，在下游音乐生成任务中使用 RIPO Transformer，我们注意到臭名昭著的退化现象不再存在，并且 RIPO Transformer 生成的音乐在主观和客观评估中都优于最先进的 Transformer 模型生成的音乐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于领域知识的符号音乐嵌入空间（FME）和一种新型注意力机制（RIPO注意力），以改进符号音乐建模。
AI.motivation: 现有符号音乐建模方法忽略了音乐中重要的相对属性（如音高间隔），缺乏能够同时高效表示绝对和相对属性的音乐语义嵌入空间。
AI.method: 设计了基于偏差调整正弦编码的Fundamental Music Embedding（FME），并提出结合相对索引、音高和起始时间嵌入的RIPO注意力机制，以利用音乐领域知识。
AI.result: RIPO Transformer在旋律补全任务中优于现有模型（如Music Transformer），且在音乐生成任务中解决了退化现象，主客观评价均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过融合音乐领域知识，有效建模了符号音乐的绝对与相对属性，提升了音乐生成质量并解决了退化问题。

search_text: A Domain-Knowledge-Inspired Music Embedding Space and a Novel Attention Mechanism for Symbolic Music Modeling 领域知识启发的音乐嵌入空间和符号音乐建模的新颖注意机制 Following the success of the transformer architecture in the natural language domain, transformer-like architectures have been widely applied to the domain of symbolic music recently. Symbolic music and text, however, are two different modalities. Symbolic music contains multiple attributes, both absolute attributes (e.g., pitch) and relative attributes (e.g., pitch interval). These relative attributes shape human perception of musical motifs. These important relative attributes, however, are mostly ignored in existing symbolic music modeling methods with the main reason being the lack of a musically-meaningful embedding space where both the absolute and relative embeddings of the symbolic music tokens can be efficiently represented. In this paper, we propose the Fundamental Music Embedding (FME) for symbolic music based on a bias-adjusted sinusoidal encoding within which both the absolute and the relative attributes can be embedded and the fundamental musical properties (e.g., translational invariance) are explicitly preserved. Taking advantage of the proposed FME, we further propose a novel attention mechanism based on the relative index, pitch and onset embeddings (RIPO attention) such that the musical domain knowledge can be fully utilized for symbolic music modeling. Experiment results show that our proposed model: RIPO transformer which utilizes FME and RIPO attention outperforms the state-of-the-art transformers (i.e., music transformer, linear transformer) in a melody completion task. Moreover, using the RIPO transformer in a downstream music generation task, we notice that the notorious degeneration phenomenon no longer exists and the music generated by the RIPO transformer outperforms the music generated by state-of-the-art transformer models in both subjective and objective evaluations. 继 Transformer 架构在自然语言领域的成功之后，类 Transformer 架构最近已广泛应用于符号音乐领域。然而，象征性音乐和文本是两种不同的形式。象征音乐包含多种属性，既有绝对属性（例如音高），也有相对属性（例如音高音程）。这些相对属性塑造了人类对音乐主题的感知。然而，这些重要的相对属性在现有的符号音乐建模方法中大多被忽略，主要原因是缺乏可以有效表示符号音乐标记的绝对和相对嵌入的具有音乐意义的嵌入空间。在本文中，我们提出了基于偏差调整正弦编码的符号音乐的基本音乐嵌入（FME），其中可以嵌入绝对属性和相对属性，并且显式保留基本音乐属性（例如平移不变性）。利用所提出的 FME，我们进一步提出了一种基于相对索引、音高和起始嵌入（RIPO 注意）的新颖注意机制，以便可以充分利用音乐领域知识进行符号音乐建模。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型：利用 FME 和 RIPO 注意力的 RIPO Transformer 在旋律完成任务中优于最先进的 Transformer（即音乐 Transformer、线性 Transformer）。此外，在下游音乐生成任务中使用 RIPO Transformer，我们注意到臭名昭著的退化现象不再存在，并且 RIPO Transformer 生成的音乐在主观和客观评估中都优于最先进的 Transformer 模型生成的音乐。 本文提出了一种基于领域知识的符号音乐嵌入空间（FME）和一种新型注意力机制（RIPO注意力），以改进符号音乐建模。 Z. Guo,J. Kang,D. Herremans cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS,eess.SP

authors_text: Yulu Gan,Mingjie Pan,Rongyu Zhang,Zijian Ling,Lingran Zhao,Jiaming Liu,Shanghang Zhang
title: Cloud-Device Collaborative Adaptation to Continual Changing Environments in the Real-world
title_zh: 云端协同适应现实世界中不断变化的环境
abstract: When facing changing environments in the real world, the lightweight model on client devices suffers from severe performance drops under distribution shifts. The main limitations of the existing device model lie in (1) unable to update due to the computation limit of the device, (2) the limited generalization ability of the lightweight model. Meanwhile, recent large models have shown strong generalization capability on the cloud while they can not be deployed on client devices due to poor computation constraints. To enable the device model to deal with changing environments, we propose a new learning paradigm of Cloud-Device Collaborative Continual Adaptation, which encourages collaboration between cloud and device and improves the generalization of the device model. Based on this paradigm, we further propose an Uncertainty-based Visual Prompt Adapted (U-VPA) teacher-student model to transfer the generalization capability of the large model on the cloud to the device model. Specifically, we first design the Uncertainty Guided Sampling (UGS) to screen out challenging data continuously and transmit the most out-of-distribution samples from the device to the cloud. Then we propose a Visual Prompt Learning Strategy with Uncertainty guided updating (VPLU) to specifically deal with the selected samples with more distribution shifts. We transmit the visual prompts to the device and concatenate them with the incoming data to pull the device testing distribution closer to the cloud training distribution. We conduct extensive experiments on two object detection datasets with continually changing environments. Our proposed U-VPA teacher-student framework outperforms previous state-of-the-art test time adaptation and device-cloud collaboration methods. The code and datasets will be released.
summary: When facing changing environments in the real world, the lightweight model on client devices suffers from severe performance drops under distribution shifts. The main limitations of the existing device model lie in (1) unable to update due to the computation limit of the device, (2) the limited generalization ability of the lightweight model. Meanwhile, recent large models have shown strong generalization capability on the cloud while they can not be deployed on client devices due to poor computation constraints. To enable the device model to deal with changing environments, we propose a new learning paradigm of Cloud-Device Collaborative Continual Adaptation, which encourages collaboration between cloud and device and improves the generalization of the device model. Based on this paradigm, we further propose an Uncertainty-based Visual Prompt Adapted (U-VPA) teacher-student model to transfer the generalization capability of the large model on the cloud to the device model. Specifically, we first design the Uncertainty Guided Sampling (UGS) to screen out challenging data continuously and transmit the most out-of-distribution samples from the device to the cloud. Then we propose a Visual Prompt Learning Strategy with Uncertainty guided updating (VPLU) to specifically deal with the selected samples with more distribution shifts. We transmit the visual prompts to the device and concatenate them with the incoming data to pull the device testing distribution closer to the cloud training distribution. We conduct extensive experiments on two object detection datasets with continually changing environments. Our proposed U-VPA teacher-student framework outperforms previous state-of-the-art test time adaptation and device-cloud collaboration methods. The code and datasets will be released.
abstract_zh: 当面对现实世界中不断变化的环境时，客户端设备上的轻量级模型在分布变化的情况下会遭受严重的性能下降。现有设备模型的主要局限性在于（1）由于设备的计算限制而无法更新；（2）轻量级模型的泛化能力有限。同时，最近的大型模型在云上显示出强大的泛化能力，但由于计算限制较差而无法部署在客户端设备上。为了使设备模型能够应对不断变化的环境，我们提出了一种新的云设备协作持续适应的学习范式，它鼓励云和设备之间的协作并提高设备模型的泛化能力。基于此范式，我们进一步提出了一种基于不确定性的视觉提示适应（U-VPA）师生模型，将云上大型模型的泛化能力转移到设备模型。具体来说，我们首先设计了不确定性引导采样（UGS）来不断筛选出具有挑战性的数据，并将最不分布的样本从设备传输到云端。然后，我们提出了一种具有不确定性引导更新（VPLU）的视觉提示学习策略，以专门处理具有更多分布变化的选定样本。我们将视觉提示传输到设备，并将它们与传入数据连接起来，以使设备测试分布更接近云训练分布。我们在环境不断变化的两个对象检测数据集上进行了广泛的实验。我们提出的 U-VPA 师生框架优于之前最先进的测试时间适应和设备云协作方法。代码和数据集将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种云-设备协同持续适应的新型学习范式，以解决真实世界中设备模型在环境变化下的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有设备模型因计算限制无法更新且泛化能力有限，而云端大模型虽泛化能力强但无法部署到设备端，需通过协同机制提升设备模型适应能力。
AI.method: 设计了基于不确定性的视觉提示自适应（U-VPA）师生模型，通过不确定性引导采样（UGS）筛选挑战性数据，并采用不确定性引导的视觉提示学习策略（VPLU）优化设备模型分布。
AI.result: 在两个持续变化的物体检测数据集上，U-VPA框架优于现有测试时适应和云-设备协作方法。
AI.conclusion: 云-设备协同持续适应范式有效提升了设备模型在动态环境中的泛化能力，为实际部署提供了可行方案。
